**Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**
 🚀 Spännande uppdrag hos våra många kunder. Vi fokuserar på långsiktiga uppdrag, vilket ger dig möjlighet att skapa värde för kunden samtidigt som du utvecklas själv.
   

  

 🌟 En trygg månadslön – tillsammans bestämmer vi en grundlön baserad på dina uppdrag.
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension och stora möjligheter till löneväxling.
   

  

 🌴 Semester - Önskar du mer än 30 dagar semester, kanske 60 dagar?
   

  

 🏥 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring, olycksfallsförsäkring och livförsäkring för ökad trygghet.
   

  

 📚 Kompetensutveckling – du får själv sätta din budget och välja vilka utbildningar du vill delta i.
   

  

 🕑 Livskvalitet - Har du kanske svårt att få ihop pusslet i vardagen och önskar arbeta lite mindre och ändå kunna tjäna lika mycket om inte mer?
   

  

* Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande, med hänsyn till höga arbetstrycket är det extra viktigt med en kort motivering för tjänsten som förklarar hur man möter kraven.

title: Data Engineer (Consultant)
description:
**Come work with us** 




 Netlight strives to be a truly diverse, equitable and inclusive organization. Regardless of who you are, what personality, background, and experience you have, you enrich our culture through your values. Netlight’s purpose is to unleash full potential, realize great careers, and fulfill personal growth. To achieve this, we have a highly engaged network organization, where every employee gets a mentor, delivery coach and personal communities. The key to our continued success is trust and personal responsibility, diverse experiences, challenging opportunities and developing from personal values. Every Netlighter is an active part of building and shaping this culture, which leads to a clear correlation between personal growth and the growth of Netlight.
 



  





**About us** 




 Netlight provides a full range of premium IT-consulting services at the forefront of the digital industry and stands out for its product- and technology-independent expertise in a wide range of industries and clients. We are a network organization of more than 2 000 role models making aspiring digital leaders successful in their business-critical IT projects. Netlight has been awarded several times as top employer, as well as for growth, continued profitability and engagement for diversity, equity and equality within the IT industry. Today we are growing all across Europe, currently with more than 13 active international offices.
 



  





**What does it mean to be a Data Engineer Consultant at Netlight?** 




 It will vary a lot between Netlighters as we, around the right person, will design a role together with you. You will be starting somewhere familiar with your experience, and from there it is your call how your career at Netlight will look, ranging from which clients you will work with, what role you want to take (based on your personal experience, strengths, your personal interest) and how your relationship with your mentor/coach/EDGE networks/social networks will look like. As a consultant at Netlight, you will build the products, systems, and technical solutions of today and tomorrow. This means that our consultants get the opportunity to help build and scale existing and new products and companies and also continuously learn and master a variety of technical tools. At Netlight, we will challenge you. Our clients will challenge you. You will challenge our clients. You will challenge us. We will grow together and unleash the potential in each other.
 



  





 As a Data Engineer Consultant, you will help our clients in projects with roles in Data Engineering. It can be working within Data Engineering, Data Architecture, or project management in terms of working with data or utilizing data to make product decisions to mention a few examples.
 



  





**Minimum Qualifications** 



* Master Degree in Engineering or Technology
* Verbal and written fluency in English
* 0,5-5 years of work experience within the data engineering field related to IT and software products in agile teams



  





**Application** 




 We are always looking for new Netlighters, so feel free to apply if you meet the qualifications. We will get in touch within two weeks if we find that your profile and experiences are a match beyond the qualifications at this time.

title: Fullstack Engineer (Frontend)
description:
**The Mission**
 Backlight is a global media technology company dedicated to improving the entire video content lifecycle, from creation to monetization. Our suite of SaaS solutions empowers creative teams at every stage of production and is trusted by video-forward organizations like Google, Ubisoft, the Atlanta Hawks, and Marvel.
   

  

 We’re looking for an engineer who leads with the frontend but owns features end-to-end—from the interface down to the API layer. You’ll spend the vast majority of your time crafting fast, intuitive React applications, while also having the autonomy to write and extend the Python services that power them.
   

  

 You’ll join a cross-functional product team alongside designers, PMs, and backend specialists, shaping the user experience while having the technical freedom to reach into the stack whenever your features need it.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Build and maintain scalable, reliable frontend applications using React, TypeScript, and modern JavaScript.
* Design responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces that work beautifully across devices.
* Write and extend backend services in Python when your features require it — building endpoints, updating data models, and connecting the dots between frontend and backend.
* Collaborate closely with backend, product, and design teams to integrate APIs and bring features to life.
* Help diagnose, troubleshoot, and solve real production issues across the stack.
* Bring new ideas around tooling, frameworks, architecture, and ways of working — your creativity matters here.


**Requirements**
 We believe great engineers can learn new tools as they go — what matters most is your ability and genuine drive to build great user experiences and collaborate well. In addition, we believe the right person has:
   

  

* 3+ years of experience building and shipping scalable web applications.
* Strong command of React, TypeScript, and modern JavaScript patterns.
* Comfortable working across the stack, including REST APIs, Git workflows, and light backend development in Python or a similar language.
* Experience writing clean, structured, testable, and maintainable code.
* Strong communication skills — you collaborate openly and value teamwork.
* Knowledge of CSS frameworks and modern styling approaches.


**Bonus points**
* Experience building SaaS products, mentoring peers or Scrum facilitation.


**Work Arrangement**
**Location:** 
 Stockholm
   

  

**Time zone:** 
 CET

title: Office Coordinator
description:
**About the role:**
 We're looking for a sharp, proactive operator who thrives on making things run seamlessly behind the scenes. This is a high-impact role at the center of our business, you'll be the person leaders rely on, the one new hires remember, and the reason our office actually works.
   

  

 If you're someone who gets ahead of problems before they happen, communicates with confidence and warmth, and takes genuine pride in keeping a busy team firing on all cylinders — we want to hear from you!
   

  

***A quick note before you apply:***
*This role is a 30-day interim contract. If it's a great fit on both sides, we're open to continued hourly collaboration beyond that — so there's real potential for the relationship to grow.*
**What you'll do:**
*Executive Support*
* Own the calendars, travel, and logistics for senior leadership, proactively, not reactively
* Be the first impression for guests and visiting colleagues, setting the tone for how we show up
* Prepare polished documents, presentations, and reports when it counts
* Handle sensitive information with discretion and good judgment


*Office Management*
* Run day-to-day office operations; supplies, equipment, vendor relationship, so nothing slips
* Be the go-to contact for facilities and maintenance, owning issues through to resolution
* Ensure health and safety standards are upheld
* Support a smooth onboarding experience for new joiners and liaise with HR and Payroll
* Keep systems, records, and processes tight and accessible


**What We're Looking For**
* Proven background as an EA, Office Manager, or similar, you've done this before and done it well
* Calm under pressure, diplomatic in tricky situations, warm with people
* A "figure it out" mindset, you assess quickly, adapt fast, and don't wait to be told
* Exceptional organizational skills with the ability to juggle competing priorities without dropping the ball
* Strong written and verbal communication — clear, professional, and human
* Comfortable working independently with minimal direction


**A note on working style**
 This is an office-based role, 8am–5pm. Because we operate across multiple time zones and jurisdictions, you'll need a genuine willingness to flex when the business demands it — and we'll do the same for you.

title: Backend Engineer
description:
**The work** 





 You won’t be gluing COBOL together. Our core platform is a Java/Spring Boot monolith - deliberately so - that handles checkout flows, real-time credit decisions, bank clearing, AML compliance, multi-currency accounting, and direct integrations with European banks and payment providers.
 




  






 Every line of code you write has consequences. It moves money. It approves or denies credit. It talks to regulators. This is engineering where the edge cases aren’t theoretical - they’re someone’s car purchase failing at 2pm on a Sunday.
 




  





**The tech** 



* Java with Spring Boot
* PostgreSQL with 1500+ Flyway migrations - the schema tells the story of the company
* REST APIs with OpenAPI specs
* AWS, the good parts - EC2, S3, Bedrock etc
* Kubernetes to tie it all together



  





**What we’re really looking for** 





 Here’s the thing. AI can generate code now. That’s not a secret. What it can’t do - what it won’t do for a long time - is
 
*think* 

 about systems. Anticipate the failure mode nobody asked about. See the race condition hiding behind a perfectly reasonable-looking feature request. We need people who look at a spec and immediately start asking “what happens when...”
 

 We don’t care about your years of experience. We care about how you think.
 

 If that sounds like you, let’s talk.
 




  





**Bonus:** 



* Deep Java experience
* Strong SQL and PostgreSQL instincts
* An obsession with edge cases, failure modes, and the question “what could go wrong here?”
* The ability to hold a large, complex system in your head and reason about it



  





**Why Zaver** 





 World’s most efficient guerilla group - tight team, real problems. No middle management. The best ideas win. You’ll work directly on infrastructure that handles real money in different countries, and you’ll see your decisions play out in production.
 




  






 We’re building something that matters, with people who care about getting it right.
 
 Let’s challenge legacy solutions together and make some waves within payments ⚡

title: Project Coordinator / Junior Program Analyst
description:
**We are looking for a PMO Support / Junior Program Analyst for a company in Stockholm. Start is in April, 12-month limited contract to begin with.** 




  





 The CRM program management team needs support in preparing meetings, keeping meeting minutes, following up on decided actions, maintaining the program plan, and other governance activities.
 



 The role will participate in work to align countries, business units and technology teams. The Program Management team consists of program managers responsible for IT, Business and Transformation.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 • Manage the program calendar, invites and booking of resources for program events
 



 • Prepare agendas, slide packs, and decision points for steering groups and other governance forums
 



 • Maintain templates for status reporting and collect inputs from streams and solution areas and ensure consistency in the materials
 



 • Document meeting minutes during key program meetings, capture decisions, action items, owners, and deadlines
 



 • Track actions and ensure timely follow-up with responsible owners
 



 • Keep program documentation and folder structures up to date
 



 • Maintain program artefacts describing setup, overall plan, stakeholders, governance structures etc.
 



  





**Required Competences** 




 Junior resource, preferably with experience from
 



 • PMO support, project coordination, or similar structured support roles
 



 • Ability to capture and summarise complex discussions
 



 • Strong drive to ensure actions are followed
 



 • Comfortable coordinating many stakeholders across business, IT, and vendors
 



 • Proactive, detail-oriented, and able to maintain structure in a fast-moving program
 



 • Good communication skills and high proficiency in MS Office (PowerPoint/Excel/Word)
 



 • Experience from Jira
 



  





**This role requires fluency in Swedish and English, both written and spoken.** 




  





 This is a full-time consultant position in Stockholm through Incluso. Start is in April, 12-month imited contract to begin with, with possibility of extension after that. This role is 100% onsite in Stockholm.
 



  





 Please submit your CV as soon as possible since we will review the applications on an on-going basis.
 



  





 For more information about this role, please contact Marianne Nilsson
 
 recruiter at Incluso.

title: Student Content Creator (Part-time/Flexible)
description:
**About The Role** 




 We are looking for creative, social-media-savvy students across Sweden to join our team as Student Content Creators.
 



 In this role, you will help bring the student experience to life by producing authentic, fun and engaging
 **content in Swedish** 
 for our platforms studentum.se and gymnasium.se.
 



 This is a flexible, paid opportunity to gain hands-on experience in content creation, digital marketing, and brand communication while continuing your studies. Are you a TikTok genius, aspiring influencer or someone who enjoys sharing what student life is really like? Then this could be the perfect opportunity for you. You'll collaborate with our marketing team while having the freedom to express your own style, creativity and perspective.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 As a Student Content Creator, you may:
 


* Film and photograph in your city or school environment
* Conduct short street or campus interviews
* Create short-form content for TikTok and Instagram (Reels/Stories)
* Showcase real student life through authentic storytelling
* Produce content for our brands and occasionally for our education partners



 All content will be created in Swedish for a Swedish student audience.
 



  





**Who We’re Looking For** 




 We welcome students who are:
 


* Currently in upper secondary school (high school), early years of university/college, or other post-secondary education
* Active and confident on social media platforms such as TikTok and Instagram, with a good sense of what makes engaging content
* Passionate about content creation and storytelling (no professional experience required)
* Curious, proactive, and confident speaking with others
* Willing to experiment and try new creative ideas



 As this role focuses on a Swedish audience, the position requires native or fluent Swedish and the ability to create content in Swedish.
 



 Basic English proficiency is also needed for internal communication.
 



  





**What We Offer** 



* Paid assignments (hourly or per project, agreed individually)
* Flexible schedule that fits around your studies
* Real-world experience in content creation and marketing
* Collaboration with a supportive and creative team
* Opportunity to build your portfolio and personal brand



  





 All content will be clearly labeled and agreed upon for use in our channels and campaigns.
 



  





**Application instructions** 




  





 Apply without a CV!
 



  





 All you need to do is upload a video telling us why you would be perfect for this role.
 



 Your video can be silly, funny, long, short, serious — however you want! It’s completely up to you.
 



  





 Here’s how to apply:
 


* Record a short application video of yourself where you tell us who you are, why you’re applying, and why you would be a great fit for this role.
* Keep your video between 1–2 minutes.
* Editing is optional, as long as you stay within the time limit.
* Upload your video and answer a few short questions by clicking “Apply here.”
* Post it on your social media account — optional but encouraged. If you do, tag our accounts (studentum.se or gymnasium.se) so we can see your submission.
* Done!



  





 That’s it! We review applications on a rolling basis and will reach out if you move forward in the process.
 



  





**Please note that your video should be created and submitted in Swedish.**

title: AI Specialist
description:
test
   

  

 Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: IT- och digitaliseringsdirektör
description:
Vill du ha meningsfulla arbetsuppgifter som gör skillnad i människors liv? Välkommen till kommunen som är långt ifrån lagom!
   

  

 Kommunstyrelseförvaltningen ansvarar för styrning, ledning och samordning i kommunen. Vi bidrar till att visioner och politiska beslut blir verklighet. Vi är cirka 275 medarbetare med specialistkunskaper inom bland annat ekonomi, inköp, HR, kommunikation, utveckling och förvaltning, digitalisering, juridik, platsutveckling och trygghets- och säkerhetsfrågor.
   

  

**Tjänsten och arbetsuppgifterna**
 Vi söker en IT‑ och digitaliseringsdirektör som vill leda och utveckla Botkyrka kommuns digitala transformation.
   

  

 I rollen leder du kommunens samlade arbete inom IT‑styrning, digital utveckling, informationssäkerhet och IT‑drift. Du ansvarar för att digitala tjänster, tekniska miljöer och styrmodeller stödjer verksamheternas behov, stärker kommunens långsiktiga utveckling och skapar trygg, tillgänglig och effektiv service för invånare och medarbetare. Du ingår i kommunledningen och leder IT‑ och digitaliseringsorganisationen genom chefer.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* utveckla och genomföra kommunens digitaliseringsstrategi
* säkerställa stabil, säker och leveranssäker IT‑drift och support av verksamhetskritiska tjänster
* ansvara för IT‑portföljstyrning, projektkontor och kommunens IT‑ och verksamhetsarkitektur
* leda och följa upp digitaliseringsinitiativ, utvecklingsprojekt och tekniska investeringar
* styra och följa upp externa IT‑tjänsteleverantörer och säkerställa efterlevnad av säkerhets‑ och arkitekturprinciper
* säkerställa att digitaliseringsarbetet följer lagar och nationella krav, inklusive regelverk inom informationshantering, cybersäkerhet och dataskydd.


 I uppdraget arbetar du nära kommunens förvaltningar, politisk ledning, externa samarbetspartners och leverantörer. Du har ett strategiskt ansvar för att stärka kommunens digitala förmåga, utveckla gemensamma arbetssätt och skapa en långsiktigt hållbar digital infrastruktur som stödjer kommunal välfärd och stödprocesser över tid.
   

  

**Vi erbjuder dig**
 Du blir en del av kommunledningen och leder en organisation med kompetenser inom IT‑styrning, digital utveckling, informationssäkerhet, drift och support. Här finns specialistroller, projektledare, arkitekter och tekniska experter som tillsammans arbetar för att ge Botkyrkas verksamheter stabila, moderna och säkra förutsättningar. Avdelningen står inför viktiga utvecklingsområden, bland annat modernisering av tekniska plattformar, vidareutveckling av styrmodeller och fortsatt förstärkning av informations- och cybersäkerheten.
   

  

 I Botkyrka får du arbeta i en samhällsviktig verksamhet med höga ambitioner inom digitalisering och välfärdsteknik. Du får möjlighet att påverka kommunens långsiktiga utveckling och bidra till att skapa hållbara lösningar som gör skillnad för invånare, verksamheter och medarbetare.
   

  

**Du som söker till oss**
 Du har en akademisk examen inom IT, systemvetenskap, teknik, digitalisering eller annan relevant inriktning. Du har flera års erfarenhet av att leda och utveckla IT‑verksamhet och digital utveckling på strategisk nivå, samt erfarenhet av att leda genom chefer i en större och komplex organisation.
   

  

 Övriga krav för tjänsten:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av arbete i en politiskt styrd organisation.
* Erfarenhet av att leda IT‑drift och daglig leverans i miljöer med höga krav, dygnet‑runt‑verksamhet och säkerhetsskyddsklassade delar.
* Erfarenhet av digital verksamhetsutveckling i en större komplex organisation.
* Erfarenhet av informationssäkerhetsansvar i en större organisation med säkerhetsklassning.
* Erfarenhet av IT‑ och utvecklingsstyrning, inklusive portföljstyrning och styrmodeller.
* Erfarenhet av omfattande ekonomiskt ansvar och styrmodeller baserade på internfakturering.
* God förståelse för hur en svensk kommun styrs och de krav som ställs på en ledande tjänsteperson.
* Kunskap om lagstiftning inom informationshantering, inklusive dataskyddsförordningen, cybersäkerhetslagstiftning och EU‑regelverk som AI‑förordningen.
* Kunskap om offentlig upphandling (LoU) och leverantörsstyrning.


 Vi ser det som meriterande om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av digitalisering inom kommunal välfärd såsom utbildning, vård och omsorg.
* Erfarenhet av digitalisering av administrativa stödprocesser som ekonomi, HR, registratur och arkiv.
* Kunskap om informationsförvaltning i kommunal kontext.
* Kunskap inom verksamhetsarkitektur, informationsarkitektur och modern teknik, inklusive teknisk infrastruktur, integrationer och AI‑användning.


 Som IT‑ och digitaliseringsdirektör är du strategisk och analytisk. Du skapar helhetsperspektiv i en komplex verksamhet och prioriterar initiativ som stärker kommunens långsiktiga digitala förmåga. Genom din förmåga att se samband mellan verksamhetsbehov, teknik och säkerhet omsätter du digitala möjligheter till hållbara lösningar.
   

  

 Du är trygg i ditt ledarskap och samarbetsorienterad. Du leder genom chefer och bygger förtroendefulla samarbeten både internt och externt. Genom tydlighet, lyhördhet och ett inkluderande arbetssätt samlar du aktörer kring gemensamma mål och skapar engagemang i utvecklingsarbetet.
   

  

 Anställningsform: tillsvidareanställning | Anställningens omfattning: heltid | Antal lediga befattningar: 1 | Sysselsättningsgrad: 100% | Ort: Tumba | Län: Stockholms län | Land: Sweden | Referensnummer: KS/2026:00175 | Publicerat: 2026-03-27 | Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-04-10

title: Sound Design Intern
description:
**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

 Battlefield is a storied franchise renowned for uncompromising combat gameplay and all-out warfare, for over two decades. 100 million players and 5 billion hours played later, Battlefield Studios is defining the future of the first-person shooter with the biggest launch in franchise history with Battlefield 6, and a new era beginning with Battlefield REDSEC.
   

  

 United under the banner of Battlefield Studios, 4 world-class teams across Criterion, DICE, Motive, and Ripple Effect have come together to focus on the future of the franchise, a connected Battlefield universe filled with immersive experiences built on our unique DNA.
   

  

 LET’S PUSH THINGS FORWARD
   

  

 DICE is a creative studio with offices in Stockholm and Gothenburg. We believe in the power of inclusion and welcome game creators from all backgrounds to collaborate with us as we unlock the potential for the future of Battlefield!
   

  

 We’re always pushing to be at the forefront of creative entertainment - blending digital art, design, and technology to push boundaries. Our collaborative culture is fueled by passion, driving innovation and making a positive difference for our players and community.
   

  

 At DICE, your ideas matter. We offer an inclusive space where you can thrive, be yourself, and grow alongside a team dedicated to making a meaningful impact to the world of gaming.
   

  

 We’re all-in on the future and our most ambitious Battlefield yet. Want to be part of something special? Read on.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Working under a Lead sound designer, you will work within a small and well defined area of a project's sound design.
* You will create content in line with existing designs and audio direction and implement this into the game using the Frostbite game engine.
* Through playtesting and feedback sessions you will refine the content and its supporting logic to ensure it is fit for purpose and improve quality.
* As a part of the Audio team, you will provide and respond to Audio feedback and be an active mixer for your assets, and provide feedback on the title's overall mix.


**Skills**
* Experience of designing sounds for interactive or linear media.
* Proficient skills with modern studio hardware, editing and designing techniques, and software such as Reaper, ProTools, Sound Forge, Waves, IzoTope RX.
* Desire to develop your game audio production, implementation, and engineering skills.
* Outstanding "critical listening" skills.
* Knowledge of audio middleware, e.g. WWISE, FMOD, Unreal, Unity are beneficial but not essential.
* Knowledge of graphical audio programming, e.g. Reaktor, Max-MSP, Pure Data, is beneficial.


**Eligibility**
* You must be currently enrolled at university or education provider with a planned internship period planned into the education plan, (e.g. LiA)
* You are eligible to work in Stockholm, Sweden, without the need for visa/relocation support
* You are available to commence a full-time 6 month placement in January 2026.


 Help us make play happen. Apply now with an up-to-date CV and show-reel (sound design skills in linear or interactive media) in
 **English** 
 , explaining why you would like to join EA for this internship position.
   

  

**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

title: Är du Stockholms vassaste Onsitetekniker?
description:
Är du en serviceminded och positiv onsitetekniker som gillar att lösa problem på plats? Vill du arbeta nära användarna och ge riktigt bra support? Då har vi rollen för dig!
 



  





 Som konsult på Eccera får du en trygg anställning och samlar på dig värdefull arbetslivserfarenhet på uppdrag hos våra kunder. Din konsultchef stöttar dig i din utveckling där du hela tiden fyller på med nya erfarenheter och kunskaper. En utmärkt möjlighet att göra karriär.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 




 I rollen som onsitetekniker kommer du att arbeta direkt hos våra kunder i Stockholmsområdet och vara deras trygga kontaktperson för IT-relaterade frågor. Du kommer att hantera allt från felsökning och installation av hårdvara och mjukvara till administration av användarkonton i Active Directory. Arbetet sker främst i Windows-miljö, men det är meriterande om du även har erfarenhet av MacOS. Du kommer att utföra grundläggande nätverksarbete, hantera skrivare och se till att systemen fungerar optimalt. Rollen innebär att du är hands-on, löser problem snabbt och bidrar till en positiv användarupplevelse.
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som brinner för att ge riktigt bra service och som alltid möter användare med ett positivt och professionellt bemötande. Du är lösningsorienterad, tar initiativ och gillar att ta ansvar för att saker fungerar som de ska. Rollen kräver att du är flexibel och trivs med att arbeta i olika miljöer, där du snabbt kan anpassa dig till nya situationer. Du har en pedagogisk förmåga och kan förklara tekniska lösningar på ett enkelt och tydligt sätt. Dessutom är du strukturerad, stresstålig och har lätt för att samarbeta med både användare och kollegor.
 



  





**Krav** 



* Minst 1 års erfarenhet av liknande roll
* Kunskap i Active Directory och Windows-miljö
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Microsoft 365
* Grundläggande nätverkskunskaper
* Mycket god kunskap av felsökning kring både mjuk- och hårdvara
* Talar och skriver obehindrat på svenska och engelska
* Vana att hantera och felsöka skrivare
* B-körkort



  





**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet av MacOS
* Certifieringar inom IT



  





 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 På Eccera får du de verktyg du behöver för att nå dina mål. Vi erbjuder alla våra konsulter kvalificerade utbildningar och certifieringar inom den senaste tekniken. Vi sätter stort värde på att våra medarbetare hela tiden ska fortsätta att utvecklas. Därför erbjuder vi dig möjligheten att lägga upp en individuell utbildningsplan, där vi bekostar såväl studiematerial som själva certifieringarna. Under din utveckling kommer vi matcha din kompetens mot rätt uppdrag i takt med att du avancerar.

title: Kubernetes Tekniker
description:
**Kubernetes Tekniker till team inom dokumenthantering** 




 Är du en tekniker med gedigen erfarenhet av infrastruktur och Kubernetes? Vill du vara med och stötta ett team som just nu befinner sig mitt i en av de mest omfattande förändringarna inom dokumenthantering? Då kan detta vara rollen för dig.
 



  





**Din roll** 




 Vi söker en erfaren Kubernetes Tekniker som vill vara med och förvalta, utveckla och stötta ett dokumenthanteringssystem i stark utveckling. Du kommer främst att avlasta det ordinarie teamet genom att hantera drift, underhåll och användarsupport – samtidigt som du blir en viktig del av en större pågående implementation av ett nytt dokumenthanteringssystem som ska rullas ut i flera verksamheter.
 



  





**Ansvar och arbetsuppgifter** 




 I rollen kommer du bland annat att:
 


* Underhålla och supportera en OpenText-baserad plattform
* Hantera och optimera Kubernetes-infrastruktur i nära samarbete med driftorganisationen
* Samarbeta med andra team för att säkerställa stabilitet och effektivitet i plattformen
* Lösa tekniska problem och utföra felsökning i komplexa miljöer
* Dokumentera och upprätthålla teknisk dokumentation



  





**Din profil** 




 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:
 


* Erfarenhet av Linux
* Erfarenhet av plattformar baserade på Kubernetes
* God problemlösningsförmåga och analytisk förmåga
* Förmåga att kommunicera tydligt och arbeta väl i team
* Serviceinriktat arbetssätt och vana vid agila metoder
* Kunskap om Agila arbetssätt, ITIL och IT Service Management
* God kommunikationsförmåga på både svenska och engelska



  





**Som person är du:** 



* Självständig och prestigelös
* Villig att dela med dig av din kompetens och stötta kollegor



  





**Meriterande** 




 Det är ett plus om du har:
 


* Kompetens inom OpenText, särskilt xECM
* Erfarenhet av andra relevanta teknologier och verktyg inom dokumenthantering eller container‑plattformar



  





**Uppdragsinformation** 



* **Placering:** 
 Företrädesvis
 **Solna** 
 ,
 **Linköping** 
 eller
 **Göteborg** 
 .
* **Arbete på distans:** 
 Möjligt
* **Start:** 
 Omgående
* **Uppdragslängd:** 
 Tillsvidare
* **Omfattning:** 
 100%



  





**Kontakt** 




 För frågor om uppdraget, kontakta ansvarig Business Manager,
 **Joanna Nyström @** 
 joanna.nystrom@akkodisgroup.com
 



  





**Om Akkodis** 




 På Akkodis är du som konsult vår högsta prioritet. Vi stöttar dig i din karriärutveckling och erbjuder uppdrag i olika branscher, system och miljöer. Du omfattas av kollektivavtal, försäkringar, friskvårdsbidrag och rabatter på träningskort. Vi ordnar regelbundet sociala aktiviteter och arbetar tillsammans för att skapa framtidens lösningar inom IT och Engineering.
 



  





 Varm välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Fastighetstekniker
description:
**Fastighetstekniker - Hotel At Six**
**Välkommen till hjärtat av Stockholm.**
 At Six är mer än bara ett hotell – det är en destination där konst, design och internationell puls möts. Här suddar vi ut gränserna mellan vardag och extraordinära upplevelser. Vi söker dig som inte bara vill ha ett jobb, utan som vill vara med och sätta standarden för modern hospitality. Som ett modernt konst- och designhotell rymmer Ar Six 343 rum och sviter, inklusive vår exklusiva Masterpiece Suite och 32 hotellägenheter. Men At Six är mer än bara boende; här hittar du även vår vinbar
 **Blanche & Hierta** 
 , vår pulserande
 **Cocktailbar** 
 och den hyllade restaurangen
 **Dining Room** 
 . Med ett eget gym och 3 000 m² dedikerat till event och möten är vi en av stadens mest dynamiska mötesplatser. At Six drivs av
 **Nordic Hotels & Resorts** 
 och delar kvarteret med våra vänner på
 **Hobo** 
 och
 **TAK** 
 .
   

  

 Who you gonna call? Maintenance!
   

  

 Vårt fastighetsteam består av fyra fastighetstekniker som tar hand om den dagliga driften på hotellet. Vi tar vårt jobb på fullaste allvar och älskar att ge våra gäster det där lilla extra. Vi är en sammansvetsad grupp som alltid hjälper och stöttar varandra. Utöver våra fyra fantastiska tekniker så har vi en Driftchef samt Fastighetschef som du rapporterar till.
   

  

 Vi älskar att jobba hårt och ha kul!
   

  

 Rollen och vår filosofi
   

  

 Som Fastighetstekniker kommer du tillsammans med dina kollegor ansvara för den dagliga driften och skötseln av hotellets alla ytor. Det innebär att ta emot felanmälningar, ansvara för underhåll, tillsyn och skötsel. Du kommer rapportera internt till hotellets avdelningar och ha direkt kundkontakt med våra gäster. Teamet har tillsammans kontroll över alla underhållsuppgifter på hotellet - dagliga och periodiska (månatliga och årliga). Utöver den dagliga driften arbetar du för att utveckla de gemensamma ytorna och faciliteterna tillsammans med närmaste chef. Du har en plan att följa, där du ansvarar för att omsätta plan till verklighet och leverera fantastiska resultat! I din roll som fastighetstekniker förekommer administrativa uppgifter såsom uppföljning i vårt ärendehanteringssystem,
   

  

 Our philosophy is that every detail makes a difference, and the differences make all the details!
   

  

 Så vem är du?
   

  

 Vi letar efter dig med en slutförd gymnasieutbildning och gärna dokumenterad erfarenhet av fastighetsservice. Erfarenhet av hotellbranschen och eftergymnasial utbildning inom fastighet är meriterande. Kunskap inom IT och god systemvetenskap är särskilt meriterande. Du behöver ha goda kunskaper inom svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift. Du är praktiskt lagd och älskar att arbeta hands on!
   

  

 Vi tror att du är en engagerad och handlingskraftig person som uppskattar tydlig och öppen kommunikation. Du förstår vikten av bra service både mot dina kollegor och kunder, har lätt för att samarbeta och sätter alltid gästen i fokus. Du är ansvarstagande, noggrann och lyhörd. Du trivs med att arbeta fysiskt, tunga lyft kan förekomma och då behöver vi alla vara en lagspelare.
   

  

**Krav För Tjänsten**
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska
* Slutförd gymnasieutbildning
* Praktiskt lagd
* Erfarenhet av fastighetsservice
* Kunskap inom IT


 Bli en del av At Six!
   

  

 Så! Med all nödvändig information ur vägen, låt oss prata. Helst ansikte mot ansikte. Ansök nedan och tveka inte att höra av dig till vår Maintenance Manager Sebastian Pereira på Sebastian.Pereira@hotelatsix.com om du har några frågor eller funderingar.
   

  

 Rekrytering sker löpande och tjänsten kan komma att bli tillsatt innan sista ansökningsdagen. Så- vad väntar du på? Skicka din ansökan nu!

title: Configuration Manager
description:
**With a passion for life**
 Join our diverse teams of passionate people and a career that allows you to develop both personally and professionally. At Getinge we exist to make life-saving technology accessible for more people. To make a true difference for our customers – and to save more lives, we need team players, forward thinkers, and game changers.
   

  

 Are you looking for an inspiring career? You just found it.
   

  

**About This Opportunity**
 At Getinge, we develop life-supporting medical technology used every day by healthcare professionals around the world. We are expanding our Development Tools team and are looking for a Configuration Manager to own and improve how we structure, control, and govern configurations in our requirements and test management setup—working hands-on with tools like IBM Jazz and ClearQuest to drive versioning, change control, traceability, and compliance, while making the everyday tool experience efficient and easy to work in.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 In this role, your primary responsibility will be to ensure the integrity, consistency, and controlled evolution of system and software configurations across all environments.
   

  

 Examples of what you will do in your daily work:
   

  

* Serve as the owner of configuration management processes, ensuring systems, applications, and infrastructure remain consistent, secure, and compliant
* Manage and control configuration changes, including review, approval, tracking, and rollback procedures
* Automate configuration management tasks using approved tools and scripts to improve reliability and efficiency
* Collaborate with different stakeholders such as teams within the R&D organization, regulatory department, operations, etc.


 This position is based in Solna, Stockholm and offers a hybrid setup with the possibility to work from home 1-2 days a week. Travelling is not expected in this position.
   

  

**You will bring**
 To be successful in this position, we believe that you have the following qualifications.
   

  

* Bachelor/Master of Science in Engineering or equivalent.
* Several years' experience of configuration management within different tools, such as IBM Jazz, Jira
* Experience in working with, basic Linux, REST API, VB-script, Pearl, Java Script
* Fluency in English (Swedish is a plus)


**Valued Qualifications But Not Required**
* Experience from regulated environments (e.g. medical devices)
* Experience with ClearQuest, ClearCase, Gitlab


 In addition to your technical skills, we highly value your personality. We see that you are humble but willing to voice your opinions, and that you value differences in opinion. You are good at collaborating and communicating, with a social side. We also see that you are driven and can work independently in your work. We think you have an ambition for growth and an eagerness for keeping up to date with the latest in configuration management.
   

  

 At Getinge we see ourselves as proactive and self-driven in learning and contributing to the continued development of our products and our organization's capabilities.
   

  

**Why join Getinge**
 Getinge offers a job in a safe and informal work environment, where we appreciate close team collaboration. We keep an open dialogue between leaders and employees, as well as between teams. We are focused on developing people, and together we will create a plan for learning and competence development when you start your career with us.
   

  

 We offer a competitive compensation and benefits package, including wellness allowances, generous family benefits and joint company activities. Everything to ensure we support your well-being and goals.
   

  

**Application**
 Applications will be reviewed continually, and we therefore recommend sending us your application as soon as possible. We kindly ask you to submit your application in our recruitment system by clicking the “apply now” button. Due to GDPR regulations we do not accept applications via e-mail.
   

  

 If you have any questions regarding the role, please contact Hiring Manager Helen Grindberg at helen.grindberg@getinge.com or Recruiter Sofia Ekstrand at sofia.ekstrand@getinge.com .
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application. We hope you will join us on our journey to become the world’s most desired MedTech company.
   

  

**About Us**
 With a firm belief that every person and community should have access to the best possible care, Getinge provides hospitals and life science institutions with products and solutions aiming to improve clinical results and optimize workflows. The offering includes products and solutions for intensive care, cardiovascular procedures, operating rooms, sterile reprocessing and life science. Getinge employs over 12,000 people worldwide and the products are sold in more than 135 countries.

title: Information Architect
description:
**I** 
**nformationsarkitekter till B3** 
**Visab Consulting**
 Hos B3 Visab Consulting stödjer vi finansindustrins utveckling i den digitala ekonomin. Vi söker nu fler engagerade informationsarkitekter som vill vara med och bidra till en samhällskritisk bransch. Med över 40 års erfarenhet har vi byggt långsiktiga relationer med ledande aktörer inom bank och försäkring, och vår expertis gör oss även till en attraktiv partner för snabbväxande företag.
   

  

**Om rollen** 
 Som informationsarkitekt hos oss får du arbeta i varierande uppdrag där du hjälper kunder att utveckla och implementera robust informationsarkitektur. Du kommer att:
   

  

* Skapa riktlinjer och standarder för informationsarkitekturens struktur.
* Sätta upp processer för att hantera och vidareutveckla informationsflöden.
* Säkerställa att rätt information når rätt personer vid rätt tidpunkt.
* Arbeta med datalagring, tillgänglighet och säkerhet för att förhindra obehörig åtkomst och dataförluster.


 Vi tror att framgång bygger på samarbete och kunskapsdelning och vi ser gärna att du är en lagspelare som uppskattar att arbeta prestigelöst och flexibelt.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som har:**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet som informationsarkitekt eller enterprisearkitekt, med fokus på informationsstruktur.
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet från bank- eller försäkringssektorn.
* Tidigare erfarenhet som konsult.
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.
* Certifieringar inom relevanta områden är meriterande, liksom erfarenhet som verksamhetsarkitekt.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* Attraktiv och flexibel lönemodell.
* Möjlighet att påverka dina arbetstider och arbetsplats.
* Tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar för din professionella utveckling.
* En stark wellness-satsning genom Team B3, som främjar både hälsa och arbetsglädje.


**Varför B3** 
 Visab? Vi är en del av B3 Consulting Group, ett av Sveriges snabbast växande företag inom IT och management. Hos oss får du det bästa av två världar: kraften från ett stort bolag och den personliga samhörigheten från ett mindre. Vi är stolta över att ha blivit erkända som "Årets Karriärföretag" och av "Great Place to Work". Våra medarbetare pratar om friheten att påverka sina uppdrag, arbetsmiljön där olikheter välkomnas, och stoltheten över att bidra till både kunders framgång och samhället i stort. Vi samarbetar med initiativ som Women in Tech, Changers Hub och Pink Programming för att göra skillnad.
   

  

**Kontakt** 
 :
   

  

 Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär? Ansök nu! Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Lidia Hagos (lidia.hagos@b3.se) eller konsultchef Hanna Skoog (+4670-260 12 65).

title: Head of Social Media and Audiovisual Division - based in Luxembourg
description:
**This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence.** 
 The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment. We also offer relocation support. The
 **EIB** 
 , the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for its Secretariat General Directorate, Communication Department, Social Media and Audiovisual Division\* at its headquarters in Luxembourg, a
 ****Head of Social Media and Audiovisual Division\*****
**\*.**
**This is a full-time position at grade 7 for which the EIB offers a permanent contract.**
* new Division following Directorate upcoming reorganisation
* internal benchmark Division Head Corporate Communication


*Applicants will receive an initial feedback in April 2026.*
*Assessment Centres for selected applicants would take place by first half of May 2026.*
*Panel interviews are anticipated for June 2026.*
 Purpose
   

  

 The Social Media and Audiovisual Division is a newly created division within the EIB Group’s Communication Department. As Head of the Social Media and Audiovisual Division, you define and steer the strategic direction, corporate standards and governance of the Group’s social media presence and audiovisual output across all platforms, ensuring alignment with institutional priorities, consistency of voice, quality, coherence and impact. You are responsible for ensuring that social and audiovisual content reflects the institution’s values, priorities, and high standards, and supports the visibility of senior leadership.
   

  

 You oversee the planning, creation, and delivery of compelling, high‑quality social media and audiovisual content ranging from project stories to announcements and event coverage, from short‑form social videos to long‑form video storytelling. You ensure all content is optimised for targeted audience engagement, cross‑channel alignment, and strategic visibility. You identify and test new platforms and features. You plan and deliver paid social campaigns as appropriate. You use AI‑powered tools and data‑driven optimisation techniques to maximise and measure audience reach. You provide direction to a multidisciplinary team of social media and audio-visual experts and strategists..
   

  

 This leadership role requires proven social media management and storytelling expertise, editorial and political sensitivity, and the ability to guide in‑house specialists toward excellence in social media and audiovisual output. It requires in-depth experience in building engagement among specific, clearly defined audience groups. It calls for the ability to innovate across formats ranging from rapid‑turnaround social assets to high‑end audiovisual productions. It also demands a strong appetite for exploring, testing, and adopting new tools and technologies, AI‑driven optimisation, and advanced analytics.
   

  

 Operating Network
   

  

 You will report to the Director of COM and work in close coordination with other divisions and relevant services involved in digital communication, content production and senior leadership visibility.
   

  

 The position involves managing a multidisciplinary team, handling a high volume of time sensitive content and navigating a rapidly evolving digital landscape. It requires balancing immediate social media needs with more complex audiovisual productions, while maintaining editorial and political sensitivity.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Under the guidance of the Director, and in close cooperation with the Heads of Division in the Communication Department, the Head of the Social Media and Audiovisual Division is responsible for:
   

  

* Setting the direction for the EIB Group’s social media and audiovisual presence, defining workflows and standards that ensure high‑quality, high‑impact delivery across all channels.
* Managing the planning, creation, and production of engaging social and audiovisual content, ensuring it reflects institutional and communication priorities and meets the highest professional standards, safeguarding coherence and consistency.
* Prioritising social media and audiovisual activities based on institutional priorities and resource availability, managing demand across the organisation and ensuring focus on high-impact initiatives.
* Overseeing and developing a multi-platform approach to audience engagement through social media and video products, with an excellent understanding of formats and styles, and the needs of each platform.
* Overseeing and coordinating marketing activities including paid, ensuring targeted and cost-effective use of promotion.
* Advising senior leadership on their social media presence.
* Leading and developing a multidisciplinary team of social media and audio-visual experts and strategists, ensuring clarity of roles, strong collaboration, and a culture of continuous improvement.
* Driving data-informed decision-making by establishing KPIs and overseeing performance monitoring, social listening and analytics to assess impact, identify trends, risks and opportunities, and generate insights. Ensuring that these insights are used to refine content planning, audience targeting and platform optimisation, and shared across communication colleagues.
* Ensuring compliance and risk management, including data protection and reputational safeguards in all social and audiovisual outputs.
* Ensuring effective information flow and sharing of practices across the division and with other EIB Group services, fostering coordination and consistency.
* Recruiting, developing and managing staff, ensuring the right skills, clear objectives and strong engagement to deliver results.
* Creating an environment that empowers staff, encourages collaboration, supports accountability and keeps the team focused on the Group’s priorities.


**Qualifications**
* University degree (minimum an equivalent to a Bachelor) preferably in communication, digital media, journalism, marketing, audiovisual production
* At least 10 years of professional experience in social media, digital communication, or audiovisual production in a communication agency or corporate/institutional setting, including managing complex projects with several stakeholders.
* Experience or proven ability in managing and coaching staff, ideally in multicultural environments or international organisations (e.g. contribution to: determining team resources and skills; establishing objectives; assessing performance; delegating and supervising tasks; guiding, motivating, coaching and providing feedback).
* Proven experience in overseeing design and delivery of high quality audiovisual content, including scripting, filming, editing, livestreaming, and overseeing production workflows.
* In‑depth understanding of social media ecosystems, audience behaviour, platform algorithms, and digital content strategies across all major channels.
* Strong command of data‑driven audience targeting, analytics, performance optimisation, and evidence‑based decision‑making.
* Excellent knowledge of social media publishing tools, monitoring and analytics platforms, and familiarity with AI enhanced content creation, optimisation, and workflow automation.
* Solid understanding of digital marketing principles, paid promotion, and amplification strategies.
* Familiarity with the EU institutional landscape and an understanding of the EIB Group’s mission, objectives, and operating environment.
* Fluency in English both written and spoken. Knowledge of other EU languages would be an advantage.


 Competencies
   

  

*Find out more about EIB core behavioural skills and managerial competencies* 
 here
   

  

 To find out more about our eligibility criteria click here
   

  

 We hire and value talent with unique characteristics, creating a work environment where they can be themselves. We believe that Diversity, Equity and Inclusion makes us a performing and innovative organisation. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 If you require reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process due to a disability, neurodivergence, or a chronic health condition, please contact the EIB Recruitment team Jobs@eib.org who will manage your request appropriately.
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorised disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
   

  

 Deadline for applications:
 ****2nd April 2026****

title: Security Intelligence Analyst - based in Luxembourg
description:
**This position is based at our Luxembourg headquarters and requires regular office presence.** 
 The EIB offers you the opportunity to live and work in a truly international and multi-cultural environment. We also offer relocation support.
   

  

 The
 **EIB** 
 , the European Union's bank, is seeking to recruit for its Chief Financial Controller Directorate (CFC), Corporate Real Estate Department (CRE), Corporate Security and Safety Division (CSS), Security & Safety Abroad Unit (ABROAD) at its headquarters in Luxembourg, a
 **Security Intelligence Analyst\*.**
* Internal benchmark Officer Facilities Management


**This is a full-time position at grade 5 for which the EIB offers a permanent contract.**
***Panel interviews are anticipated for May/June.***
 Purpose
   

  

 The purpose of this role is to provide analytical security risk reporting, situational assessments and develop a portfolio of data driven threat and risk assessments to help EIBG manage security risks, protective security, incident management in Luxembourg and abroad. The role will include supervision of a small team of support consultants.
   

  

 Operating Network
   

  

 You will report to the Head Unit, Security and Safety Abroad.
   

  

 The post may require availability beyond the regular office hours at night, on weekends and/or bank holidays even over a longer period, in particular in the event of incidents or crises.
   

  

 It may require carrying out on-call services on a regular basis. There may be a need to conduct some business travel.
   

  

 Accountabilities
   

  

* Supervise a team of embedded security consultants, working on security information and mission security assessments.
* Collect, evaluate and analyse security‑related information from internal and external sources.
* Produce structured threat assessments, situation reports and intelligence products.
* Conduct corporate security risk assessments for projects, offices, missions and travel.
* Support incident response and crisis coordination with intelligence inputs.
* Participate in daily security briefings and support operational security measures.
* Liaise with internal stakeholders and external authorities or institutions.
* Provide security briefings and awareness inputs to staff.
* Build an intelligence network with other EU institutions, IFIs and international organisations.
* Produce incident and travel security advisories.
* Prepare daily, weekly, monthly security working papers, and other reports as required.
* Produce long-term assessments and forecasts of the security situation.
* Conduct risk analyses and threat assessments on security developments for persons and assets.
* Ensure the quick dissemination of security related information.
* Liaise with national law enforcement agencies, International Organisations, NGOs, other EU bodies and diplomatic representatives on security matters.
* Provide timely, precise and accurate reports, analyses.


 General Security Officer duties
   

  

* Conduct general security and safety operational management duties as part of the Security and Safety Abroad Unit, including management of incidents, documentation, liaison with security providers and undertaking security tasks.
* Develop, plan, and support corporate security services for the EIB Group focussing on the security of people, premises and assets.
* Plan, implement and monitor service contracts and related budget in own domain, including developing Terms of Reference for the procurement of services.
* Procure services and/or goods as required by the unit.
* Monitor, control and check costs against offers, invoices and available budget.
* Assist in security and safety management needs.


 You may take up other duties as requested in the interest of the service. Duties may evolve according to development of the EIB's structure and activities, and the decisions of EIB management.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* University degree (minimum an equivalent to a Bachelor) preferably in a field related to security risk management, political science, international relations or equivalent.
* Certifications in risk analysis, physical security would be considered as an advantage.
* Minimum 5 years relevant experience in threat/risk analysis, intelligence, national security, law enforcement, military or corporate security.
* High level of stress tolerance in challenging situations.
* Excellent knowledge of English and/or French (\*\*\*) with a good command of the other. Knowledge of other EU languages would be an advantage.


 Competencies
   

  

**Find Out More About EIB Core Behavioural Skills Here**
 To find out more about our eligibility criteria click here
   

  

*(\*\*\*) Unless stated explicitly as a required qualification, a good command of French is not a pre-requisite for hire. As both English and French are however official working languages of the EIB, proficiency in both languages is a pre-requisite for your future career development. Any language clause in your contract must be fulfilled in order for you to be eligible for a promotion (either via the annual appraisal cycle or via an internal selection process). Proficiency is understood to mean the attainment of* 
*level 5 of the Inter Institutional language courses, corresponding to B1.2 of the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFRL). The Bank offers appropriate training support.*
 We hire and value talent with unique characteristics, creating a work environment where they can be themselves. We believe that Diversity, Equity and Inclusion makes us a performing and innovative organisation. We encourage all suitably qualified and eligible candidates to apply regardless of their gender identity/expression, age, racial, ethnic and cultural background, religion and beliefs, sexual orientation, disability or neurodiversity.
   

  

 If you require reasonable accommodation during the recruitment process due to a disability, neurodivergence, or a chronic health condition, please contact the EIB Recruitment team Jobs@eib.org who will manage your request appropriately.
   

  

 By applying for this position, you acknowledge the importance of maintaining the security and integrity of the Information of the EIB Group. In case of selection for the position you agree to comply with all measures (policies, controls, document classification and management) implemented by the EIB Group to prevent unauthorised disclosure of any information or any damage to the EIB Group reputation.
