title: FPGA Engineer
description:
ESSIQ är arbetsgivaren som anstränger sig lite extra för att du ska må bra. Vad är medarbetarfokus för dig? På ESSIQ handlar det om att sätta medarbetaren i centrum. Genom ett lyhört ledarskap och en öppen företagskultur vill vi ge varje medarbetare möjligheten att forma sin karriär och sin vardag.
   

  

 Till den här rollen söker vi dig som har erfarenhet av relevanta uppgifter och som är redo för nya utmaningar. Ser du fördelarna med att få variation och erfarenhet från olika kunder och branscher men att utvecklas med en och samma arbetsgivare? Som medarbetare på ESSIQ får du det bästa av två världar.
   

  

**ROLLBESKRIVNING**
 Som Electronic Designer inom FPGA blir du en del av utvecklingsprojekt för säkerhetskritiska system, där du arbetar i ett högkompetent team med starkt fokus på kvalitet, spårbarhet och verifiering.
   

  

 Rollen omfattar hela utvecklingskedjan från design och implementation till verifiering och dokumentation och du arbetar enligt etablerade processer för säkerhetskritisk utveckling. Du verkar i en miljö med höga krav på struktur och noggrannhet, där nära samarbete med systemingenjörer, mjukvaruutvecklare och testingenjörer är en naturlig del av arbetet.
   

  

 I ditt dagliga arbete utvecklar och implementerar du FPGA lösningar. Du ansvarar för att säkerställa spårbarhet genom hela utvecklingsprocessen, bidrar aktivt i verifiering och validering av design samt tar fram och underhåller teknisk dokumentation. Genom samarbete i tvärfunktionella team säkerställer du en hög och jämn leveranskvalitet genom hela projektet.
   

  

**KVALIFIKATIONER**
 Vi letar inte efter anställda, vi letar efter medarbetare – efter ESSIQ:are! Nedanstående är de grundläggande kvalifikationerna för tjänsten, men vi kommer även lägga stor vikt vid din personlighet.
   

  

**Grundläggande kvalifikationer**
* Ingenjörsutbildning inom elektronik, data, eller motsvarande.
* Erfarenhet av FPGA-utveckling.
* Erfarenhet av arbete enligt RTCA DO-254.
* Erfarenhet av projekt med höga krav på spårbarhet, verifiering och dokumentation.
* God förmåga att arbeta i team och kommunicera tekniska lösningar.
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.


**Personlighet och engagemang**
* Du är ansvarstagande – kommer i mål, i medvind likväl som i motvind.
* Du är social och kommunikativ – öppen och tydlig gentemot dina kollegor, och är en produktiv problemlösare. Du är bra på att föra samtal om dig, arbetsteamet och leveransen inför en eller flera åhörare.
* Du är lyhörd och hjälpsam – tar in kunskap från omvärld och kollegor, och delar gärna med dig av din egen. Du är generös med tips, hjälp och stöd.


**OM TJÄNSTEN**
* Anställningsform: tillsvidareanställning på heltid. 6 månaders provanställning tillämpas.
* Tillträde: så snart som möjligt
* Lön och förmåner: Konkurrenskraftig fast eller rörlig lön. Goda utvecklingsmöjligheter och generösa förmåner. Tjänstepension, omfattande försäkringar.
* Placering: ESSIQ Stockholm.


**OM ESSIQ**
 ESSIQ är teknikkonsultföretaget där allt börjar med dig. Med fokus på individen, flexibla lösningar och en modern lönepolicy attraherar vi de skarpaste, mest professionella och engagerade personerna i branschen. Med denna vision grundades ESSIQ år 2005, sedan dess har vi utvecklats till ett framgångsrikt företag med kontor i Stockholm, Göteborg och Malmö. Vi består idag av över 250 medarbetare med olika bakgrund, personlighet och nationalitet, med en god fördelning av kvinnor och män.
   

  

 Vi har över 80 aktiva kunder i spännande branscher – allt från de stora aktörerna till de små innovationsföretagen. ESSIQ:s medarbetare arbetar med användarcentrerad tjänste- och produktutveckling inom följande tjänsteområden: UX & Service Design, Connected & Embedded Systems, IT & Cloud Services, Green Technology & Electromobility, Test & Quality Engineering, Agile Management, Mechanical Engineering samt Simulation & Visualization. Kompetensen levererar vi på plats hos uppdragsgivaren, inhouse och i satellit. Våra medarbetares intressen och ambitioner leder vägen – vårt mål är att göra den perfekta matchningen av individ och uppdrag.
   

  

 ESSIQ är ett familjärt och socialt företag med visionen att vara Sveriges bästa arbetsgivare för alla medarbetare, oavsett roll i organisationen. Vi lägger stor vikt vid gemenskap och har ett uppskattat utbud av professionella och sociala aktiviteter. Vår kommunikationsplattform genomsyras av öppenhet, och främjar nätverkande och kompetensutbyte såväl som fritidsaktiviteter och relationsbyggande.
   

  

**ANSÖKAN**
 Vi använder oss av rekryteringsverktyget Teamtailor. Urval sker löpande.
   

  

**KONTAKT**
 Frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta: Malin Meyer, malin.meyer@essiq.se
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om ESSIQ?
   

  

 Besök http://essiq.se och följ oss på våra sociala medier!

title: Back End Developer
description:
Marshall Group is the audio, tech, and design powerhouse uniting musicians and music lovers through genre-breaking innovation. Our flagship brand, Marshall, is uniquely positioned with over 60 years of rock 'n' roll attitude on stage, at home, and on the go. Our iconic products are brought to life by a dedicated team of 800 passionate employees and sold in over 90 markets worldwide.
 



  





 Right now, we need to strengthen our software team in Stockholm with a Backend Engineer who will take ownership of the backend foundation behind our connected products. We have been using external partners to handle our backend, and you will be the first person we bring in-house to do it. You will play a central role in building the infrastructure that enables our long-term ambitions around user accounts, device ecosystems, and seamless product experiences. This is the right role if you value autonomy and thrive where impact is real.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




 You will design, build, and run the backend services that power our mobile apps and connected devices, moving us from external providers into full internal ownership. Your work will span core APIs, authentication, device-related flows, and the cloud infrastructure that supports them. You will collaborate with mobile developers, firmware engineers, and product teams, delivering new features iteratively. As you build our backend capability, you will also modernize infrastructure, streamline deployments, and improve how we test and release software.
 



  





**Role & responsibilities** 




 • Build backend services that support mobile applications, connected devices, user accounts, and OTA updates
 



 • Design scalable cloud infrastructure with a strong focus on reliability, security, and maintainability
 



 • Lead the shift from manual configurations to infrastructure as code
 



 • Collaborate closely with mobile, firmware, and product teams to align backend capabilities with product needs
 



 • Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and drive continuous improvement
 



 • Plan and execute the transition away from external backend provider
 



  





**Who we're looking for** 




 You are an independent backend engineer who enjoys tackling complex problems and building systems with a high degree of ownership. You are comfortable being the first backend engineer in the team while still collaborating closely with colleagues across mobile, firmware, and product. You communicate clearly, bring structure to ambiguity, and thrive in an environment where you both build and shape the technical foundation. You will be part of the software team, sitting within our R&D organisation (which we call Product).
 



  





**You probably have the following experiences and skills** 




 • Experience building backend services that support mobile apps, including APIs and authentication
 



 • Practical experience with cloud infrastructure such as AWS, GCP, or Azure
 



 • Confidence working with at least one modern backend language such as Python, Kotlin, JavaScript or TypeScript
 



 • Understanding of CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and automated deployments
 



 • Experience with test automation in backend environments is a strong advantage
 



  





 We strive to foster an inclusive workplace and we do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, disability, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age or marital status. We firmly believe that Marshall thrives when our employees do, leading to better experiences for our consumers.

title: Ungdomskonsulent till Framtidens Hus
description:
Välkommen till oss
   

  

 Enheten för Framtidens hus ingår i avdelningen för främjande och förebyggande sociala insatser i Järva stadsdelsförvaltningen. Enheten består av Framtidens Hus i Husby, Framtidens hus Rinkeby och snart öppnar en Framtidens hus i Tensta. Framtidens hus arbetar utifrån visionen ”Alla ungdomars arena för att förverkliga sina drömmar och bygga framtidstro”.
   

  

 Verksamheten ska attrahera ungdomar i åldrarna 16-19 år och har en inriktning mot studier, arbete, musik, idrott, IT/tech samt kultur och drama. Verksamheten förekommer under kvällar och helger och det är därför viktigt att du trivs med ett varierat schema.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder
   

  

 Som medarbetare hos oss erbjuds du bland annat friskvårdsbidrag, rabatterat kort till stadens sim- och gym-anläggningar, kompetensutveckling samt tillgång till en lärportal med kurser och föreläsningar. Du omfattas även av tjänstepension enligt kollektivavtal och förmånliga försäkringar. Läs gärna mer om Stockholms stads förmåner här,
   

  

 Din roll
   

  

 Som ungdomskonsulent med inriktning kultur, tech och delaktighet arbetar du med att utveckla och genomföra verksamhet som stärker ungas möjligheter att uttrycka sig genom kultur, kreativitet och teknik. I uppdraget ingår att:
   

  

* Planera, samordna och genomföra kultur- och tech‑aktiviteter, projekt och arrangemang tillsammans med unga.
* Delta i plugghjälp, studiestöd och uppsökande verksamhet, och inspirera ungdomar att följa sina drömmar och utforska kreativa yrkesvägar, inklusive digitala medier och AI.
* Stötta unga i att utveckla egna kulturprojekt, arrangemang och idéer inom scenkonst, musik, konst, media, digitala uttryck och AI‑drivna projekt.
* Planera och leda workshops, kulturprogram och evenemang som främjar kreativitet, lärande, teknikintresse och deltagande.
* Samverka med interna och externa aktörer, såsom föreningar, kulturaktörer och utbildningsaktörer, för fler möjligheter till kultur, digitala projekt och lärande.
* Bidra till verksamhetens utveckling genom uppföljning, dokumentation, analys och metodutveckling.
* Arbetet innefattar kvälls- och helgarbete.


 Din kompetens och erfarenhet
   

  

* Har relevant högskoleutbildning inom exempelvis kultur, tech, eller annan utbildning som arbetsgivaren bedömer som likvärdig.
* Har erfarenhet av plugghjälp eller studiehandledning och har minst Matematik 2 som krav (gymnasiematematik).
* Har erfarenhet av att arbeta med unga inom kultur, teknik, IT-aktiviteter eller projektverksamhet
* Har god förmåga att uttrycka dig på svenska i tal och skrift.


 Det är meriterande om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av kultur eller IT-projekt, kreativa processer eller arrangörskap tillsammans med unga.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med metoder som stärker ungas delaktighet och entreprenörskap.
* Erfarenhet av samverkan med föreningsliv, kulturaktörer eller utbildningsaktörer.


 Du är relationsskapande, lyhörd och har lätt för att samarbeta med unga, kollegor och externa aktörer. Med ett strukturerat och lösningsfokuserat arbetssätt skapar du engagemang, delaktighet och resultat.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet, motivation och engagemang, samt intresse för kultur, IT, entreprenörskap och ungas möjligheter till studier och arbete.

title: Director AI Acceleration & Enablement, ACT
description:
**With a passion for life**
 Join our diverse teams of passionate people and a career that allows you to develop both personally and professionally. At Getinge we exist to make life-saving technology accessible for more people. To make a true difference for our customers – and to save more lives, we need team players, forward thinkers, and game changers.
   

  

 Are you looking for an inspiring career? You just found it.
   

  

 This role is open to applicants within the following areas:
   

  

**Sweden, Germany, and US-commutable to Wayne, New Jersey**
**Salaries will be based on location**
**Role Summary**
 The AI Acceleration & Enablement, Acute Care Therapies (ACT), is responsible for driving a focused and prioritized AI agenda across Acute Care Therapies. The role works closely with Product Areas and functions to identify high-impact AI use cases, prioritize initiatives based on business value, lead pilot implementation, measure outcomes, and scale successful solutions. In addition, the role builds AI capability across ACT through education, practical frameworks, and hands-on support. The objective is to accelerate execution, improve productivity, and strengthen innovation through disciplined and business-driven use of AI.
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 The purpose of this role is to support our PAs and functions in:
   

  

* Identifying, prioritizing and executing on the few AI initiatives that truly move the needle
* Driving pilots and implementation together with the PAs
* Measuring impact and scaling what works
* Raising AI competence across ACT through structured education and practical enablement


**Executional Leadership**
**Key duties and responsibilities**
* Drive and accelerate the AI transformation for the organization; Rapidly execute on a prioritized and focused AI agenda aligned with the ACT business strategy and the corporate IT guidelines.
* Guide PAs through the technical and psychological aspects of AI adoption
* Stay current with the latest AI research and technologies, applying them to focused high impact use cases and practical applications
* Develop plans to run rapid pilots and assess against established metrics to show desired impact of solution; Cancel projects quickly that don’t show desired outcome and roll-out successful pilots to rest of the ACT organization as appropriate.
* Evaluate partnerships and investment opportunities relevant to ACT’s strategy.
* Ensure use cases are considering all functional areas within ACT, including but not limited to topics such as speed of product development, regulatory effectiveness, driving newly established sourcing excellence KPIs, and innovation throughput. The important guidance is that we identify and prioritize a few right AI initiatives that truly move the needle.


**Cross-Functional Collaboration**
* Identify high-impact AI use cases across functions within ACT, including Product Management, R&D, Sourcing, Production, Finance, etc.; Develop and rapidly pilot AI solutions tailored to PA-specific business needs.
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams within ACT and the IT function to ensure alignment and prioritization of AI initiatives
* Develop training programs to enhance AI literacy among ACT professionals
* Evaluate and recommend AI tools and platforms for use in collaboration with the IT Function


**Qualifications**
* Master in a relevant field (e.g., Computer Science, AI, or interdisciplinary


 studies combining technical, business, and psychological aspects)
   

  

* Extensive knowledge of computer science, AI, machine learning, and psychology
* Proven research and industrial experience implementing IT solutions
* Demonstrated experience in applying AI solutions in corporate settings
* Strong technical skills with the ability to understand and apply the latest AI research
* Excellent people and communication skills
* Proficiency in machine learning, statistics, and familiarity with open-source and commercial LLMs


**Technical Skills**
* Proficiency in machine learning frameworks and tools
* Strong understanding of statistical analysis
* Experience with open-source and commercial LLMs


**Language Requirements**
 Excellent English skills, both written and verbal
   

  

 US NJ Only $206-250K + STIP
   

  

**About Us**
 With a firm belief that every person and community should have access to the best possible care, Getinge provides hospitals and life science institutions with products and solutions aiming to improve clinical results and optimize workflows. The offering includes products and solutions for intensive care, cardiovascular procedures, operating rooms, sterile reprocessing and life science. Getinge employs over 12,000 people worldwide and the products are sold in more than 135 countries.
   

  

 Reasonable accommodations are available upon request for candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection process.

title: International Graduate Programme
description:
Step into the world of commercial real estate with Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield’s
 **International Graduate Programme (IGP),** 
 an 18-month journey designed for ambitious graduates eager to make an impact on a global scale.
 



  





**1 year. 3 countries. 4 assignments. Infinite opportunities.** 




  





 🌍
 **What to Expect** 




 You’ll take on
 **four assignments** 
 , each lasting four months or longer, across a variety of departments such as Controlling, Development, Operating Management, Leasing, Marketing, or Shopping Centre Management. This immersive rotation gives you hands-on experience and a 360° view of our business.
 



  





 ✈️
 **Experience international rotations** 




 At least one of your assignments will take place abroad in one of our European offices, think London, Paris, Amsterdam, or Hamburg. You'll gain cross-cultural exposure, expand your network, and grow both professionally and personally.
 



  





 This isn’t just a graduate programme- it’s a gateway for future leaders in commercial real estate.
 



  





**Who we are looking for:** 



* You hold an undergraduate degree, and ideally a master’s, in Real Estate, Business Management, Asset Management, or a related field
* You are fluent in business-level English and at least one of the Group’s languages (French, Spanish, Dutch, German, Swedish, Czech, Polish)
* You have excellent analytical/financial capabilities and communication skills
* You have a strong entrepreneurial personality, a curious nature and are keen to bring in your ideas
* You would embrace the potential of an International Career and opportunities to gain exposure across Europe



  





**Who are we?** 




 At Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield (URW), we develop and operate a portfolio of sustainable, premium, mixed-use real estate assets across Europe and the United States. Driven by our purpose to Reinvent Being Together, we are committed to accelerating urban regeneration and rethinking how we live together in cities. Today, 2,000 dedicated individuals are working together to reshape the future of real estate and shopping centers by creating innovative, engaging spaces that truly redefine community connections.
 



  





 Our flagship destinations are more than just places; they're the heartbeat of the community. We empower our employees to make a real impact through volunteering, DE&I programs, and leading ESG efforts. URW is at the forefront of experiential entertainment, constantly pushing boundaries to craft unforgettable in-person and digital experiences. By surprising and delighting our customers, we create magical moments and reinvent togetherness in every interaction.
 



  





 Within our Northern Europe Region - spanning the Netherlands, Denmark, Sweden, and the UK - we own and manage eight exceptional assets. These include Westfield London, Westfield Stratford City, Westfield Mall of the Netherlands and Stadshart Amstelveen.
 



  





**Why work for us:** 




 We put people development and learning at the heart of what we do. We'll help you master your role, build your technical skills, and take advantage of top-notch management and leadership programs. From face-to-face workshops to our global online learning resources, we encourage you to make learning a part of your daily routine.
 



  





 We offer a fantastic pension plan, bonus scheme, and plenty of other incentives. We also prioritise your health and wellbeing. You can sign up for medical and dental insurance, gym discounts, and more.
 



  





 Want to know more about what it's like working at URW? Visit our site:
 
 https://www.urw.com/join-us/life-at-urw.
 




  





**What Matters to Us:** 




 At URW, our purpose is to
 **Reinvent Being Together** 
 , reimagining how people and communities connect, socialise, and experience dynamic moments in unique and meaningful ways.
 



  





 We are proud to promote equal opportunities and embrace diversity in profiles, experiences, and skills. At URW, we believe that diversity is the cornerstone of our success, and we are dedicated to fostering an environment that respects, values, celebrates, and leverages individual differences to their fullest potential.
 



  





 We evaluate each application with fairness and without discrimination based on disability, age, gender, origin, religion, sexual orientation, or any other legally protected characteristics. Our commitment is to provide equal access to our services for everyone. If you require any adjustments for your interview, please let us know in advance, so we can support you accordingly.
 



  





**Join us and be part of a team that's making a real difference in your local communities!**

title: Customer Service Agent
description:
At Mercell, we’re on a mission to revolutionize public procurement by making it accessible and effortless for everyone involved. Imagine a world where public buyers and visionary suppliers come together seamlessly to make great deals easier and shape the future. That's what we’re all about. With a dynamic culture built on continuous growth, trust, and collaboration, Mercell offers an environment where your talents can thrive. You will be part of an international team with ambitious and dedicated colleagues who are passionate about what they do and supported to be themselves.
 
 Together, let's shape the future and create real value for society, one innovative solution at a time.
 



  





**Join Us** 




 We are growing our Customer Service & Support teams and looking for dedicated Customer Service Agents to join us across several markets. This is not a single open role but an ongoing hiring pipeline, and we will continuously match strong profiles with upcoming opportunities across our support teams.
 



  





**Your Mission** 




 Our Customer Service & Support, is a team of over 60 professionals responsible for ensuring a smooth experience for our public tendering customers across Europe. Our area of expertise extends from supporting the software platforms, to understanding the public procurement process, all the way to anticipating customers' needs and using modern technology to answer them.
 



 As a Customer Service Agent at Mercell, you will play a key role in ensuring a smooth and reliable experience for our customers across Europe, including public buyers and suppliers navigating complex public procurement processes. You will act as a trusted first point of contact for customers using our platform. Your mission is to provide timely, accurate, and solution-oriented support, helping customers resolve issues, understand functionality needs, and successfully complete their procurement activities.
 



 This role reflects Mercell’s commitment to operational excellence and customer focus combining responsiveness, product knowledge, and empathy to deliver high-quality service at scale.
 



 This is an ongoing opportunity we will review applications continuously and match strong candidates with current and upcoming openings.
 



  





**Core Responsibilities** 



* Provide first-line support via phone, email, and digital channels to customers across different markets.
* Investigate platform-related issues and guide customers through solutions clearly and efficiently.
* Ensure accurate case documentation and follow-up in CRM/support systems.
* Escalate complex issues appropriately while maintaining ownership of customer communication.
* Contribute to maintaining high customer satisfaction and service level targets (SLAs).
* Identify recurring issues and proactively share feedback internally to improve product and processes.
* Support onboarding and basic product guidance for new customers where relevant.



  





  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Proven experience (ideally 2+ years) in customer service, support, helpdesk, or a similar client-facing role.
* Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical topics clearly and simply.
* Structured and organized approach to successfully navigate multiple priorities simultaneously.
* Problem-solving mindset and ability to stay calm under pressure.
* Comfortable working with support systems, CRM tools, and digital platforms.
* Fluency in English and at least one of the following languages: Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Dutch, German, Finnish (depending on market)



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Fluency in a third language (of the following): Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Dutch, German, Finnish (depending on market), is a plus
* Experience supporting SaaS platforms or digital products.
* Familiarity with public sector environments or procurement processes.
* Experience working in a fast-paced, international environment.
* Interest in process improvement and service optimization.

title: Software Engineer - Backend
description:
SAVR is a fast-growing Swedish fintech company on a mission to reinvent investing. We empower investors with a platform that offers
 **lower fees** 
 ,
 **greater transparency** 
 , and a
 **radically improved experience** 
 .
 



  





 We’re not just building another investment service — we’re reimagining how financial products should work for people, not just institutions. As part of our ambitious, innovative and curious team, you’ll help shape the future of investing in Sweden and beyond.
 



  





**The Role** 




 As a Software Engineer in our Backend team, you are part of our tech team based in Stockholm or Halmstad. You will be a part of building and developing the next generation investment platform. Your role involves close collaboration with fellow Software Engineers, as well as with Data Scientists, Product Designers and Product Managers.
 



  





 Our tech stack consists of Terraform, PHP (Laravel), Python, Snowflake, DBT, Kotlin , SQL, and is hosted on AWS.
 



  





**Your Mission** 



* Build Software Features in a fast paced environment
* Drive ideas and develop concepts from a tech perspective
* Contribute towards improving our tech stack, architecture, and operational methods
* Collaborate and build high-quality products by following good engineering practices
* Develop integrations to third-party API's
* Embrace our learning culture by both receiving and providing feedback, and be open to getting constructive feedback on your code



  





**You’ll Thrive in This Role If You...** 



* Are a motivated engineer with a passion for software development and Infrastructure
* Recognize the importance of collaboration in order to build a great product, and enjoys engaging with colleagues to exchange ideas and concepts
* Have 4+ years professional team-based software development experience
* Are a team player who is open to everyone’s opinions
* Are fluent in English
* Have experience from working in a scalable, product-based environment
* Are either a Swedish citizen or holds a valid EU work permit. Unfortunately, we cannot offer visa sponsorship for this role



  





 If you possess a different profile but believe you have relevant skills and can excel in this role, we encourage you to apply and share your motivation with us.
 



  





**Our Cultural DNA** 




 At SAVR, we’re:
 



 🧠
 **Open-minded** 
 – we embrace new ideas, diverse perspectives, and continuous learning
 



 🚀
 **Bold** 
 – we take smart risks, move fast, and aren’t afraid to fail forward
 



 🤝
 **Honest** 
 – we value transparency, feedback, and doing the right thing
 



  





 We’re a startup, so things can be a little messy — and that’s part of the thrill. If you thrive in building as a team and handling uncertainty, you will fit right in.
 



  





**What’s In It for You** 




 You’ll join a product- and design-driven company where your work has real impact. We keep things lean, move fast, and genuinely care about the experience we deliver — for customers and for each other.
 



  





 Here’s what we offer:
 



 💻 Top-tier work gear
 



 💰 Competitive salary
 



 🏃 ♀️ Generous wellness allowance
 



 🤒 Insurance package
 



 🌱 Occupational pension and long-term savings support
 



 🏢
 *Office-first approach* 
 to foster collaboration and quick decision-making — with flexibility when you need it (4+1)
 



 🥗
 *Stocked pantry* 
 , plus regular social gatherings and wellness activities to keep energy and culture high
 



  





**Our Commitment to Diversity** 




 SAVR is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome people from all backgrounds, identities, and experiences. We believe diverse teams build better products and are committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive.
 



  





**Ready to Join Us?** 




 We’d love to hear from you. Apply now or reach out with any questions — and let’s build something meaningful together.

title: AI Automation Lead
description:
We’re hiring an AI Automation Lead to help EQT replace manual work with intelligent automation. Starting in the procurement and vendor domain, you’ll identify high-impact opportunities across the digital workplace and lead the design and deployment of AI agents and automation to transform how we work.
   

  

**About The Digital Employee Experience Team**
 The Digital Experience (DEX) team sits within EQT’s Technology department and focuses on enabling smarter, more connected ways of working. We combine design thinking, platform strategy, and intelligent automation to improve collaboration, reduce complexity, and elevate the work experience for EQT teams globally.
   

  

**About The Role**
 This role exists to accelerate EQT’s use of automation and agentic AI — to reduce manual work, improve transparency, and drive digital scale. You’ll start by focusing on the procurement and vendor management domain, building AI-enabled workflows that streamline assurance, evidence collection, and vendor lifecycle operations. From there, you’ll expand to other high-friction areas across the DEX landscape.
   

  

 You will be hands-on with strategy and execution. You’ll work closely with key stakeholders and partners to turn complex processes into scalable, auditable automations. Your success depends on execution, clarity of ownership, and your ability to transform work through smart technology.
   

  

**Key responsibilities:**
* Identify and prioritize manual workflows in the DEX space that are ready for automation or AI enablement.
* Design and deploy intelligent agents to handle process orchestration, control testing, evidence collection, and other repeatable tasks.
* Deliver high-impact automation projects, starting in procurement and vendor operations.
* Ensure all automated workflows meet EQT standards for auditability, traceability, and risk control.
* Partner with system owners, Legal, Compliance, Finance, and Security to align automation with policies and expectations.
* Collaborate with external partners and gradually internalize automation capability within EQT.
* Communicate clearly about scope, risks, and impact to enable trust and adoption.


**What success looks like in the first 12–24 months**
* Automated vendor assurance and monitoring reduce manual effort by 60% or more.
* Core procurement workflows are simplified and AI-enabled, with fewer handoffs and clearer ownership.
* EQT’s automation platform expands from rule-based tasks to intelligent, agent-driven flows.
* Internal capability begins to own and maintain AI agents without external consultants.
* Automation use cases expand beyond procurement into workplace collaboration and document processes.


**Scope and interfaces**
* In scope: Automation of processes in DEX, starting with procurement and vendor workflows.
* Out of scope: Direct vendor management or ownership of procurement budgets.
* Key interfaces: Digital Workplace, Procurement, Legal, Finance, Compliance, Security.


**About You**
 You are thoughtful, curious, and delivery-focused. You’re excited about applying automation and AI in ways that make people’s work lives simpler and more scalable. You’re comfortable starting small, building trust, and showing results quickly — while always keeping risk and governance in mind.
   

  

**Essential skills and experience:**
* Proven experience in automation platforms (e.g., Workato, UiPath, or similar), workflow design, or process transformation.
* Experience deploying intelligent agents or AI-powered automations in real-world settings.
* Strong understanding of auditability, explainability, and compliance in automation.
* Ability to work cross-functionally and influence without direct authority.
* Clear communicator with a structured, outcome-oriented mindset.


**You’ll do well here if you:**
* Are energized by messy processes and love making them better.
* Can say no with data and yes with care.
* Have a low-ego, high-ownership mindset.
* Are comfortable with ambiguity and change.
* Believe automation should be explainable, measurable, and human-in-the-loop where needed.


**What We Offer**
* A visible, hands-on role with the opportunity to shape EQT’s automation journey.
* A collaborative culture that values curiosity, integrity, and continuous improvement.
* A chance to work with cutting-edge tools and bring AI to life in meaningful, operational ways.
* Support to grow your capabilities while building scalable solutions across the firm.


**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
**About EQT**
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) French speaking
description:
**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

 Full-time position, hybrid.
   

  

**About Betao**
 Betao is a Swedish-French tech company that has spent over a decade building the tools French self-employed entrepreneurs actually need. Since 2013, we've been simplifying the administrative side of running a business — so solopreneurs can spend less time on compliance and more time on the work that matters.
   

  

 Through Solo.fr and Portail Auto-Entrepreneur, we operate one of the largest platforms and communities for independent workers in France, supporting thousands of businesses with invoicing, payments, tax declarations, and more. Our SaaS platform is lean by design: we build exactly what our users need and nothing they don't.
   

  

 We're entering an important growth phase. A mandatory e-invoicing reform in France creates a significant market opportunity, and we have the distribution, the capital, and the product to move decisively. We're looking for the CMO who will lead that charge.
   

  

**The Role**
 This is a builder's role. Not a stewardship role.
   

  

 We're not looking for someone to run existing playbooks. We're looking for a marketing leader who will look at a 2.3 million-strong underserved market, a dominant distribution asset no competitor can replicate, and a once-in-a-decade regulatory catalyst, and build the strategy to own it.
   

  

 You'll work directly with the CEO and leadership team to define how we position our products, acquire customers at scale, and build a brand that French solopreneurs trust by default. You'll also build the marketing organization itself: the team, the infrastructure, the culture.
   

  

 The person who thrives here combines sharp strategic instincts with genuine hands-on capability. They know how to craft a brand narrative
 *and* 
 how to pressure-test a CAC assumption. They understand that SEO is a compounding asset and paid search is a precision instrument, and they know how to use both. They're comfortable in ambiguity and impatient with unnecessary complexity.
   

  

**What You'll Own**
**Strategy and positioning.**
 Define how Solo.fr and Portail-Autoentrepreneur.fr show up in the French market, from high-level brand positioning to segment-specific messaging. Navigate the tension between emotionally-led brand building and performance-driven acquisition, and make a clear case for how to sequence both.
   

  

**Growth and acquisition.**
 Design and execute the go-to-market for our next growth phase, including the e-invoicing land grab opportunity. Own the full funnel, paid, owned, earned, partnerships and the metrics that tell us when to scale and when to course-correct. This includes taking direct accountability for our SEO strategy and paid search performance, two channels where we have significant existing assets and room to compound further.
   

  

**Performance marketing.**
 Set the standard for how we acquire customers efficiently at scale. You understand the mechanics of SEO deeply enough to direct editorial and technical priorities, and you're fluent in SEA, campaign structure, bidding strategy, quality score, conversion rate optimization. You don't need to run the campaigns yourself, but you need to know when the work is good and when it isn't.
   

  

**Brand.**
 Build brands that create genuine preference among French solopreneurs, in a category where every competitor leads with compliance language and feature lists. There is an emotional space available here that no one is occupying yet.
   

  

**Team building.**
 Hire, develop, and lead a high-performing marketing team. Set a standard for ownership and craft. Create the environment where strong people do their best work, including strong SEO and performance specialists.
   

  

**Cross-functional leadership.**
 Work closely with Product and Tech to ensure marketing and product strategy are tightly aligned. Challenge assumptions, bring market signal into product decisions, and represent the customer's voice at the leadership table.
   

  

**What We're Looking For**
 There's no perfect profile, but the strongest candidates will have most of the following:
   

  

* Significant experience in a senior marketing leadership role, ideally in B2C SaaS, consumer tech, or a high-growth digital product environment
* A track record of building and executing go-to-market strategies that drove meaningful, measurable growth, not just brand awareness
* Solid hands-on grounding in performance marketing: SEO (technical, editorial, and structural), SEA (Google Ads, campaign architecture, bidding strategy), and conversion rate optimization. You don't need to be an individual contributor today, but you've been one, and it shows in how you lead
* Experience owning or working closely with content and SEO as a long-term organic acquisition channel, ideally on a high-traffic site with real search visibility at stake
* Experience building and leading marketing teams, with a clear philosophy on how to develop strong talent
* Comfort operating across the full strategic-to-executional range, you can set the vision and you can review a media plan or an SEO audit
* Strong intuition for brand and storytelling, backed by rigorous thinking about acquisition economics
* Fluency in both French and English, this is non-negotiable given our market and team


 Experience in the French market is a significant advantage. Familiarity with the solopreneur or SME segment, or with fintech or legaltech, is a plus but not a prerequisite.
   

  

**Our Culture**
 Betao runs on trust, transparency, empowerment, and compassion. In practice, that means:
   

  

**We Trust Each Other To Ship.**
 There is no micromanagement here. You own your area and you're accountable for outcomes.
   

  

**We move fast and course-correct openly.**
 We communicate what we're doing so that mistakes get caught early and learning happens collectively. Being wrong is fine. Being slow to surface it isn't.
   

  

**We challenge ideas, not people.**
 Strong opinions are welcome. So is changing your mind when the evidence shifts.
   

  

**We create safety by being honest.**
 Compassion isn't softness, it's the thing that makes it safe to take risks, admit mistakes, and grow.
   

  

 This culture produces high velocity and high impact. It also requires something from everyone: genuine ownership, intellectual honesty, and the willingness to hold yourself to a high standard without someone else holding you to it.
   

  

 If that sounds like the environment where you do your best work, we'd like to talk.
   

  

**What We Offer**
* A seat at the leadership table with direct access to the CEO and real influence on company direction
* The scope to build a marketing organization from the ground up during a defining growth phase
* A long-term product with a stable company behind it and an ambitious roadmap ahead
* International culture, Swedish and French, with the best of both
* Flexible hybrid working with a high degree of trust and autonomy
* Office in central Stockholm
* 30 days of vacation per year
* Wellness allowance (5,000 SEK/year)


**How To Apply**
 Send us your application and tell us specifically what you would build at Betao. We're not looking for a cover letter. We're looking for a point of view.

title: Internship: Organizational results, learning and impact
description:
Join SEI HQ’s Communications, Learning and Impact Division as an intern and contribute SEI’s strategic journey on results, learning and impact. You will support SEI’s global work in knowledge management, impact thinking, monitoring and evaluation, and organizational learning.
   

  

**About The Internship**
 SEI has launched its 2025–29 Strategy , which combines continuity with renewal. It builds on SEI’s legacy, value and achievements while adapting our research agenda to a rapidly changing world.
   

  

 To put this strategy into practice, SEI uses a dedicated results and learning framework (RALF). RALF helps prioritize work, guides organizational learning with staff and partners, and ensures accountability to donors and stakeholders. Central to this exciting journey is strengthening SEI’s organizational learning across global centers, integrating impact thinking into project design and management, and clearly assessing and demonstrating SEI’s impact.
   

  

 As an intern, you will join SEI HQ’s Result and Learning unit within the Communications, Learning and Impact Division and provide hands-on support by assisting with reviews, research, system management and workshop support.
   

  

 Your main tasks will include:
   

  

* conducting desk research on impact and learning topics
* assisting with impact assessment and reporting
* supporting the logistics of training, workshops and learning events
* supporting the production of written outputs
* helping make learning and project management/MEL tools more accessible to staff
* supporting the delivery of work under the knowledge management hub
* supporting coordination with SEI global centres and project teams as assigned
* carrying out other tasks as needed


**Who you are**
 We are looking for someone with a clear interest or experience in transformative learning, monitoring and evaluation, change management, and/or sustainable development.
   

  

 You are motivated to find solutions to complex issues, driven by curiosity and a commitment to learning, and eager to make a positive impact. You thrive in a collaborative environment and can prioritize tasks and move them forward. Experience in transformative learning for sustainable development is a plus.
   

  

 You may undertake this internship as part of a master’s thesis. If so, please state your study program and research topic in your cover letter.
   

  

**Skills And Experience**
* student currently undertaking a Bachelor’s or Master’s program
* fluency in English
* proficiency in Microsoft Office, especially PowerPoint and Excel
* knowledge of interactive meeting tools
* strong analytical, organizational and time management skills
* knowledge of monitoring, evaluation and learning and project management (a plus)
* knowledge of design and visualization (a plus)


**How to apply**
 We review applications on an ongoing basis, so please submit your application as soon as possible, and no later than
 **19 April 2026** 
 , 23:59 (Stockholm time).
   

  

 Applications should be written in English and include a short CV and cover letter (maximum one page).
   

  

 Please include in your cover letter:
   

  

* what you would like to do and learn during your internship and your strengths related to the role
* how the internship relates to your studies and future plans


 Your CV should include one reference (name, affiliation and contact details).
   

  

**Internships at SEI**
 We aim to attract competent and skilled university students for our internships. Our goal is to support the intern’s development by providing a valuable learning experience in a professional setting. To be eligible, you must be enrolled at a university or university college, and the internship should be part of your education.
   

  

 Please note: SEI HQ internships are unpaid. Applicants must be fully funded and insured by external sources for the entire internship period.
   

  

 SEI recruitment is based on respect for all individuals, regardless of gender, gender identity or expression, age, political opinion, union affiliation, functional variation, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, nationality, or marital or parental status.
   

  

**Questions**
* For questions about the scope of the internship, please contact Yani Wang, Program Manager: wang@sei.org .
* For questions about the recruitment process, please contact Filippa Klintberg, HR Specialist: klintberg@sei.org .


**Meet the team** 
**https://www.sei.org/about-sei/results-and-impact/** 
**About SEI**
 Stockholm Environment Institute is an international non-profit research institute that tackles climate, environment and sustainable development challenges.
   

  

 We empower partners to meet these challenges through cutting-edge research, knowledge, tools and capacity building. Scientific quality and integrity are foundations of our work. Partnership is at the heart of our approach, leading to change that lasts.
   

  

 Our work connects science to policy and practice, aiming to drive tangible impacts. It spans climate change, natural resources, water, air, and health, and addresses questions of governance, innovation, finance, poverty, gender equality and social equity.
   

  

 We are committed to transparency and full disclosure of our funding. The Government of Sweden is our largest funder, and we also receive funds from a range of public research funders, philanthropic foundations, bilateral and multilateral development agencies, governments, NGOs and other partners.
   

  

 Through SEI’s HQ and seven centres around the world, we engage with policy, practice and development action for a sustainable, prosperous future for all.

title: Customer Success Value Architect
description:
Brinner du för att leverera affärsvärde till kund och har en bra förståelse för mjukvara och plattformsdesign kombinerat med djup kunskap inom regulatoriska- samt omvärlds-krav? Då vill jag gärna lära känna dig!
   

  

 Jag heter Urban Jansson och arbetar som Head of CX | SW & Service. Telia Cygate utökar sitt Centrala CX-team och söker nu en driven och Customer Success Value Architect för att arbeta med våra team över hela organisationen samt vår transformativa resa mot framtidens mjukvarudrivna- och digitala-infrastruktur.
   

  

**Vad du kommer att göra i rollen:**
 I rollen som CS Value Architect kommer du att arbeta som den strategiska länken som översätter vår plattforms design och arkitektur till konkreta affärsresultat och konkurrensfördelar för potentiella kunder. Du kommer att arbeta i våra kunddialoger och affärer, där du etablerar ett värdebaserat förtroende och kommunicerar de unika affärsvärden som våra IT-plattformar erbjuder. I rollen arbetar du mot uppsatta mål och budget.
   

  

 Du kommer att delta tidigt i säljdialoger och fokuserade på mjukvara, SaaS, EA och support för att arbeta efter vår CX-metod och lösningens ROI. Att lägga grunden för en framgångsrik kundresa är avgörande, och din insats kommer att visa hur vår kompetens, teknik och metod löser kundens mest pressande utmaningar och driver deras framgång i levererad IT-plattform över tid.
   

  

* Värdebaserad försäljning: Driva och ansvara för att utveckla och kommunicera erbjudandet för vår tilltänkta leverans i kundens IT-plattform med fokus på hur teknisk design driver affärsnytta.
* Förtroendebyggare för kundens affärsresultat: Etablera trovärdighet och förtroende hos tekniska och ekonomiska beslutsfattare och ledningsgrupper genom att presentera affärsvärdet av plattformen, med säkerhet och skalbarhet i fokus.
* Affärscase och ROI: Utforma och presentera skräddarsydda affärscase och Return on Investment analyser som tydligt kvantifierar de ekonomiska fördelarna med vår plattformsdesign för den specifika kunden.
* Tekniska värdedemonstrationer: Facilitera och boka avancerade demonstrationer och workshops som belyser hur plattformens tekniska egenskaper och integrationer direkt bidrar till kundens affärs- & resultat-mål.
* Insamling av marknadsinsikter: Fånga upp och analysera kundspecifika tekniska behov och branschtrender för att informera produktutveckling och säkerställa att vårt värdeerbjudande förblir relevant och konkurrenskraftigt.
* Samarbete: Arbeta tätt med vårt centrala CS-team och valda regionala kundteam i roller som Customer Success Strategist och Customer Success Managers samt centrala specialister, såsom Software and Service Specialist mfl, för att säkerställa en enhetlig och kraftfull värdekommunikation från första kontakt till långsiktig kundrelation.


**För att lyckas i rollen:**
 Du är en person som har en naturlig förmåga att engagera både kunder och kollegor. Du gillar att arbeta operationellt och taktiskt med strategiska budskap, där du tillsammans med våra kunder och kundteam hittar de bästa lösningarna. Det är viktigt att du är en teamspelare med stark kommunikationsförmåga, både muntligt och skriftligt, som kan förmedla komplexa koncept på ett lättförståeligt sätt till en bred publik. Du är proaktiv, lösningsorienterad och har ett starkt fokus på att leverera mätbara resultat både individuellt och i affärsteam.
   

  

* Stark kommunikationsförmåga och erfarenhet av att förklara komplexa tekniska koncept på ett tydligt och engagerande sätt – för både tekniker och beslutsfattare på CxO-nivå.
* Erfarenhet av att leda och hålla fängslande presentationer och workshops för stora och små grupper samt ledningsgrupp.
* Stark affärsförståelse och erfarenhet av att koppla kunders utmaningar till tekniska lösningar som skapar affärsvärde.
* Erfarenhet av att bygga långsiktiga relationer med nyckelpersoner hos kunder och identifiera nya möjligheter för värdeskapande försäljning
* Vana av att använda digitala verktyg för analys, insikter och uppföljning av både interna och externa KPI:er
* Flytande svenska och engelska, i text och skrift


**Varför Telia Cygate?**
 På Telia Cygate är vi inte bara experter på nätverk, säkerhet och olika slags moln – vi är också ett gäng som tycker att det ska vara kul att gå till jobbet! Som en del av Telia Company har vi styrkan att skapa verklig påverkan i stor skala, bidra till samhällsnytta och hjälpa våra kunder att navigera i digitaliseringens värld. Vi gör det alltid med värme, omtanke och ett leende. Här är det idéerna och våra olika perspektiv som gör oss starka, och tillsammans ser vi till att teknikens värld blir en plats där alla trivs – och där du hör hemma.
   

  

 Hos oss är din utveckling viktig. Vi uppmuntrar till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och ser till att just du och dina intressen är i fokus. Vi vet att det är människorna som utgör vårt företag, och därför värdesätter vi glädje, kreativitet och olika perspektiv i allt vi gör.
   

  

 Välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss, där vi gör teknik mänsklig och skapar verklig påverkan
 **!**
**Telia Cygate är stolta över att vara certifierade som Great Place to Work!**
 Hos oss står människor i centrum – här får du utvecklas, utmanas och trivas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor. Vi bygger en kultur där trygghet, gemenskap och möjligheter går hand i hand. Vill du vara med på resan? Välkommen till en arbetsplats som verkligen gör skäl för namnet.
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder**
 När du börjar hos oss får du ett omfattande förmånspaket anpassat efter din lokala marknad, möjlighet till hybridarbete och mer. Du har också chans att få bonus baserat på din prestation och Telias resultat.
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan senast
 **2026-04-04.** 
 Rollen kan komma att stängas tidigare om vi hittar rätt kandidat – så vänta inte för länge!
   

  

 Placeringsort: Stockholm
   

  

 Om du går vidare i processen kommer du att kontaktas av vår
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Bakgrund- och referenskontroller ingår i processen.
   

  

 Har du frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta mig gärna, Urban Jansson på
   

  

 urban.jansson@cygate.se.
   

  

**Lika möjligheter för alla**
 På Telia värderar vi kompetens och utvecklingspotential. Vi främjar mångfald och ser till att varje individs behov tillgodoses, oavsett funktionsvariation, kön, ålder, nationalitet, sexuell läggning eller social bakgrund. Tillsammans skapar vi en inkluderande arbetsmiljö där din unikhet är vår styrka.
   

  

**Välkommen till Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Informationssäkerhetsspecialist – Microsoft Purview
description:
*Vill du påverka och göra skillnad på riktigt? Här bidrar du till att skapa trygghet för människor och samhällen.* 
*Det du gör spelar roll.*
**Din roll**
 Vi söker en Informationssäkerhetsspecialist till rollen som Business Solution Manager (BSM) för Microsoft Purview, till vårt Information Security Operations-team.
   

  

 Som BSM arbetar du nära våra IT‑lösningsägare, informationsägare och verksamheten i stort, för att införa och vidareutveckla Purview som plattform, för att säkerställa att informationssäkerhet är en naturligt integrerad del av vår molnmigreringsresa.
   

  

 Rollen innebär också att aktivt bidra till att stärka säkerhetskulturen inom organisationen genom att delta i och driva informationssäkerhetsarbetet samt hantera incidenter inom informationssäkerhetsområdet
   

  

* Leda införandet och vidareutvecklingen av Microsoft Purview som operativ lösning för dataklassificering, dataskydd och informationsstyrning.
* Stödja verksamheten i att identifiera och skydda känslig information samt utveckla och implementera relevanta informationssäkerhetspolicys och rutiner för våra molnlösningar.
* Leda referensgrupp, samt förse styrgruppen med underlag och rekommendationer.
* Kravställa mot förvaltningen samt prioritera implementationsordningen.
* Ansvara för lösningens förvaltningsplan och utvecklingsplan, inklusive uppdateringar och prioriteringar, samt genomföra budgetuppföljning och ta fram beslutsunderlag.
* Bevaka trender och nya funktioner inom Purview och generell molnsäkerhet, samt omsätta detta i praktiska förbättringar.
* Utföra analys- och utredningsarbete vid informationssäkerhetsincidenter samt att bidra till att stärka informationssäkerhetsmedvetenheten i organisationen genom utbildning, vägledning och kommunikation.


**Din profil**
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete inom informationssäkerhet.
* Kunskap om Microsoft Purview eller liknande plattformar för data governance och dataskydd.
* Förståelse för säkerhetsramverk såsom ISO 27001, NIST, CIS eller motsvarande.
* Förmåga att översätta tekniska lösningar till verksamhetsnytta och tydliga rekommendationer.
* God samarbetsförmåga och vana att arbeta med många olika intressenter.
* Strukturerad, analytisk och trygg i att driva arbetet självständigt såväl som i team.
* Nyfiken på nya tekniker och motiverad att hålla dig uppdaterad inom området.


 Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.
   

  

**Vad du blir en del av**
 Upptäck oändliga möjligheter. Anta utmaningar, skapa smarta innovationer och uppgradera dina förmågor. Det här är en plats för kluriga tänkare, modiga pionjärer och alla däremellan. Tillsammans uppnår vi det extraordinära, var och en tar med sitt unika perspektiv. Varje bidrag räknas.
   

  

 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med 26,100 talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Saab utvecklar, tillverkar och underhåller avancerade system inom flygteknik, vapen, ledningssystem, sensorer och undervattenssystem. Saab har sitt huvudkontor i Sverige men en global verksamhet där Saab är en del av många nationers försvarsförmåga. Läs mer om oss här

title: Insurance Graduate Program
description:
We are seeking talented individuals to join our
 **Graduate program** 
 here at Marsh. This role will be based in
 **Stockholm.**
 This is a hybrid role that has a requirement of working at least three - four days per week in the office.
   

  

 As a Graduate at Marsh, you get much more than just a job. Our Graduate Program is also an education and foundation for your future career. With us, you get a unique opportunity to grow in a large and international organization where you develop both your personal and professional skills by getting your own areas of responsibility, run projects and receive support from competent colleagues along the way. You will have the opportunity to work in different business areas during the 18 months long program to find the perfect match for you. The idea of the program is to prepare you to go into a regular role and continue to grow with us.
   

  

 Our Graduate Program is a valuable investment in Marsh Sweden's future. We have a wide range of functions and positions that can meet your career ambitions. You usually work with us as either a specialist or a generalist. As a specialist, you have deep knowledge in one or more industries or insurance areas and ensure that our customers always have the best insurance solutions.
   

  

 Marsh is the leading insurance broker and risk advisory firm, providing businesses and individuals with tailored risk management solutions. We help clients identify, assess, and mitigate risks through expert advice, data-driven strategies, and insurance placement. Marsh services include risk consulting, insurance broking, and claims management.
   

  

**Please note: if applying please ensure that your CV & application is in English.**
**We will count on you to:**
* Engage directly with clients and stakeholders, providing risk advisory and insurance solutions.
* Participate in a dynamic 18-month graduate program, with the possibility of rotating through different business areas to find your best fit.
* Lead projects, develop your professional skills, and take ownership of your own responsibilities.
* Collaborate with a diverse team in a fast-paced environment, contributing to innovative risk management strategies.


**What you need to have:**
* Recently graduated (within the last 1-2 years) with a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Economics, Management, Law, or related disciplines.
* Fluent in Swedish and a competent English speaker, with excellent verbal and written communication skills.
* Strong business acumen, problem-solving skills, and a genuine interest in the insurance industry.
* Ambitious, proactive, and eager to learn, with a positive attitude and the ability to thrive in a high-paced environment.
* Based in or near Stockholm, with a flexible approach to work arrangements.


**What makes you stand out:**
* Overall ambition to build a career in insurance and risk management.
* Interest in working within a large, global organization that values diversity and professional growth.
* Personality and attitude that demonstrate a willingness to learn and develop in a supportive, team-oriented environment.
* Previous experience or knowledge of insurance is a plus but not required—your motivation and mindset are key.


**Why join our team:**
* We help you be your best through professional development opportunities, interesting work and supportive leaders.
* We foster a vibrant and inclusive culture where you can work with talented colleagues to create new solutions and have impact for colleagues and clients.
* Our scale enables us to provide a range of career opportunities, as well as benefits and rewards to enhance your well-being.


 Want to know more about how it can be being a graduate at Marsh? Feel free to read about our graduates' experiences of the program here
   

  

 Marsh Risk is a business of Marsh (NYSE: MRSH), a global leader in risk, reinsurance and capital, people and investments, and management consulting, advising clients in 130 countries. With annual revenue of over $27 billion and more than 95,000 colleagues, Marsh helps build the confidence to thrive through the power of perspective. For more information about Marsh Risk, visit marsh.com, or follow us on LinkedIn and X.
   

  

 Marsh is committed to creating a diverse, inclusive and flexible work environment. We aim to attract and retain the best people and embrace diversity of age, background, disability, ethnic origin, family duties, gender orientation or expression, marital status, nationality, parental status, personal or social status, political affiliation, race, religion and beliefs, sex/gender, sexual orientation or expression, skin color, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.
   

  

 Marsh is committed to hybrid work, which includes the flexibility of working remotely and the collaboration, connections and professional development benefits of working together in the office. All Marsh colleagues are expected to be in their local office or working onsite with clients at least three days per week. Office-based teams will identify at least one “anchor day” per week on which their full team will be together in person.
   

  

**R\_337690**

title: Quality Management Professional
description:
Schaeffler is a dynamic global technology company and its success has been a result of its entrepreneurial spirit and long history of private ownership. Does that sound interesting to you? As a partner to all of the major automobile manufacturers, as well as key players in the aerospace and industrial sectors, we offer you many development opportunities.
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities**
**Quality Management & Continuous Improvement**
* Drive projects to improve sales effectiveness, customer satisfaction, and operational efficiency.
* Implement and standardize group quality standards regionally, focusing on sales and customer-facing processes.
* Monitor process adherence, manage quality data, and prepare continuous improvement reports.
* Ensure business continuity and crisis management awareness; support leadership communications.


**Sales Support**
* Lead complaint management by collaborating with sales, customer service, and technical teams to prevent issues.
* Coordinate and drive 8D reports.


**Data, Reporting & Audits**
* Use data insights to identify improvement areas and assess impact.
* Prepare decision-focused reports for regional and group stakeholders.
* Manage certification documents, quality reporting, and support audits and inspections.
* Lead or assist internal and system audits.
* Deliver quality management training in collaboration with staff and management.


**Office & Security Support**
* Manage fire safety training and lead emergency and crisis response plans across multiple sites.
* Act as main contact for suppliers and provide facility-related support.


**Your Qualifications**
* Graduate OR Undergraduate in Business Administration, Engineering, Natural Science, Quality Management, or a related field
* 5–10 years of experience within Quality Management, Business Excellence, Operational Excellence, or Continuous Improvement roles
* Excellent communication skills in English (written and verbal)
* Proven experience working close to the business, preferably in sales-driven or customer-facing environments
* Solid understanding of quality management principles, applied pragmatically
* Experience in an international or matrix organization is strongly preferred


 As a global company with employees around the world, it is important to us that we treat each other with respect and value all ideas and perspectives. By appreciating our differences, we inspire creativity and drive innovation. In this way, we contribute to sustainable value creation for our stakeholders and society as a whole. Together, we advance how the world moves.
   

  

 Exciting assignments and outstanding development opportunities await you because we impact the future with innovation. We look forward to your application.
   

  

 www.schaeffler.com/careers
   

  

**Your Contact**
 Schaeffler Sverige AB
   

  

 Henriett Soós-Németh
   

  

 +36203106714
