title: Internship: Transforming food systems
description:
Join SEI’s Food systems transformation program as an intern and contribute to research and policy work on sustainable food systems and One Health. This internship offers the opportunity to support evidence-based solutions that inform decision-making and advance sustainable development.
   

  

**Project/internship introduction**
 The Food systems transformation program at SEI works at the intersection of human, animal and environmental health, guided by a One Health approach. The program addresses key issues such as the environmental, health and social impacts of different dietary pathways, sustainable and resilient food systems policy, protein transition and the effects of sustainability interventions on animal health and welfare. It communicates these findings to policymakers, businesses and civil society.
   

  

 This internship offers a flexible and collaborative role. Tasks will be shaped jointly between you and the team, based on your interests, skills and program priorities.
   

  

**Tasks**
* conduct research and contribute to written outputs on topics such as:
+ EU agricultural and sustainable food systems policy (e.g. common agriculture policy, sustainable food systems in Eastern Partnership countries)
+ protein transition and alternative proteins
+ food resilience, crisis preparedness and food security
+ retail sector engagement and sustainability
+ regional focus areas, including the Nordics

* support the development of materials to communicate research findings to external audiences
* contribute to activities under the One SEI program, as needed


**Learning opportunities**
* gain hands-on experience in policy-relevant research
* develop skills in science communication and stakeholder engagement
* gain exposure to international food systems policy and sustainability work
* align internship work with academic thesis research, where relevant


**Who you are**
 You have a background or strong interest in food systems, environmental studies, public health, animal welfare, public policy or a related field.
   

  

 You have strong research and writing skills and an interest in food systems. You are comfortable working both independently and collaboratively, and able to adapt and contribute effectively in a team environment.
   

  

**Skills And Experience**
* currently enrolled in a master’s program (strong bachelor’s students may also be considered)
* fluent in English; other languages, including Swedish, are an asset
* strong research, writing and analytical skills
* ability to work independently and take initiative
* strong organizational and time management skills
* proficiency in Microsoft Office
* experience in policy engagement is an asset


**How to apply**
 We review applications on an ongoing basis, so please submit your application as soon as possible, and no later than 19 April 2026, 23:59 (Stockholm time).
   

  

 Applications should be written in English and include a short CV and cover letter (maximum one page).
   

  

 Please include in your cover letter:
   

  

* what you would like to do and learn during your internship and your strengths related to the role
* information on your current study program
* how the internship relates to your studies and future plans


 Your CV should include one reference (name, affiliation and contact details).
   

  

**Internships at SEI**
 We aim to attract competent and skilled university students for our internships. Our goal is to support the intern’s development by providing a valuable learning experience in a professional setting. To be an intern you need to be enrolled at a university or university college. The internship should be part of your education. We only offer unpaid internships. Applicants must be fully funded and insured by external sources throughout their time at SEI HQ.
   

  

 All SEI recruitments are based on respect for the individual regardless of gender, gender identity or expression, age, union representation or political opinion, functional variation, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, nationality and marital or parental status.
   

  

**Location**
 The internship is based at SEI HQ in Stockholm. An in-person internship involving office visits 1-2 times per week is preferred but an online internship may also be acceptable.
   

  

**Questions?**
 For questions regarding the aims of the internship, please contact Ieva Galkytė, Policy Fellow: ieva.galkyte@sei.org
   

  

 For questions regarding the recruitment process, please contact Filippa Klintberg, HR Specialist: filippa.klintberg@sei.org
   

  

**Meet the team** 
**https://www.sei.org/projects/transforming-food-systems/** 
**About SEI**
 Stockholm Environment Institute is an international non-profit research institute that tackles climate, environment and sustainable development challenges.
   

  

 We empower partners to meet these challenges through cutting-edge research, knowledge, tools and capacity building. Scientific quality and integrity are foundations of our work. Partnership is at the heart of our approach, leading to change that lasts.
   

  

 Our work connects science to policy and practice, aiming to drive tangible impacts. It spans climate change, natural resources, water, air, and health, and addresses questions of governance, innovation, finance, poverty, gender equality and social equity.
   

  

 We are committed to transparency and full disclosure of our funding. The Government of Sweden is our largest funder, and we also receive funds from a range of public research funders, philanthropic foundations, bilateral and multilateral development agencies, governments, NGOs and other partners.
   

  

 Through SEI’s HQ and seven centres around the world, we engage with policy, practice and development action for a sustainable, prosperous future for all.

title: Senior Security Engineer - Enterprise Security
description:
We're hiring a Senior Security Engineer to lead and raise the bar for enterprise security at Spotify. In this role, you'll be hands-on across core security domains, IAM, endpoint management, networking, and shaping how we secure an increasingly AI-enabled enterprise. You'll build tooling and automation, define policies and guardrails, and partner closely with teams across IT, infrastructure, legal, and beyond to keep Spotify moving fast without compromising on security.
   

  

 The ideal candidate brings solid professional experience in enterprise security, strong technical foundations, and a genuine comfort with AI, both as a tool to augment their own work and as a surface area to secure. Just as importantly, you're an excellent communicator who can translate security priorities into language that resonates across a global, cross-functional organization.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Drive the evolution of Spotify's enterprise security program by identifying gaps, proposing improvements, and implementing changes that balance strong security with a frictionless employee experience
* Design and build security automation, integrations, and internal tooling to scale enterprise security and reduce manual toil.
* Collect and analyze high-quality security data to improve detection capabilities and generate data-driven insights that shape the direction of the enterprise security program
* Define and implement security hardening, guardrails and policies for enterprise applications and SaaS platforms.
* Partner with Site Reliability, IT, and other Security teams to provide expert guidance on enterprise security best practices and drive meaningful improvements to systems and processes.
* Investigate, propose and implement changes to Spotify’s Enterprise Security posture across domains including: IAM, Single Sign-on, Endpoint Management, and Networking.
* Lead governance and oversight of enterprise security tooling, including password managers and enterprise browsers.
* Champion and enforce enterprise security best practices across endpoints, enterprise products, and network infrastructure, advising bandmates and teams along the way.
* Collaborate closely with IT, infrastructure, legal and communications to ensure a coordinated approach to enterprise security.
* Mentor and support the growth of engineers around you, raising the security bar across the organization.


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have several years of experience in enterprise security at fast moving technology companies. Alternatively, you have deep expertise in enterprise systems engineering and are ready to transition into a security-focused career.
* You have demonstrated experience applying enterprise security principles across IAM, SSO, networking, and device management, and you understand how these domains interrelate to form a cohesive security foundation.
* You can think like an attacker and understand how to identify risks and implement countermeasures against threats that span identity, endpoint, network, and cloud boundaries.
* You have a solid understanding of the risks introduced by agentic AI in an enterprise context and you are eager to get hands-on identifying and mitigating these risks in our environment.
* You actively leverage AI tooling to augment your own work and are eager to explore how emerging AI capabilities can be applied to enterprise security challenges.
* You can critically evaluate tools, practices and procedures, and you're willing to advocate for improvements and change when you see opportunities or risk.
* You have an understanding of the current threat landscape, and want to be part of a team creating and implementing state of the art security solutions in a SaaS-driven enterprise environment.
* You communicate complex security topics clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, and you're skilled at building alignment across a global, cross-functional organization.
* You thrive in a flexible environment with broad scope and you're energized by the freedom to innovate and challenge conventional security thinking.


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! For this role, you can be within the EMEA region as long as we have a work location (excluding France due to on-call restrictions).
* This team operates within the Central European and GMT time zone for collaboration.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: CSH - Technical Expert - Cooling and Datacenters
description:
**If you are passionate about cooling technologies and enjoy helping others grow, this role is for you.**
**Responsibilities:**
**Technical Leadership & Expertise Support:**
 Provide L3 expert-level support for Connected Services Hub for cooling systems including and not limited on:
   

  

* Air cooled & water-cooled chillers
* CRAH/CRAC units
* InRow cooling
* Free cooling systems
* Cooling towers, dry coolers & heat-rejection equipment
* Digital monitoring infrastructures (sensors, flow, temperature, pressure, Netbotz…)


 Support Connected Services Hub agents for remote complex troubleshooting.
   

  

 Provide expertise to help Analytics team develop scripts, algorithms relevant to facilitate our monitoring of cooling devices (Efficiency improvement & optimization).
   

  

* Cooling system integration with electrical distribution


 Support R&D, LoB, and offer creation teams during Agile development cycles related to cooling digitalization
   

  

 Contribute to provisioning, validation tests and qualification of new offer bricks related to cooling.
   

  

**Knowledge Management & Content Development:**
 Build & maintain knowledge content for cooling systems for Connected Services Team under the form of a comprehensive training plan.
   

  

 Lead development of training modules for internal teams.
   

  

 Create technical documentation:
   

  

* Provisioning Guide and application guide (digital twin creation and configuration)
* Alarm playbook creation (how-to react in case of alarms)
+ Troubleshooting guides
+ Know issues & resolutions

* Best practices


**Expert Network Management & Collaboration:**
 Be the Connected Services Hub Cooling Expert single point of contact with Schneider Electric relevant cooling experts’ actors (ClimaCheck, BA, EAA SP&C…).
   

  

 Work closely with Connected Services Hub Excellence team to
   

  

* Optimize offer efficiency.
* Improve workflows and procedures for cooling-related execution.


**Quality Improvement:**
 Act as the voice of the field:
   

  

* Identify recurring issues.
* Contribute to root cause analysis and corrective plans.
* Provide structured feedback to LoB and engineering team.


**Qualifications:**
**Technical**
 Strong experience with cooling systems including:
   

  

* Chillers (air/water-cooled)
* CRAH/CRAC units
* Refrigeration failures, cycle & thermodynamics
* Cooling control loops & instability
* Hydronics (pumps, loops, valves)
* Compressors, valves, pumps
* Datacenter rack level cooling
* Redundancy (N+1/N+2) behavior


 Familiarity with datacenter infrastructure & Uptime Tier design principles.
   

  

* Solid troubleshooting skills for complex, multi-system failures.


**IT / Digital**
 Understanding of:
   

  

* IoT architecture & sensors
* Sensor data flows
* Cloud platforms
* Cybersecurity basics
* Data analytics
* Communication protocols (Modbus/SNMP/BACnet)


**Soft Skills**
* Excellent communication and customer-facing abilities.
* Ability to lead technical discussions and trainings.
* Solid troubleshooting skills for complex, multi-system failures.
* Team-oriented with strong collaboration skills.


**Other**
* Ability to travel as required.
* Experience in Agile methodology is a plus.


 Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Electronics, Mechatronics, or related field with 10-15 years of experience
   

  

**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €36 billion global revenue
   

  

 +13% organic growth
   

  

 150 000+ employees in 100+ countries
   

  

 #1 on the Global 100 World’s most sustainable corporations
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Employee experience-strateg
description:
Plats
   

  

 Stockholm, Nyköping, Norrköping + 2 , Hybrid
   

  

 Upplägg
   

  

 Heltid
   

  

 Ansök senast
   

  

 Löpande rekrytering
   

  

 Vi söker en EX-strateg som vill vara med och forma framtidens arbetsplats tillsammans med oss. Vi tror att du drivs av att få tekniken att fungera för människan i vardagen, att skapa engagemang och att ge organisationer förmågan att faktiskt använda de verktyg och system de investerar i. Du blir en del av Consids snabbt växande affärsområde
 *Employee Experience* 
 , där vi rör oss i gränslandet mellan IT, HR och kommunikation. Vårt fokus är att hjälpa organisationer att få människor, arbetssätt och teknik att hänga ihop på riktigt.
   

  

**Du kommer att arbeta med**
* Utveckling av moderna digitala arbetsplatser, med förståelse för plattformar som M365, SharePoint, Teams, Viva, Sitevision och närliggande lösningar
* AI-adoption: stöd i hur organisationer börjar, breddar och säkrar effekt av AI i vardagen
* Internkommunikation: budskap, struktur, kanalstrategi och stöd till ledare
* Förändringsledning: beteenden, införandeplaner, utbildningar och arbetssätt som håller över tid
* Projektledning av initiativ från start till mål tillsammans med våra specialister
* Att översätta tekniska implementationer till något verksamhetsnära, användbart och begripligt, där kommunikation, arbetssätt och kultur får lika stor vikt som tekniken i sig


**Placeringsort**
 Stockholm, Nyköping, Norrköping, Linköping eller Jönköping. Vi arbetar hybrid och du blir del av ett team som samarbetar tätt oavsett ort.
   

  

**Låter detta som något för dig?**
 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan, innehållandes CV eller LinkedIn! Tillträde sker enligt överenskommelse. Vi kallar till intervju löpande.
   

  

 Din kompetens
   

  

 Du har 8-10 års erfarenhet av att leda projekt som kombinerar kommunikation, förändringsledning och digitala arbetssätt, med fokus på att få människor och organisationer att röra sig i samma riktning
   

  

 Du har mycket god förståelse för AI och erfarenhet av att driva AI-adoption – både vad gäller möjligheter, arbetssätt och hur team och organisationer behöver rustas
   

  

 Erfarenhet av att driva större införanden eller utvecklingsinitiativ självständigt, med ansvar för planering, koordinering, uppföljning och tydlig rapportering
   

  

 Starka kommunikativa förmågor och vana att göra komplexa frågor begripliga i dialoger, budskap och utbildningsinsatser
   

  

 Vana vid att coacha och vägleda ledare och team genom förändring – från insikt och förståelse till adoption och nya beteenden
   

  

 Erfarenhet av verksamhetsutveckling där du kopplat samman teknik, kultur och arbetssätt
   

  

 Förmåga att se helheter och omsätta organisatoriska mål till konkreta initiativ som skapar engagemang
   

  

 Affärsmässig och trygg i kundmötet, med förmåga att identifiera behov och skapa relevanta lösningar
   

  

 Vana att arbeta nära teknisk kompetens och översätta mellan teknik, användning och kommunikation
   

  

 Erfarenhet av liknande roller, exempelvis internkommunikatör, intranätansvarig, digital workplace-specialist, förändringsledare eller projektledare
   

  

 Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift
   

  

 Meriterande
   

  

 Operativ erfarenhet av SharePoint eller god förståelse för plattformens logik och möjligheter
   

  

 Erfarenhet av konsultrollen
   

  

 Kunskap om agila arbetssätt
   

  

 Fördjupad erfarenhet av AI-adoption och utbildning av team i AI-användning
   

  

 Fördelar hos Consid
   

  

 Fantastiska kollegor
   

  

 Du får världens duktigaste, trevligaste och mest hjälpsamma kollegor.
   

  

 Kompetenshubbar
   

  

 Med kontors- och landsövergripande kompetenshubbar finns ständigt möjlighet till kompetensutbyte.
   

  

 Utvecklas
   

  

 Hos oss finns möjlighet att testa det som du är intresserad av och utveckla din roll i den riktning du vill.
   

  

 Stora men familjära
   

  

 Kan man vara ett världsledande bolag men behålla känslan av att vara ett mindre familjärt bolag? Svaret är Consid.

title: VCF konsult
description:
VCF Konsult på Advania 🚀
   

  

 Som senior tekniker med inriktning på VMware Cloud Foundation 9 blir du central i genomförandet av
 **avancerade VCF-implementationer hos våra kunder.** 
 Du arbetar nära både arkitekter och kundens driftteam och ansvarar för installation, konfiguration, testning och överlämning av plattformar byggda på vSphere, vSAN och NSX. Rollen innebär att du praktiskt driver projekt genom hela livscykeln och säkerställer stabila, säkra och skalbara lösningar i både nya och befintliga miljöer.
   

  

**Ditt tekniska arbete**
 Arbetet omfattar bland annat;
   

  

  

* Management- och workload-domäner
* Nätverksdesign på NSX-nivå
* Konfiguration av lagring och resurspooler
* Automatisering av återkommande moment
* Drift- och livscykelhantering


 Utöver ovan nämna arbetsuppgifter kommer du även att arbeta med allt från felsökning i komplexa miljöer till planering av
 **kapacitet** 
 ,
 **patchning** 
 och
 **uppgraderingar** 
 . Din tidigare erfarenhet av storskaliga implementationer inom
 **server** 
 ,
 **lagring** 
 eller
 **nätverk** 
 gör att du snabbt sätter dig in i kundernas miljöer och kan förutse problem innan de uppstår.
   

  

 Din kompetens och utveckling ✨
   

  

 Vi ser gärna att du har
 **Broadcom-certifieringar inom VCF** 
 eller dess ingående produkter, men lika viktigt är din
 **praktiska erfarenhet av VMware-plattformen och din vilja att fortsätta utvecklas** 
 . Hos oss får du möjlighet att utbilda dig vidare inom VCF och specialisera dig i takt med att tekniken och kunderna utvecklas.
   

  

 Du kommer att ingå i vårt konsultteam där du alltid har stöttning av kollegor och där din kompetens blir en viktig del av kundernas digitala resa. Vi söker dig som utgår från någon av våra etablerade regioner och som kan arbeta nära både kunder och kollegor. Rollen innebär också att du behöver vara flexibel och beredd att resa i tjänsten när uppdraget kräver det.
   

  

 Vår arbetskultur och betydelse i praktiken
   

  

 Vårt arbetssätt bygger på decentralisering och mandat att fatta beslut nära kunden. Som specialist får du därför ett verkligt inflytande över tekniska vägval och arkitekturella beslut.
 **Självledarskap** 
 är inte ett värdeord utan en praktisk nödvändighet för att lyckas hos oss.
   

  

 Vi utgår från Self-Determination Theory, där autonomi, kompetens och tillhörighet är centrala drivkrafter. Det innebär att du arbetar med hög grad av ansvar inom dina expertområden, samtidigt som du ingår i ett erfaret team som delar kunskap och arbetar transparent mot gemensamma mål. Kulturen är professionell, varm och tydlig. Den präglas av förtroende, kvalitet och höga ambitioner.
   

  

**Din professionella profil**
 Rollen kräver att du tar ansvar för dina tekniska beslut, kommunicerar transparent och samarbetar effektivt i team där alla strävar mot samma resultat. Du behöver vara trygg i komplexa situationer, initiativtagande när förbättringar kan göras och kunna stå stadigt i dina rekommendationer även när mycket står på spel.
   

  

 Om du vill arbeta praktiskt med
 **VCF 9 i avancerade miljöer** 
 och samtidigt vidareutveckla din expertis tillsammans med kunniga kollegor, är du välkommen att ta kontakt och gå vidare mot nästa steg
 *.*
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! 👋
   

  

 Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. En anställning hos oss kan även innebära konsultuppdrag i säkerhetsklass. En säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) kan därför komma att genomföras före beslut om anställning. För en del av våra arbetsuppgifter i säkerhetsklass krävs svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

 Advania samarbetar även med Ljung & Sjöberg för en proaktiv arbetsplats kopplat till alkohol och droger.
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.☀️
   

  

 Det är du som arbetar nära kunden som vet vad dem behöver och vad som blir den bästa lösningen för just deras unika behov, både i dag och i morgon. Därför tycker vi att det är du som ska fatta besluten. Det är genom att erbjuda säkra, hållbara och kundanpassade lösningar som vi skapar värde för kunderna och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi bryr oss om hur våra medarbetare mår – på riktigt. Därför samarbetar Advania med Ljung & Sjöberg för att skapa en trygg, proaktiv arbetsmiljö med stöd kring alkohol-, drog- och beroenderelaterade frågor. Tillsammans bygger vi en hållbar arbetsplats där det är okej att be om hjälp, och där förebyggande arbete gör skillnad – för individen, teamet och företaget.
   

  

 I en miljö präglad av stort kundfokus och frihet under ansvar blir det extra viktigt för oss att bygga starka team bestående av ödmjuka stjärnor. Att arbeta i en inkluderande miljö, med kollegor och kunder som vill utvecklas, ger oss möjligheten att trivas och ha riktigt roligt på jobbet. Vi tror på en platt organisation med agilt arbetssätt och flexibilitet. Detta är det enda sättet för en hållbar framtid.
   

  

 Advania Sverige, ”The tech company with people at heart”, har kontor över hela landet, från Luleå i norr till Malmö i syd. Dagligen hjälper våra 1 700 specialister våra kunder, både inom privat och offentlig sektor, i deras ambitioner och mål att digitalisera sina verksamheter. Genom långsiktiga relationer, ledande teknologier, moderna plattformslösningar och strategiska partnerskap formar vi framtidens IT-landskap. Vårt syfte sträcker sig bortom teknik: att ge människor kraften att skapa hållbara värden.
   

  

 Advaniagruppen levererar tjänster till kunder i Sverige, Norge, Storbritannien, Island, Finland och Danmark inom hållbar och säker digitalisering.

title: Marketing Lead, Festivals
description:
At
 **EFG (ESL FACEIT Group)** 
 we create worlds beyond gameplay where players and fans become community. We pride ourselves in having a corporate social responsibility which is that
 **"IT'S NOT GG, UNTIL IT'S GG FOR ALL"** 
 . We are passionate about the culture we foster that ultimately helps to create and shape the world of esports, gaming tournaments, leagues, events and holistic ecosystems staged for our millions of players, fans and heroes.
   

  

*Everything we do — from global esports tournaments and community-driven leagues to next-generation platforms and live events — is rooted in our passion, craftsmanship, and culture. With millions of players and fans around the world, we aim to shape the future of esports and gaming by building ecosystems that are inclusive, innovative, and enduring.*
**The Role**
 As a Marketing Lead, you will:
   

  

* Create a per-festival marketing & channel strategy based on overall festival strategy and additional guidance from Business Leader, Executive Producer, and Director of Festivals;
* Oversee and coordinate the channel management and marketing delivery of all channels included in a festival marketing plan, including but not limited to social media, websites, out-of-home, email marketing, and marketing collaborations with external organizations, institutions, game developers, brands and partners;
* Create and manage project management tools for the delivery of festival marketing, including but not limited to the marketing calendar, social media calendar, media services request sheet;
* Fulfill delivery through the management of marketing staff, contractors, and agencies, and budget allocated to staffing & execution;
* Oversee & staff on-site media services including photography, videography, and archive management of assets.


**Requirements**
* 7+ years of marketing role experience within consumer entertainment events, gaming, and/or esports
* Proven track record of successful campaigns directly tried to financial bottom line performance
* Comfortable in analyzing data and trends across key metrics such as awareness, conversion, retention, and ROI
* Experience with seven-figure budgets, using data to optimize campaigns and justify spend
* Experience leading cross-functional teams across general marketing, performance marketing, content, PR & media production
* Ability to work closely with partners, publishers, and internal sales teams to create marketing value. Experience activating brand partnerships in authentic ways


 Firmly rooted in our values, EFG is an affirmative action employer that celebrates being an equal opportunity workplace. Our unwavering commitment to fair employment extends to all individuals, regardless of their race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, age, sexual orientation, disability, citizenship, marital status, gender identity, or Veteran status.

title: Service Product Manager
description:
Every day, we get opportunities to make a positive impact – on our colleagues, partners, customers, and society. Together, we’re pioneering the solutions of the future and unlocking the full potential of precious resources. Trusted to act on initiative, we challenge conventional thinking to develop world-leading technologies that inspire progress in vital areas, including energy, food, water, and shipping.
   

  

 As we push forward, the innovative, open spirit that fuels our 140-year-old start-up culture and rapid growth also drives our personal growth. So, as we shape a more resourceful, less wasteful world, we build our careers too.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role you will be part of the Product and Portfolio Management team and instrumental for growing the Food & Pharma service business in Business Unit Separation Technologies, where they have a huge install base to capture in Decanter and High-Speed Separator product areas.
   

  

**Role**
 As a Service Product Manager, you will play a key role in driving and safeguarding the competitiveness of our service upgrade products throughout their full lifecycle, including mechanical, automation and digital offerings. Working at the intersection of Sales, Service, Engineering, R&D, Quality, and Supply, you will ensure that our service products remain aligned with market needs, customer expectations, and evolving product platforms. In this role, you will:
   

  

* Understand service‑specific needs for upgrade products, shape and execute the service‑product lifecycle strategy to deliver ongoing value to customers as well as the service organization.
* Build and manage a 3–18‑month roadmap, driving upgrade initiatives, prioritization, product‑council decisions, and cross‑functional requirements for R&D, Engineering, and Supply.
* Own and oversee obsolescence planning, cost‑structure analysis, product cost approval and other aspects, including chemicals used in decanter and separator solutions.
* Manage the product portfolio and monitor performance, ensuring order‑intake, margin, and quality targets are met.
* Collaborate closely with Application Development, other Product Managers, Program Management, and Product Marketing to ensure strong application fit, platform perspective, economies of scale and effective market execution.


 At Alfa Laval, we embrace a hybrid work model, providing you the flexibility to work from home when it aligns with your tasks. This position can be at our Søborg or Flemingsberg office, with an expected travel commitment of approximately 25 – 35 days per year.
   

  

**What You Know**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent; background may be in engineering, business with technical experience, or a related field
* 8–10+ years of experience in product or service management, ideally within industrial equipment or comparable B2B industries
* Strong track record of driving product or service lifecycle management in complex, cross-functional environments
* Highly developed analytical and structured problem-solving skills, with the ability to turn insights into actionable strategies
* Solid understanding of market dynamics, industry trends, and competitor landscapes
* Proven ability to build compelling business cases and scale service offerings for commercial impact
* Excellent communication and presentation skills in English, with experience engaging senior stakeholders and cross-functional teams


**Who You Are**
 You thrive in a cross-functional environment, bringing clarity and structure to complex product challenges. You are proactive, analytical, and a strong problem solver with a growth mindset, focused on creating customer value and business impact. You combine strategic thinking with the ability to translate vision into clear plans and execution with R&D and stakeholders. You take ownership, drive progress, and balance long-term direction with day-to-day delivery. You are a strong communicator who can articulate product vision and build alignment across teams. As a leader and coach, you empower others, foster collaboration, and demonstrate resilience in driving change.
   

  

**For more information, please contact.**
 Manager, Product Management - Intelligent Separation & Service, Preeti Pillai on preeti.pillai@alfalaval.com
   

  

 Senior Talent Acquisition Partner, Claus Wiinholt on claus.wiinholt@alfalaval.com
   

  

**Please send your application and resume through the link below, no later than 15th of April 2026**
 We are conducting a continuous review of received applications. We do not accept applications via email, they will be deleted, due to General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
   

  

 We care about diversity, inclusion, and equity in our recruitment processes. We also believe behavioral traits can provide important insights into a candidate's fit to a role. To help us achieve this we apply Pymetrics assessments, and upon application you will be invited to play the assessment games.
   

  

 As part of Alfa Laval’s commitment to a safe and healthy workplace, alcohol and drug testing is applied during the pre‑employment process in Sweden.

title: Product Application Engineer - Maternity Cover
description:
Join our Power Systems Sales team as Product Application Engineer!
   

  

 This is a maternity leave cover lasting until 31/3-2027.
   

  

 We are seeking a motivated Product Application Engineer (PAE) to leverage your expertise in Schneider Electric Power Systems, focusing on Medium Voltage (MV) secondary equipment in Sweden. You can be based in any one of our offices, but preferably in
 **Stockholm, Luleå or Sundsvall.**
 In this role you will manage and develop the presales of our MV offerings, ensuring close collaboration with end-users, contractors and partners to deliver competitive commercial approaches.
   

  

**You will be delivering sales results for Schneider Electric's Medium Voltage solutions in Sweden and you will:**
* Provide presales technical support to sales teams and key MV Panel Builders, Kiosk Builders, and Contractors.
* Support MV prescriptions at end-user customers alongside the sales force or based on their requests
* Recommend EcoStruxure IoT preferred architecture solutions and assist in system implementation that meets customer needs.
* Promote the new hero offerings RM & SM Airset in Sweden
* Offer expert support by leading solution definitions with customers and advising on issues, including principles, feasibility, limits, constraints, and performance.


**Key Interactions & Behaviours:**
* Work closely with Power System end-user sales, Utility Sales, Panel Builder, and Contractors
* Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to secure sales across the full Schneider scope
* Continuously develop your competencies by staying updated on our offerings, especially IoT products/solutions.
* Contribute to a positive and constructive work environment aligned with our company values..


 If you are passionate about technology and ready to make an impact apply noe to the role and take the next step in your career at Schneider Electric!
   

  

 Gå med i vårt Power Systems Sales-team som Product Application Engineer!
   

  

 Vi söker en motiverad Product Application Engineer (PAE) för att utnyttja din expertis inom Schneider Electric Power Systems, med fokus på Medium Voltage (MV) sekundärutrustning i Sverige. Du kan vara baserad på något av våra kontor, men helst i
 **Stockholm, Luleå eller Sundsvall.**
 I denna roll kommer du att hantera och utveckla presales av våra MV-erbjudanden, säkerställa nära samarbete med slutkunder, entreprenörer och partners för att leverera konkurrenskraftiga kommersiella angreppssätt.
   

  

**Du kommer att leverera försäljningsresultat för Schneider Electrics Medium Voltage-lösningar i Sverige och du kommer att:**
* Tillhandahålla presales teknisk support till försäljningsteam och nyckel-MV Panel Builders, Kiosk Builders och Contractors.
* Stötta MV-rekommendationer hos slutkunds-kunder tillsammans med försäljningsstyrkan eller baserat på deras förfrågningar.
* Rekommendera EcoStruxure IoT föredragna arkitekturlösningar och bistå i systemimplementering som möter kundernas behov.
* Främja de nya hero-erbjudandena RM & SM Airset i Sverige.
* Erbjuda expertstöd genom att leda lösningsdefinitioner med kunder och rådgiva om frågor, inklusive principer, genomförbarhet, begränsningar och prestanda.


**Key Interactions & Behaviours:**
* Arbeta nära med Power System slutkundsförsäljning, Utility Sales, Panel Builder och Contractors.
* Samarbeta med marknadsförings- och försäljningsteam för att säkra försäljning över hela Schneider-scope.
* Kontinuerligt utveckla dina kompetenser genom att hålla dig uppdaterad om våra erbjudanden, särskilt IoT-produkter/lösningar.
* Bidra till en positiv och konstruktiv arbetsmiljö i linje med våra företagsvärderingar.


 Om du är passionerad över teknologi och redo att göra inverkan, ansök nu till rollen och ta nästa steg i din karriär på Schneider Electric!
   

  

 För mer information, vänligen kontakta Andreas Hamping (Sales Director Power Systems Sverige). Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

**Looking to make an IMPACT with your career?**
 When you are thinking about joining a new team, culture matters. At Schneider Electric, our values and behaviors are the foundation for creating a great culture to support business success. We believe that our IMPACT values – Inclusion, Mastery, Purpose, Action, Curiosity, Teamwork – starts with us.
   

  

 IMPACT is also your invitation to join Schneider Electric where you can contribute to turning sustainability ambition into actions, no matter what role you play. It is a call to connect your career with the ambition of achieving a more resilient, efficient, and sustainable world.
   

  

 We are looking for IMPACT Makers; exceptional people who turn sustainability ambitions into actions at the intersection of automation, electrification, and digitization. We celebrate IMPACT Makers and believe everyone has the potential to be one.
   

  

 Become an IMPACT Maker with Schneider Electric – apply today!
   

  

 €36 billion global revenue
   

  

 +13% organic growth
   

  

 150 000+ employees in 100+ countries
   

  

 #1 on the Global 100 World’s most sustainable corporations
   

  

 You must submit an online application to be considered for any position with us. This position will be posted until filled.
   

  

*Schneider Electric aspires to be the most inclusive and caring company in the world, by providing equitable opportunities to everyone, everywhere, and ensuring all employees feel uniquely valued and safe to contribute their best. We mirror the diversity of the communities in which we operate, and ‘inclusion’ is one of our core values. We believe our differences make us stronger as a company and as individuals and we are committed to championing inclusivity in everything we do.*
*At Schneider Electric, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and compliance, and we believe that trust is a foundational value. Our Trust Charter is our Code of Conduct and demonstrates our commitment to ethics, safety, sustainability, quality and cybersecurity, underpinning every aspect of our business and our willingness to behave and respond respectfully and in good faith to all our stakeholders. You can find out more about our Trust Charter here*
*Schneider Electric is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is our policy to provide equal employment and advancement opportunities in the areas of recruiting, hiring, training, transferring, and promoting all qualified individuals regardless of race, religion, color, gender, disability, national origin, ancestry, age, military status, sexual orientation, marital status, or any other legally protected characteristic or conduct.*

title: Management Consultant within Tech Transformation at Knowit Ascend
description:
**Knowit Ascend is growing** 
 and we are looking for leaders with a passion for
 **tech transformation** 
 . If you are passionate about creating client value through tech transformation, working in teams, developing organizations and always strive to improve – then you are the kind of talent that we need!
   

  

**What do we mean by Tech Transformation?**
 For us, tech transformation is about more than implementing new tools - it’s about using technology as a catalyst for growth and long-term value creation. By combining expertise in areas such as
 **technology strategy and governance** 
 ,
 **data strategy** 
 ,
 **cloud transformation** 
 , and
 **technology cost optimization,** 
 we help organizations turn ambition into action. The outcome is measurable impact today and a foundation for lasting competitive advantage tomorrow.
   

  

 Ultimately, tech transformation is about sustainable impact. By turning technology from a cost centre into a value driver, we align digital investments with strategy, optimize processes, and empower businesses to realize their full potential—turning today’s challenges into tomorrow’s opportunities.
   

  

**Desired Skills And Experience**
 We believe you have experience in driving or contributing to transformation projects and understand what it takes to lead change through technology. You know how to create sustainable change and deliver real impact over time, and you bring functional expertise in areas such as:
   

  

* Formulating cloud strategies and leading transformation journeys with a clear focus on value realization
* Driving decision intelligence initiatives to strengthen business insight
* Shaping organizational development, including designing and rolling out new operating models within business technology organizations
* Leading transformation initiatives that focus on long-term value realization and business impact
* Other engagements focusing on value realisation within a business technology organization


 We are looking for people who:
   

  

* Have 4 - 10 years of experience in management consulting or a similar setting
* with a strong drive for sales and business development, combined with hands-on experience and solid commercial skills
* Want to grow within the tech transformation area and develop our offering
* Bring an inclusive mindset and excellent leadership skills
* Believe in fun as a competitive advantage
* Have the tools and passion to support clients on their transformation journey
* Thrive in an entrepreneurial setting and develop Knowit Ascend
* Are fluent in Swedish and English and live in the Stockholm region


**Who are we?**
 As a team of management consultants, we focus on business transformation & analysis. We combine strategic, operational, and analytical experience with the ability to translate strategy into hands-on results that are achieved together with our clients.
   

  

 Knowit Ascend is part of the Knowit Group, with approximately 60 management consultants based in Stockholm. As a close-knit team within a larger ecosystem, we combine the agility of a small firm with the strength and resources of a larger organization, enabling us to effectively meet our clients' evolving needs. We are a non-hierarchical organization and aim to have a tightly knit team of exceptional people with different backgrounds and expertise – people who work together and genuinely enjoy doing so.
   

  

**Learn more about our offerings here:** 
 https://www.knowit.se/vart-erbjudande/management-consulting/
   

  

 If you want to be part of a company that lives by its values –
 *fun, inclusive & exceptional* 
 – get in touch!

title: Social Media Project Manager
description:
**Job Description**
**Account Manager**
**McCann Nordics**
 Location: Stockholm
   

  

**About McCann Nordics**
 McCann Nordics is more than an advertising agency. We’re the Nordic arm of a global creative network, known for shaping culture and delivering measurable business impact for some of the world’s most ambitious and innovative brands.
   

  

 We’re now looking for a Account Manager with solid proven experience of working with social-first campaigns to join our Nordic team in Stockholm.
   

  

**The Role**
 You’ll work with major global brands across multiple categories, managing both conceptual work and large-scale adaptations across the Nordic region. This role requires a a real can-do attitude, able to work quickly while maintaining excellent attention to detail. While core competencies are crucial, we're looking for that special something extra. An agile go-getter who can manage multiple workstreams – many of them with a strong focus on social - simultaneously to meet diverse client needs is essential.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* Proven experience as an Account or Project Manager, including solid experience of social-first campaign work that ensures a deep understanding of managing creative work processes and production for various social channels
* Experience working with global clients is essential. Fintech experience would be advantageous
* Exceptional people and organizational skills to manage complexity across a range of projects running in parallel, also under pressure
* Experience and ability to manage and deliver complex projects across diverse platforms and integrated channels.
* Great attention to detail while maintaining a helicopter view
* Confidence to speak up and maintain open and honest lines of communication with the team
* Fluent in Swedish and English (spoken and written); other Nordic languages are a plus
* Agile and pragmatic, yet structured and calm under pressure


**What You’ll Do**
* Managing project delivery, including client presentations, managing all deliverables aligned with the agreed timeline, resourcing, finance reports, and final output of deliverables
* Develop and deliver project plans, ensuring client requirements are met and that the creative work is of the highest standard
* Populating regular status reports and circulating regularly
* Ensure all creative work is signed off, proofread, and all mandatory requirements have been included before leaving the agency
* Support senior team members with all day-to-day aspects of the project
* Keep the team well-informed about relevant project and client information, to facilitate informed decision-making
* Collaborate with senior leadership, creatives, strategists and production teams to ensure seamless project delivery and high-quality results
* Build effective working relationships with colleagues and all key departments, ensuring they are updated, and work is in line with client requirements
* Coordinate with internal and external partners to source resources, tools, and materials needed to execute campaigns successfully


**What’s In It For You**
* Growth & Impact: Play a key role in the continued expansion of McCann’s Nordic operations
* Global Collaboration: Work alongside top-tier talent locally and across our international network
* Competitive Package: Attractive salary and benefits
* Flexible Working: A hybrid work model that supports work–life balance

title: Backend Engineer - Gaming
description:
**Description**
*Position at LeoVegas Group*
**About The Role**
 Join our dynamic Gaming Team, comprising skilled BE Engineers and QA experts dedicated to developing and maintaining our cutting-edge Gaming Engine. As a Backend Engineer, you'll play a pivotal role in utilising the latest technologies to craft cloud-based, distributed, scalable, and fault-tolerant microservices capable of handling a staggering volume of gaming transactions—approximately 1.3 billion per month. Collaborating closely with stakeholders, including the Regulatory Reporting Team and game operations teams, you'll spearhead innovative projects such as LeoJackpot while ensuring seamless API integrations and optimising performance for an unparalleled gaming experience. This role is perfect for software craftsmen who thrive in an environment of continual learning, value effective communication, and are eager to push the boundaries of technology within the gaming industry.
   

  

 YOU WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR:
   

  

* Developing and maintaining microservices using Java, Spring, and JPA
* Integrating new gaming providers into the platform via API integration
* Optimising performance and scalability of backend systems
* Collaborating with frontend teams to expose game data via APIs


 OUR SUCCESSFUL CANDIDATE WILL HAVE:
   

  

**Essential Skills**
* 3+ years of experience with common Java frameworks such as Spring and JPA
* Relational databases such as MySQL
* Building scalable and fault-tolerant systems, and are familiar with microservices


 NICE TO HAVES
   

  

* Experience with Elasticsearch, Kafka, Kotlin, Akka, Hazelcast, Consul, Datadog, DOCKER, Node.js
* GraphQL, Kubernetes and Google Cloud Platform


 WHO ARE WE?
   

  

 At the core of LeoVegas Group is Team Leo. Our culture is our foundation and is what enables us to innovate, build, and lead as we trailblaze our way through the igaming industry. We’re a team of over 2000 innovators, initiators, and groundbreakers working in a fast-paced and agile environment across 19 offices worldwide.
   

  

**Benefits**
* Hybrid work policy
* 4 weeks of Workation (T&C apply)
* 30 annual vacation days
* Occupational Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness contribution annually
* Parental Leave Top-Up
* Possibility to enroll in a private health care insurance for both you and your partner
* 1,500 SEK equipment allowance
* Benify - benefits portal with many offers and discounts
* We offer a relocation package with accommodation and flights.


 JOIN US!
   

  

 In our pride, we empower our teammates to find their roar and run with their wildest ideas. We don’t wait for things to happen; we pounce and make it happen!
   

  

 Would you be a good fit for the Leo Pride - give us a roar!
   

  

 \*\*As our company working language is English, we’d like to see your CV in English, please\*\*

title: Integration Solution Architect
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Integration Solution Architect på Capgemini kommer du att leda utvecklingen och implementeringen av integrationslösningar. Du använder din expertis för att driva plattformsförflyttningar och stötta olika transformationsinitiativ.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Hantering av integrationer, gärna med fokus på övergång till Azure Integration.
* Att hantera generell plattformsosäkerhet och underlätta förflyttningar mellan teknologiplattformar.
* Genomföra analyser och ta fram strategier för att framtidssäkra integrationsmetoder samt etablera Centers for Enablement.
* Stödja andra transformationer, exempelvis ERP, för att påskynda leverans.


**Din profil**
 Du är proaktiv, trygg i att driva förändring och strävar efter hög kvalitet samt har 5 års erfarenhet av liknande arbete. Du är lösningsorienterad och har ett plattformsfokuserat arbetssätt. Vi ser att du behärskar både svenska och engelska på professionell nivå.
   

  

*Du är expert inom några av följande områden, gärna flera:*
* Azure IntegrationiPaaS (t.ex. MuleSoft, Boomi, Apigee)
* Open source-integration
* Middleware (t.ex. BizTalk, Tibco, IBM)
* Meriterande: erfarenhet av andra hyperskalers integrationslösningar, t.ex. AWS och GCP, samt intresse för generativ AI.


**Vad vi tror kommer att få dig att trivas**
* En dynamisk arbetsmiljö där du får möjlighet att växa genom kontinuerligt lärande och professionella certifieringar, samarbeta med ett globalt nätverk av experter och hålla dig uppdaterad med den senaste teknologin.
* Friheten att fatta egna beslut, planera din tid och arbeta självständigt – vilket främjar kreativitet, innovation och arbetsglädje.
* Ett omfattande förmånspaket som inkluderar föräldraförmåner, tjänste- och flexpension, privat försäkring, förebyggande hälsovård och mycket mer.
* Ett brett utbud av sociala och hälsofrämjande aktiviteter – från sport och hälsoprogram till kulturella evenemang och konstinitiativ – som syftar till att förena medarbetare och berika arbetslivet.


**Ansökan**
* Vi arbetar med löpande urval så vänta inte - skicka in din ansökan redan idag. Vi ser framemot din ansökan och att du vill bli en del av vår fortsatta resa!
* Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.


**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,1 miljarder euro för 2024.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Accountant (AP & AR)
description:
**Securitas Group** 




 Securitas is a world-leading safety and security solutions partner that helps make your world a safer place. By leveraging technology in partnership with our clients, we offer a broad portfolio of value-enhancing services and solutions integrated across the security value chain – from on-site services to advanced monitoring, comprehensive risk prediction and advisory services.
 



 With around 336 000 employees in 44 markets, our innovative, holistic approach with local and global expertise makes us a trusted business partner to many of the world’s best-known companies. Benefitting from almost nine decades of deep experience and guided by our values of integrity, vigilance, and helpfulness, we create sustainable value by helping our clients optimize their operations and protect what matters most - their people and assets.
 



  





**Securitas IT** 




 Securitas IT creates capabilities and powerful technology needed to fulfil Securitas business strategy to be client centric, data driven, and people focused. We transform, build and protect our IT landscape in a cost-efficient a sufficient way. We lead a diverse and inclusive global organization.
 



  





**Our role** 




 We are looking for a proactive and detail‑oriented
 **Accountant** 
 to join our Finance team, with responsibility across both
 **Accounts Payable (AP)** 
 and
 **Accounts Receivable (AR)** 
 .
 



  





 In this role, you will manage daily transactional activities, such as invoice handling, payments, customer billing, and collections - while supporting accurate and timely month‑end reporting.
 



  





 This position is ideal for
 **someone who enjoys variety** 
 and is comfortable shifting between AP and AR depending on business needs. You will also play an important role in
 **helping us modernize our financial processes** 
 by identifying manual workflows and contributing to automation initiatives, including the use of digital tools and emerging AI capabilities.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Support with intercompany reporting.
* Manage supplier and customer invoices, credit notes, payments, and related documentation.
* Reconcile AP and AR, ensuring accuracy and resolution of discrepancies.
* Handle supplier and customer inquiries related to billing, payments, and account status.
* Support collection processes, including reminders and follow‑up on overdue balances.
* Contribute to month‑end close activities and assist with audit requests.
* Collaborate closely with colleagues to ensure accurate and timely postings.
* Identify process improvement opportunities and suggest improvements and automation opportunities.
* Assist the team with additional responsibilities and ad‑hoc projects if needed.



  





**Qualifications** 



* About
 **3–5 years of accounting experience** 
 , preferably covering both AP and AR.
* Degree in
 **Accounting, Finance, Business Administration** 
 , or equivalent.
* Solid understanding of
 **accounting principles** 
 , VAT, and general financial controls.
* Hands‑on experience with an
 **ERP/accounting systems** 
 (knowledge of Microsoft Dynamics 365 is advantageous).
* Strong
 **Excel** 
 skills.
* Interest in IT, automation, digitalization, and AI‑supported finance processes is a strong advantage.
* Fluency in
 **English** 
 . Swedish is advantageous.



**Personal Qualities** 



* Precise, structured, and dependable in day‑to‑day work.
* Able to work independently and take ownership.
* Curious and proactive, with a passion for improving and simplifying processes.
* Strong communication skills and a service‑oriented mindset when interacting with stakeholders.
* Able to stay calm and organized in a fast-paced environment.



  





**Working conditions** 




 This role is based in
 **Stockholm** 
 . It's a
 **hybrid working model** 
 with minimum 2 days per week in the office.
 



  





**What we offer** 




 At Securitas we believe in doing the right thing and doing it well. For our customers and our employees. Our employees come from all walks of life and bring with them many talents and perspectives. We aim for diverse representation throughout the company, and we are committed to equal pay, safe working conditions, gender balance and an inclusive work environment with a wide range of skills and development opportunities.
 



  





**If this sounds like the right next step in your accounting career, don't hesitate and apply!**

title: Sida söker programadministratör, ref 91/26
description:
Har du erfarenhet av att arbeta med programadministration eller ekonomiadministration och motiveras av att arbeta i en stödjande roll? Vill du arbeta på en statlig myndighet för att minska fattigdomen i världen och tillsammans med andra bidra till att genomföra de globala målen för hållbar utveckling? Då kan det här vara ett jobb för dig!
 


  

**Om jobbet** 
  


 Till vårt kontor i Rissne söker vi nu programadministratör med placering på Asienenheten. Rollen innebär administrativt arbete med fokus på att stödja enhetens handläggare med kvalitetssäkring, intern styrning och kontroll, samt ekonomiadministration kopplat till biståndsinsatser som Sida genomför via externa samarbetspartners. Du jobbar även med att följa upp enhetens löpande kostnader samt bistår med viss övrig administration kopplat till enhetens interna arbete. Rollen innebär ett tätt samarbete inom den egna enheten där du förväntas bidra i det enhetsövergripande samarbetet. Du samarbetar också med kollegor på andra avdelningar och på Sida i stort. Du kommer också att delta i Sidas globala nätverk för administratörer för gemensamt lärande och utbyten med andra administratörer som arbetar i samma funktion världen över.
 


  

**Arbetsuppgifter** 
  


 Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:
 


  

  
* Löpande ekonomiadministration såsom att granska utbetalningar till samarbetspartners och att hantera fakturor.
  
* Bistå enhetschefen med finansiell uppföljning och budget för interna kostnader.
  
* Stöd till handläggare i hantering av biståndsinsatser i Sidas olika IT-system (t.ex. insatshanteringssystem och dokument, ekonomi- och faktureringssystem
  
* Stöd till handläggare i samband vid upphandlingar och avrop från ramavtal
  
* Tillsammans med controller kvalitetssäkra stöd till samarbetspartners
  
* Delta i avdelningsövergripande arbete kring intern styrning och kontroll
  
* Stöd vid intern och extern kommunikation, inklusive att hantera inkomna mail från allmänheten samt administrera enhetens/avdelningens samarbetsyta på Sidas intranät.
  
* Stöd vid introduktion av nya medarbetare på enheten/avdelningen t.ex. hantera IT-ärenden, samt allmänna administrativa och koordinerande uppgifter.
  
* Stöd vid planering och anordnande av planeringsdagar och seminarier
  
* Skriva protokoll på möten, utföra arkivering
  
* Bistå enhetschefen med arbetsuppgifter kopplat till personaladministration och bidra till övriga administrativa och koordinerande uppgifter som kan förekomma på enheten/avdelningen.
  


  

**Vi erbjuder** 
  


 Vi erbjuder en arbetsplats med goda möjligheter till utveckling och en arbetsmiljö präglad av öppenhet och mångfald. Du arbetar utifrån tydligt mandat och ansvarsområde präglat av tillit mellan dig, din chef och dina kollegor.
 


  


 Som anställd på Sida arbetar du med världen som arbetsplats, med Agenda 2030 och den statliga värdegrunden som vägvisare. För att kunna svara mot de utmaningar världen står inför idag och framöver behöver vi människor med olika bakgrund och färdigheter.
 


  

**Kvalifikationskrav** 
  

*Utbildning* 
  

  
* Gymnasieexamen, gärna inom relevant område, t ex administration och/eller ekonomi eller motsvarande
  


  

*Språk* 
  

  
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska
  


  

*Arbetslivserfarenhet och kunskaper* 
  

  
* God dokumenterad erfarenhet av självständigt administrativt arbete
  
* God dokumenterad praktisk erfarenhet av redovisning och/eller ekonomisk uppföljning
  
* God dokumenterad praktisk erfarenhet av ekonomi-, redovisnings-, elektronisk fakturahanterings och dokument- och ärendehanteringssystem
  
* God erfarenhet av digitala arbetsverktyg och system så som outlook och officepaketet (inklusive excel). Gärna erfarenhet av Sharepoint.
  


  

*Funktionella kompetenser/förmågor:* 
  


 Vi söker dig som har ett genuint intresse av att långsiktigt arbeta i en administrativ roll på Sida.
 


  


 För rollen är det viktigt med en mycket god förmåga att organisera, dokumentera och följa upp det egna arbetet. Att kunna arbeta noggrant och strukturerat mot uppsatta mål och givna tidsramar är avgörande för att lyckas i rollen.Vidare är du serviceminded och tycker om att ge stöd till andra. Att ha en god kommunikativ och pedagogisk förmåga är också viktigt i rollen som innebär mycket kontakter och samarbeten inom och utanför enheten.
   




  


 För den här rollen behöver du:
 


  

  
* Kunna leda dig själv och ansvara för din egen utveckling
  
* Ta initiativ och vara drivande
  
* Ha förmåga att hantera stress, osäkerhet och risker
  
* Kunna samarbeta i en interkulturell kontext och i olika konstellationer
  
* Vara bra på att samarbeta och skapa tillitsfulla relationer
  
* Kunna hantera motstånd, vara flexibel och lösningsfokuserad
  
* Ha förmåga att föra dialog och skapa samsyn
  
* Kunna omsätta erfarenheter och lärdomar till handling
  


  

**För denna roll är det meriterande om du** 
  

  
* Erfarenhet av att ha arbetat i en administrativ roll på svensk myndighet eller inom internationellt utvecklingssamarbete
  


  

**Bra att veta** 
  


 Befattningen avser en tillsvidareanställning med tillträde i augusti 2026. Provanställning tillämpas.
 


  


 Sida erbjuder möjlighet till distansarbete i viss utsträckning om det fungerar för verksamheten.
 


  


 Vid kontakt vänligen ange ref.nr 91/26
 


  



 Ytterligare upplysningar om befattningens innehåll lämnas av Åsa Hedén 08-698 50 90
 



  



 Eventuella frågor om villkor och andra fackliga frågor ställs till
 

 f
 
 ackliga företrädare vid Sida för Saco : saco-sida-styrelsen@sida.se och ST
 

 : st@sida.se
 


  


 I Sidas rekryteringsprocess används urvalsfrågor som ett verktyg för att göra ett första urval. Var därför noga med dina svar så att de speglar din kompetens och erfarenhet på ett korrekt sätt. Läs mer om Sidas rekryteringsprocess
 


  


 Sida är en statlig myndighet. Det innebär att uppgifter och ansökningshandlingar som du lämnar till oss kan komma att lämnas ut enligt offentlighetsprincipen om någon begär ut dem. Normalt gäller ingen sekretess för de uppgifter som behandlas i databasen. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ska du kontakta den kontaktperson som finns angiven i annonsen per telefon.
 


  


 Obs! Sida kommunicerar med sökande främst genom vårt rekryteringssystem ReachMee. Beroende på vilken e-postklient du använder kan mejl som skickas från ReachMee fastna i spamfiltret, så vi uppmanar kandidater att hålla koll på detta.
 


  

**Om Sida** 
  


 Sida – Styrelsen för internationellt utvecklingssamarbete - är en förvaltningsmyndighet som arbetar på regeringens och riksdagens uppdrag för att skapa förutsättningar för bättre levnadsvillkor för människor som lever i fattigdom och förtryck. Vårt arbete ska bidra till att nå riksdagens mål och regeringens inriktning för svenskt bistånd.
 


  


 Vi har över 800 anställda fördelade mellan två kontor i Sverige och på svenska ambassader i våra samarbetsländer. Läs mer om Sidas anställningsförmåner och Sidas mångfaldsarbete.
 


  


*Olika erfarenheter, bakgrunder och perspektiv är grunden för en arbetsplats fri från diskriminering, där alla trivs och gör sitt bästa. Vi tror på mångfald och dess positiva inverkan på vår verksamhet och välkomnar sökande med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter.*

title: COMMUNICATOR & DIGITAL MARKETER
description:
We have invented a solar cell technology that enables endless energy, Powerfoyle. Not only will it change the world, but it also means you will work with leading technology, science, and machines – all under the same roof in our urban factories. We are passionate about the potential of our technology to make products better and easier to use. We build the next generation of clean green industry and unite in the vision of touching the lives of a billion people.
 



  





 WHO WE ARE
 



 We are on an exciting journey to bring our groundbreaking solar cell technology to the world. A novel technology means that most of what we do has never been done before. It’s challenging to create something new, and at Exeger we embrace that challenge with grit and passion, because we know that what we do matters.
 



  





 YOU WILL DO
 



 You will join the Marketing & Communications function within our Go To Market organization, responsible for driving clear, engaging and consistent communication that strengthens our brand, supports business growth, and keeps the organization aligned. Hands on, you will work with storytelling, digital marketing, content creation, internal communications and campaign activation.
 



 In this role, you will lead Exeger’s communication and digital marketing, both externally and internally, with the overall goal of strengthening our brand and supporting business growth across all stakeholder groups. You will be responsible for planning and optimizing digital marketing activities, including campaigns, and will drive initiatives from strategic planning through execution and continuous optimization. The role also includes owning and developing our website and social media channels, while creating targeted and engaging content that builds clarity and drives engagement. To succeed, you will collaborate closely with internal and external stakeholders and manage agency partners to ensure consistent, effective communication with measurable impact.
 



  





 WHO ARE WE LOOKING FOR?
 



 We are looking for a experienced communicator and digital marketer with a strong sense of ownership and a hands-on mindset. You combine strategic thinking with execution and know how to create communication that drives results.
 



 You:
 



 – Have 5+ years of relevant experience (in-house or agency)
 



 – Are a strong writer able to adapt messaging to different audiences while ensuring consistency across all touchpoints
 



 – Are comfortable using AI tools to enhance workflows and improve efficiency and quality
 



 – Are hands‑on in creating content, producing high‑quality copy, visuals and digital assets that bring our message to life across channels
 



 – Have experience running and optimizing paid campaigns
 



 – Are collaborative and confident working with stakeholders and agencies
 



 – Bring a proactive, can‑do mindset, unafraid to roll up your sleeves, experiment, and drive real impact
 



  





 EXEGERIANS
 



 At Exeger we are many things, innovators and industrialists, visionaries and doers. By combining different perspectives and skills, we push the boundaries of science and technology while always focusing on the common goal and vision. Our behavior expectations support and boost the Employeeship which is all about acting curious, determined, responsible and being yourself.
 



  





 WHAT NOW
 



 Please send your application via Exeger’s career page. When you have applied, an automized confirmation e-mail will be sent to you. The hiring team will then review all applicants and if selected to the next step, you will be invited for interviews together with hiring manager and/or team. Cases or scenarios might be used during the process. Reference- and background check is mandatory.
 



  





 EXEGER & POWERFOYLE
 



 Exeger is a Swedish company with a unique solar cell technology that converts all forms of light into electrical energy. This material, Powerfoyle, is the world’s only fully customizable solar cell. With its superior design properties, it can be integrated seamlessly into any electronic device. Powerfoyle enhances every product it is integrated into with extended or even unlimited battery life, putting the power of cutting-edge solar cell technology directly in the hands of people. Exeger is leading the way to energy independence through more sustainable and user-friendly products.

title: SAP S4HANA EAM Plant Maintenance (PM)
description:
SAP S4HANA EAM Plant Maintenance (PM)
 



  





 Role Description:
 



 The Functional Consultant SAP configures, implements, maintains and upgrades functional business area Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) application modules (e.g., Human Resources, Finance, Supply Chain Management) and Client Relationship Management (CRM) application modules (e.g., Sales, Marketing).
 



 The Functional Consultant SAP communicates with a company's representatives to develop a business model incorporating SAP products
 



 Communicates with Technical Consultants SAP on program components Creates models, diagrams and charts to assist application
 



  





 IT Role Experience
 



 Supervision Level of Control and Responsibility Regular Projects
 



 SAP S4HANA EAM Expertise
 



 Experience in SAP EAM Plant Maintenance (PM) within S4HANA, ideally with prior involvement in ECC to S4HANA migration projects.
 



  





 Skills Skills

 Proven experience in S4HANA implementations migrations.
 



 Solid understanding and practical experience with SAP Fiori applications.
 



 Process understanding of standard processes in SAP PM S4 HANA

title: Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
   

  

**Make it real with Cloud Infrastructure Services (CIS) at Capgemini.**
 At CIS, we enable organizations to transform and thrive in a digital-first world. Our teams deliver end-to-end solutions across cloud, cybersecurity, automation, and user experience – helping clients modernize their infrastructure and unlock innovation at scale.
   

  

**Your role**
 We are looking for an experienced
 **Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead** 
 who will play a key role in large-scale enterprise transformation and cloud migration initiatives. This role is critical in shaping successful migration programs by creating clarity, structure, and direction at the very start of the journey.
   

  

 As Migration Discovery & Assessment Lead, you will be responsible for understanding complex enterprise IT landscapes, translating data into insights, and turning those insights into clear, executable migration roadmaps that align technology with business goals.
   

  

**You will:**
* Lead discovery and assessment activities for large enterprise environments, covering applications, infrastructure, platforms, and dependencies
* Collect, structure, and analyze large volumes of data from multiple sources such as CMDBs, discovery tools, workshops, and interviews
* Assess on premises and cloud environments and define target-state migration strategies
* Design and present migration roadmaps, including migration waves, dependencies, risks, recommended migration approaches, and associated cost and TCO considerations
* Translate technical findings into clear, decision-ready proposals, including TCO analysis and migration business cases, for architects, IT leadership, and business stakeholders
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, helping them understand what to migrate, how to migrate, and in which order
* Collaborate with architects, engineers, and business representatives to ensure alignment between technical feasibility, financial viability, and business priorities


**Your profile**
 We are looking for someone who combines strong analytical skills, broad technical knowledge, and excellent communication abilities.
   

  

**You also have:**
* Proven experience leading discovery and assessment phases in enterprise migration projects
* Strong background in on premises infrastructure (data centers, servers, networks, storage, virtualization, operating systems)
* Solid experience with public cloud platforms (Azure, AWS and/or GCP) and cloud migration concepts
* Hands-on experience with one or more migration and discovery tools, such as Azure Migrate, AWS Application Discovery Service, AWS Application Migration Service (MGN), Cast Highlight, Cast Imaging, Cloudamize, and Txture
* Ability to work with complex data sets and transform them into structured insights and actionable recommendations
* Full working proficiency in both Swedish and English


**What We Believe You Will Enjoy About Working Here**
* A challenging career in a vibrant environment with access to extensive training, a global network of experts, and an innovative culture that promotes learning, growth, and shared success
* Work on large, business-critical transformation programs, helping organizations modernize their IT landscapes and move confidently toward the future
* A company culture driven by core values: Honesty, Trust, Freedom, Team Spirit, Modesty, Fun, and Boldness
* A strong commitment to inclusion, diversity, and supporting the whole person


**Ready to make it real? Explore opportunities with CIS and shape the future of digital infrastructure.**
*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.*
 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
   

  

 Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Lead Engagement Manager SMB
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human.
