title: Cyber Security Architect
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma framtidens IT-säkerhet i en av Sveriges ledande bankkoncerner? Som Cyber Security Architect inom LF Bank blir du en samhällsviktig spelare som säkerställer att banken har en trygg IT-miljö för både kunder och kollegor*
***Om rollen***
 Som Cyber Security Architect ansvarar du för att utveckla och genomföra bankens målarkitektur inom IT-säkerhet. Du blir en del av ett kompetent och engagerat team som värdesätter samarbete, utveckling och säkerhet. Du samarbetar brett inom banken och koncernen, förhindrar säkerhetsincidenter och implementerar effektiva styrmodeller. Du tar fram och inför styrande dokument, processer och rutiner tillsammans med kollegor inom informationssäkerhet och IT.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Ge arkitekturstöd och leda operativt arbete inom säkerhet
* Dokumentera och implementera riktlinjer, processer och ramverk
* Identifiera och hantera säkerhetsrisker i projekt och system
* Ge tekniskt stöd och rådgivning kring säkerhetslösningar
* Delta i samarbeten och utbildningar för att stärka säkerhetskulturen
* Omvärldsbevaka och föreslå förbättringar inom IT-säkerhet


*Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:*
* Gedigen erfarenhet av IT-säkerhet i komplexa miljöer
* Erfarenhet som arkitekt eller i senior teknisk roll
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar och säkerhetsarkitektur i molnet
* God teknisk förståelse inom IT-infrastruktur och utveckling
* Erfarenhet av agil metodik och CI/CD
* Certifiering inom arkitektur (t.ex. SABSA, TOGAF)
* Kännedom om bankregelverk (DORA, GDPR, PCI-DSS)


*Personliga egenskaper*
 Som person är du en analytisk lagspelare med starkt driv och passion för IT-säkerhet, där ”Security by Design” är en självklarhet. Du är självgående, strukturerad och lösningsfokuserad, med en tydlig förmåga att arbeta målinriktat. Din kommunikativa förmåga gör att du enkelt etablerar och underhåller ett brett kontaktnät i komplexa organisationer, och du bidrar till en positiv och trivsam arbetsmiljö.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: jonny.knutas@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: christina.berg@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Länsförsäkringar Bank är en av Sveriges största och mest omtyckta banker, med ett brett utbud av tjänster inom betalningar, sparande, bolån och fonder. I arbetet mot vår vision "Tillsammans skapar vi trygghet och möjligheter" hoppas vi att du vill bidra med ditt engagemang och nyfikenhet för effektivisering, AI samt omvärldsspaning av moderna verktyg och metoder för att driva vår utveckling framåt.

title: Solution Sales Specialist – Compliance & Risk
description:
*UC är en av Sveriges ledande leverantörer av kredit- och affärsinformation och har sedan 1977 hjälpt företag att fatta välgrundade beslut genom datadriven insikt. Som en del av Enento Group, en nordisk koncern inom data, analys och compliance, kombinerar UC omfattande datatillgångar med avancerade lösningar inom bland annat KYC, AML och ägarstrukturdata. Genom att omvandla data till värdefull kunskap bidrar de till att skapa transparens och tillit mellan människor, företag och samhälle. UC:s tjänster används brett inom finansiella, kommersiella och strategiska beslutsprocesser av kunder i en rad olika branscher.* 




  





**Om rollen** 




 Som en del av en större strategisk satsning rekryterar UC nu en Solution Sales Specialist
 
 Specialist, en nyetablerad nyckelroll där rätt kandidat ges stort mandat att driva försäljningen av UC:s complianceerbjudande. Det här är en specialistroll i skärningspunkten mellan komplex B2B-försäljning, data och regulatorisk förståelse. Du ansvarar för att driva affärer inom UC:s växande erbjudande kopplat till compliance och riskdata. Det innebär att sälja lösningar inom KYC, AML, ägar- och koncernstrukturer samt finansiell bolagsdata, ofta integrerat direkt i kundens processer via API:er och dataplattformar. Du säljer alltså inte en produkt, utan ett förändrat arbetssätt.
 



  





 I rollen kommer du att:
 



  




* Driva försäljning mot bolag med behov inom AML, KYC och riskhantering.
* Sälja datadrivna lösningar inom ägarstruktur, UBO, screening och bolagsinformation
* Bygga och utveckla en pipeline i längre och mer komplexa affärer
* Arbeta konsultativt med kundens processer och identifiera affärsnytta
* Agera brygga mellan kund, sälj och produkt i lösningsorienterade affärer



  





 Det här är en nyckelroll i en strategisk satsning där UC breddar sin position inom compliance, risk och datadrivna beslutsstöd. Du får stort mandat, hög synlighet och möjlighet att vara med och forma hur erbjudandet säljs framåt.
 



  





**Bakgrund** 




 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet från miljöer där försäljning möter regelverk och data. Du är van att driva komplexa affärer där värdet behöver förankras över tid. Vidare har du erfarenhet av eller arbetat nära områden som AML, KYC eller annan Financial Crime Prevention och förstår de utmaningar kunder står inför i sitt arbete med regelefterlevnad. Rätt person kan föra trovärdiga dialoger kring hur processer kan effektiviseras, risk minskas och hur datadrivna lösningar skapar affärsnytta och är bekväm i längre säljcykler som kräver struktur, uthållighet och affärsmässighet. Du behöver inte vara en djup AML-expert, men du har tillräcklig förståelse för regulatoriska krav och kundernas verklighet för att kunna föra trovärdiga dialoger.
 



  





*I denna rekrytering samarbetar UC med Blaq. Vid frågor är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig rekryteringskonsult, Henrik Flood, på* 
***henrik.flood@blaq.se***
*. Urval och intervjuer sker löpande.*

title: Systemarkitekt till team Automatlarm
description:
På SOS Alarm får du en unik möjlighet att göra skillnad – varje dag, både för individ och samhälle. I en värld där trygghet inte kan tas för given, står vi alltid redo, dygnet runt, året om. Vi är en oberoende första kontakt i Sveriges trygghetskedja, den första kontakten i kritiska ögonblick, och vi samarbetar tätt med samhällets hjälpresurser för att skydda liv, egendom och miljö. Vi erbjuder dig inte bara en trygg och stabil arbetsplats med kollektivavtal och förmånliga anställningsvillkor, utan också en stark kultur präglad av engagemang, gemenskap och vilja att göra skillnad. Hos oss får du utvecklas i en arbetsmiljö som främjar balans och långsiktig utveckling, utan att kompromissa med din hälsa. Du blir en del av ett dedikerat företag som varje dag arbetar för ett säkrare Sverige. Här är varje arbetsdag meningsfull, och ditt arbete kan vara skillnaden som räddar liv. Vill du vara med?
   

  

**Din vardag som Systemarkitekt**
 I vårt Produktteam Automatlarm arbetar vi med den tekniska plattformen för mottagning av automatiska larm, alltifrån brandlarm till trygghetslarm och personlarm, in till vår larmcentral. Det hjälper oss att tillsammans rädda liv dygnet runt, året om och göra Sverige tryggare för alla.
   

  

 Som Systemarkitekt hos oss tillhör du vårt agila Automatlarmsteam där du ansvarar för våra mjukvarulösningar. Utifrån ställda krav och riktlinjer tar du fram systemdesign och har en teknikledande roll i teamet kring systemövergripande frågor i det dagliga arbetet. Det involverar även förståelse för, och kontakter med omkringliggande system och team. Du säkerställer att vi gör kloka val kring systemens uppbyggnad och drivs av att vilja leverera värde för våra användare, samtidigt som du väger in andra faktorer såsom förvaltningsbarhet och säkerhet. Utifrån behov och möjlighet är du också en senior utvecklarresurs (med tyngdpunkt på backend) i teamet.
   

  

 Våra system byggs primärt i .NET/C# (backend) och Angular (Frontend/webb). Vi arbetar i Microsoftmiljöer, primärt med onpremlösningar men även Azure förekommer. Då larmhantering handlar mycket om datakommunikation (ofta även med tal) är det också en viktig grundkompetens. Arbetsmetodiken är scrum med Jira som planeringsverktyg. En fast del av utvecklingsteamets arbetstid är avsatt till egen kompetensutveckling och innovation med särskilt inplanerade dagar för detta i slutet av varje sprint.
   

  

**Mer om dig**
 Som person är du driven, målinriktad, gillar att samarbeta och sprida kunskaper till andra och du har en förmåga att förklara lösningar och få alla i teamet att jobba mot samma mål. Du har en bakgrund inom utveckling och har haft någon form av teknikledningsansvar tidigare. Du tar egna initiativ i såväl det dagliga arbetet som i din personliga utveckling. Dina kunskaper i svenska är goda och du har svenskt medborgarskap.
   

  

**Kompetensmässigt söker vi dig som har:**
* Relevant utbildning med en ingenjörsexamen eller jämförbara färdigheter
* Minst 5 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet
* Windows 10/11 och Windows server - Windowstjänster, logghantering, processer - mycket goda kunskaper
* Fullstack: Mycket goda kunskaper i C#/.Net och erfarenhet av Frontendutveckling
* Erfarenhet av Systemdesign
* Erfarenhet av datakommunikation i någon form, telekomerfarenhet är en merit
* Erfarenhet av Azure är meriterande men inte ett krav


**Andra tekniker och verktyg hos oss inkluderar:**
* Git
* AzureDevOps
* Jira


 Hos oss blir du en del av en kultur där värderingarna är mer än bara ord – de präglar hur vi agerar varje dag.
 **Vi tar ansvar** 
 ,
 **vi är** 
**professionella** 
 ,
 **vi visar omtanke** 
 och
 **vi samarbetar** 
 . Vi söker dig som delar dessa värderingar och vill vara en del av ett sammanhang där vi utvecklas tillsammans och skapar trygghet i samhället. Hos oss gör du inte bara ett jobb – du bidrar till ett tryggare Sverige för alla, varje dag.
   

  

**Låter detta intressant?** 
 Skicka in din ansökan snarast då vi arbetar löpande med urval
 *.*
 Du är välkommen att börja hos oss omgående med hänsyn till eventuell uppsägningstid. Har du frågor eller funderingar kan du kontakta oss på elin.axelsson@sosalarm.se. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via e-post.
   

  

 Samtal från externa rekryteringsföretag och säljare undanbedes.
   

  

*SOS Alarm genomför bakgrundskontroll och säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll på sin personal enligt kraven ur säkerhetsskyddslag (2018:585). Även en kontroll enligt Lag (1974:191) om bevakningsföretag utförs och är aktiv under anställningsperioden. Drogtest utan anmärkning är en förutsättning för anställning. Tjänsten innebär även krigsplacering vid SOS Alarm.*

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
**Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to team up with the most dedicated team of developers in our Engineering Team.**
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we employ around 350 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for a Senior Backend Engineer who wants to make a difference in our Truesec Engineering Team.
   

  

**Truesec Technology Organization**
 This technology business unit at Truesec brings together highly skilled engineers, architects, platform specialists and IT specialist with a mission to develop, operate, and continuously improve our unified Truesec Platform and technical capabilities. The Engineering Team drives the adoption of AI, automation, and advanced technology across all business units, ensuring we deliver best-in-class cybersecurity solutions to our clients and maintain a robust, scalable, and secure technology stack.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Senior Backend Engineer, you will be integral to the Truesec engineering team, responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining the backend infrastructure of our internal tools and platform. You will create scalable and secure backend solutions that meet performance requirements while collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration with frontend components. Your role involves optimizing performance, documenting technical specifications, and mentoring other team members.
   

  

**Your Potential Background**
* Experience: Extensive experience in a similar role.
* Technical Skills: Proficient in Python and C#, with strong knowledge of object-oriented programming. Experience with relational (SQL) and NoSQL databases, API development, and backend frameworks such as ASP .Net Core.
* Cloud Proficiency: Familiarity with Azure services, including Azure App Services, Functions, and SQL Database.
* Version Control: Skilled in using Git for version control, including branching and merging.
* Agile Methodologies: Experience working in Agile teams and facilitating agile ceremonies.


**Required Skills:**
* Strong understanding of database management, including design and query optimization.
* Experience in designing and securing RESTful APIs, including authentication mechanisms (e.g., JWT, OAuth).
* Proficiency in testing frameworks (e.g., xUnit) and debugging tools.
* Ability to create clean, maintainable code while adhering to best practices and coding standards.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a focus on performance optimization and security best practices.


**Bonus Skills:**
* Experience with API documentation and creating architecture diagrams.
* Knowledge of security principles and practices, including data encryption and protection against common threats.
* Ability to facilitate team meetings and agile ceremonies effectively.
* A proactive attitude towards continuous learning and sharing knowledge with team members.
* Experience with AI and automation in business-critical environments


***Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.***
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Senior Backend Engineer - Synthetic Monitoring | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

**This is a remote opportunity and we would be interested in applicants in Sweden.**
**Senior Backend Engineer - Synthetic Monitoring**
**The Opportunity**
 We are the team behind Grafana k6, Grafana Cloud k6, and Grafana Cloud Synthetics, used by teams globally to ensure resilient, high-performing systems. This opportunity is with the synthetics squad, who build and operate our monitoring product: a multi-tenant distributed system implemented in Go and running on Kubernetes across all major Cloud service providers (GCP, Azure, AWS), running billions of synthetic tests each month.
   

  

 Senior Software Engineers at Grafana have a large amount of experience across multiple areas. They are able to estimate, plan, coordinate and deliver large tasks spanning multiple systems. They actively coach and mentor other team members in their team and are able to identify and resolve issues with technology and product processes.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
 We define senior roles via the scope of their business impact more than via their expertise or their specific activities. The most important thing we are looking for in an engineer is the ability to take ownership. You will need to drive technical implementations working across engineering teams and departments, contribute to business conversations, and help shape the long-term strategy. You’ll bring your passion for observability and software engineering expertise to help us take synthetic monitoring capabilities within Grafana Cloud to the next level. This will include working across products including Synthetics, Frontend Observability, Grafana k6, and Grafana Cloud k6.
   

  

* Design and implement high-quality, scalable services to be consumed by multiple Grafana Cloud products.
* Work with product teams, in addition to design and docs, to develop features that align with wider product strategy and customer needs
* Support the technical direction and vision of the team, contributing to strategic discussions and future development of observability solutions
* When necessary, represent Grafana Labs in open source forums, working groups, and events
* Work with other departments including Sales, Product, and Support teams to deliver a holistic product experience
* Be a part of your team’s follow-the-sun on-call rotations and take ownership of the services you’re running
* Embrace our open-source culture and contribute to other projects that may not directly fall within your team’s scope


 As we are remote-first and our engineering organization is entirely remote, we provide guidance and meet regularly using video calls, so an independent attitude, good communication skills, and transparency are a must.
   

  

**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* Strong 8+ years of experience with at least one programming language. We use Go, but do not require candidates with Go experience. Long term experience in any major language (Python, .NET, Java, Rust, etc) with a willingness to learn Go is acceptable.
* Demonstrated experience working with and monitoring Kubernetes in a production environment
* Experience with cloud-based software development and production systems
* Experience writing clean, maintainable, robust, and performant software
* Familiarity with observability tooling (e.g. Grafana, Prometheus, Loki, OpenTelemetry)
* Experience with delivering projects from start to finish in a self-driven manner
* Experience in a hands-on technical leadership role, setting technical direction and leading project teams
* Experience with distributed systems
* Excellent problem-solving and debugging skills
* Strong mentoring and leadership skills
* Experience participating in an on-call rotation and incident management


**Bonus Points For**
* Experience designing and building observability backends for various systems and applications
* Experience contributing to or maintaining open source projects, with evidence of successful pull requests and community collaboration
* In-depth knowledge cloud platform internals
* Strong understanding of metrics collection, visualization, and alerting concepts


**Compensation & Rewards**
 In Sweden, the Base compensation range for this role is SEK 775,444 - SEK 930,533. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.
   

  

* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Senior SharePoint specialist
description:
*Vill du arbeta med hela bredden av Microsofts moderna arbetsplatsplattform och samtidigt ha djup teknisk spets inom SharePoint? På Advania bygger vi digitala lösningar som gör verklig skillnad i hur organisationer samarbetar, hanterar information och driver sina verksamheter framåt.*
**Det här gör du hos oss** 
 Du blir en nyckelspelare i vårt Content & Collaboration team, där du tillsammans med erfarna arkitekter och konsulter arbetar från lösningsdesign till implementation och förvaltning. SharePoint är kärnan i rollen, och i uppdragen rör du dig naturligt i Microsoft 365 ekosystemet utifrån kundens behov.
   

  

 Du bidrar med tekniskt djup och hands on kompetens som gör att lösningarna fungerar i kundens vardag.
   

  

**Exempel På Arbetsuppgifter**
* Konfiguration, implementation och förvaltning av SharePoint Online och SharePoint On Premise, från klassiska farmmiljöer till modern Microsoft 365 tenant
* Migrering och modernisering mot molnet med verktyg som ShareGate och Azure Migration Services
* Automatisering och flödesoptimering med PowerShell, Power Automate och Logic Apps
* Copilot förberedelse och governance genom att strukturera och kvalitetssäkra innehåll så att Microsoft 365 Copilot kan leverera rätt svar till rätt person
* Lösningar inom Microsoft 365, exempelvis SharePoint, Teams, Viva Engage, Viva Connections, Syntex och Purview
* Informationsarkitektur, metadata strategi och DLP policys för säker och sökbar innehållshantering
* Intranät, dokumenthantering och ärendehantering byggt på modern SharePoint och Microsoft Lists
* Samarbete i leveransteam med arkitekter, systemutvecklare, integrationsutvecklare och Azure specialister
* Dialog med förvaltningsledare, projektledare och kundansvariga, där du översätter verksamhetsbehov till hållbara Microsoft lösningar


****Konsultmässighet i praktiken****
 I den här rollen är du konsult nära kund. Det innebär att du:
   

  

* Skapar förtroende genom tydlig kommunikation och struktur i arbetet
* Sätter dig in i kundens behov och sammanhang, både tekniskt och verksamhetsnära
* Omsätter behov till rekommendationer, lösningsförslag och konkreta nästa steg
* Tar ansvar för leverans, kvalitet och att lösningen skapar värde efter införande


**Självledarskap på Advania** 
 Vi arbetar med självledarskap som en del av vardagen. I praktiken betyder det att du:
   

  

* Autonomi: tar initiativ, fattar beslut nära kund och äger prioriteringar och genomförande i ditt uppdrag
* Kompetens: arbetar strukturerat för hög kvalitet, utvecklar din förmåga och förbättrar löpande arbetssätt och leverans
* Relaterbarhet: bygger samarbeten, söker stöd och mentorskap vid behov, bidrar till teamet och använder nätverk för att lyckas i uppdraget


****Det här söker vi****
 Du har gedigen erfarenhet inom Microsoft ekosystemet och är van att arbeta på specialistnivå. Du tar ansvar för ditt arbete, är nyfiken på ny teknik och trivs i en roll med både tekniskt djup och kundkontakt.
   

  

**Vi Ser Att Du Har**
* Minst 5 års bred Microsoft erfarenhet med tyngdpunkt i SharePoint
* Solid erfarenhet av SharePoint On Premise 2013 och framåt, inklusive installation, konfiguration, migrering och förvaltning
* Goda kunskaper i PowerShell
* Erfarenhet av serveradministration, SQL, nätverk och säkerhet
* Vana av dokument och ärendehanteringslösningar
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av SharePoint Online och bredare Microsoft 365 arbete, exempelvis Teams, Viva, Syntex och Purview
* Power Platform, exempelvis Power Automate och eller Power Apps
* Migreringsverktyg, särskilt ShareGate
* Microsoft certifieringar inom Modern Workplace, Azure eller liknande
* JavaScript och frontendutveckling i SharePoint


**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan! 👋** 
 Visa gärna ditt intresse så snart som möjligt då vi intervjuar löpande. Vi välkomnar sökanden med olika bakgrunder, erfarenheter och synsätt, eftersom vi vet att en bredare mångfald berikar var och en av oss och stärker såväl effektivitet som kreativitet i vårt arbete.
   

  

 Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess genomgår våra slutkandidater en obligatorisk bakgrundskontroll, en för oss kvalitativ kontroll inför ett anställningsbeslut. Advania samarbetar med Ljung & Sjöberg i ärenden kopplat till alkohol-, drog- och spelproblematik och är en certifierad "Proaktiv Arbetsplats".
   

  

 Tveka inte att höra av dig om du har några frågor eller funderingar.

title: Lead Developer i Stockholm
description:
***Som Lead Developer kommer du in i ett stadie då vi satsar på att skala upp vår satsning inom AI & Cloud Development. Vi söker dig som inte bara skriver kod, utan bygger lösningar som fungerar idag såväl som håller och utvecklas över tid. På Solita vill vi också något mer, vi tar initiativ, samarbetar och utforskar för att skapa en AI- och datadriven framtid.***




  





 Du blir del av ett växande område med runt 20 lättsamma och engagerade konsulter inom Cloud, AI och systemutveckling. Samtidigt får du kollegor från hela Solita med expertis i allt från data, strategi och mycket mer att dela kunskap och perspektiv med, läs mer det här. När vi växer gör dina möjligheter också det, du får vara med och påverka kulturen, affären och din roll.
 



  





**En dag på Solita** 




 En dag på Solita kan börja med ett standup-möte med ditt team på kunduppdraget, ibland består det av fler kollegor från Solita. Är det fredag kanske du jobbar från Solita kontoret i Stockholm för att starta dagen med frukost. Andra dagar jobbar du från kundens kontor eller hemifrån.
 



  





 Sen kliver du in i ditt arbete, när du stöter på ett problem söker du upp en lång diskussionstråd i slack med insikter från kollegor som haft samma problem. Andra gånger passar du på att fråga en kollega vid kaffemaskinen om deras perspektiv för att komma vidare i ett designval du står inför. Du kan också delta i våra interna utbildningsmöten, där vi delar kunskap om allt från nya teknologier och arbetssätt till välmående. Vissa dagar avslutar du med AW, brädspel, filmkväll eller annan aktivitet du och kollegor tycker är kul!
 



  





**Din roll som Lead Developer** 




 I rollen som Lead Developer utformar och leder du utvecklingen av robusta och skalbara system: lösningar som möter både affärsbehov och tekniska krav för kunder inom alla möjliga branscher. Det gör du genom utvecklings- och designarbete, coachande av utvecklare och nära dialog med verksamheten. Samtidigt identifierar och driver du optimeringar av utvecklingsprocessen. Du kan även vara med i förundersökningar, stötta i pre-sales och rekryteringen av nya kollegor.
 



  





 För oss är cloud-native lösningar normen och vi jobbar teknikagnostiskt, problemet styr teknikvalen, inte tvärtom. Det innebär att du får frihet att vara med och forma teknikval. Läs mer om hur kollegor jobbar och diskuterar om olika tekniker i vår Dev blog här.
 



  





**Känner du igen dig i följande?** 




 Du kan kommunicera på svenska och engelska i tal och skrift. Det är ett plus om du varit konsult tidigare men det huvudsakliga är din förmåga att snabbt komma in i nya sammanhang och lära dig. Tack vare flera års erfarenhet av att bygga moderna lösningar genom hela utvecklingscykeln, främst i C# .NET, känner du dig trygg i rollen då du fått med dig:
 


* Vana att jobba med distribuerade system och eventdriven, skalbar arkitektur. Gärna med tekniker som Kafka, RabbitMQ eller Azure Service Bus.
* God förståelse för Dev(Sec)Ops-principer, CI/CD och orkestrering.
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar som Azure, AWS eller GCP. Har du jobbat med containerization (Kubernetes, Docker) eller Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi, Bicep) är det en extra tillgång.
* Nyfikenhet på AI i utvecklingsarbetet: hur verktyg som GitHub Copilot, OpenAI API:er eller ML-integrerade pipelines kan göra kodningen smartare och effektivare.



  





 Vi letar inte bara efter tekniska skills, vi vill jobba med dig som tar ansvar för att bygga rätt lösningar på rätt sätt genom att utmana med omtanke. Du ser kod som ett hantverk, inte bara ett medel till funktion: du bryr dig om kvalitet, läsbarhet och hållbarhet. Du kommer trivas hos oss om du tycker om att dela med dig av din kunskap lika mycket som du är nyfiken på- och lyfter andras.
 



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 Vår företagskultur är väldigt viktig för oss. Vi värdesätter låg hierarki, självständighet och ansvar, värdeskapande arbete och trevliga kollegor. Här kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, och här kan du bläddra bland våra tech-bloggar.
 


* **Meningsfulla projekt:** 
 Arbeta i en agil miljö där du kan påverka teknikval och arbetssätt för att skapa de bästa lösningarna
* **Flexibilitet och autonomi** 
 för att utforma ditt arbete med flextider– läs mer från vår blogg.
* **Ständig utveckling:** 
 Vi erbjuder kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling för att säkerställa att våra medarbetare ligger längst fram i teknikutvecklingen.
* **Innovativ kultur:** 
 Arbeta tillsammans med några av de främsta experterna inom data, analys och utveckling



  





 Utöver detta får du även ta del av följande
 **förmåner** 
 :
 



 💰 Fast lön oberoende av beläggningsgrad med möjlighet till löneväxling till ditt pensionssparande
 



 🏖️ 30 semesterdagar
 



 🏥 Sjukvårdsförsäkring för både din mentala och fysiska hälsa som täcker dig även utanför tjänstetid
 



 🏋️ Friskvårdsbidrag på 5000 kr via Benify.
 



 💻 Ett brett nätverk av erfarna specialister från olika områden inom tech att samarbeta med
 



 🔗 Intern coach för att stödja ditt välbefinnande
 



 🪩 After Work och hobbyaktiviteter
 



 🥐 Fredagsfrukost
 



  





**Vilka är vi?** 




 Solita är ett värderingsstyrt konsultbolag med över 2200 medarbetare i 9 länder, varav ca 230 i Sverige. Vår storlek gör oss tillräckligt stora för att vara en stabil och innovativ arbetsgivare, men samtidigt tillräckligt små för att värna om våra medarbetare och kunder. Med bred kompetens inom digital transformation erbjuder vi en dynamisk arbetsmiljö. Hos oss får du friheten att utvecklas, både professionellt och personligt.
 



  





**Intresserad av att höra mer?** 




 Låter det som en spännande utmaning? Skicka in din ansökan och bli en del av vårt team som ligger i framkant inom systemutveckling!
 



 Om du har några frågor, skriv gärna till Rebecca Hammel på LinkedIn eller via mail till rebecca.hammel@solita.se. Du kan också kontakta rekryteringsansvarig, Louise Doverholt på LinkedIn eller via mail till louise.doverholt@solita.se .
 



  





**Hur ser processen ut?** 




 I rekryteringsprocessen tror vi på en snabb och effektiv process. Du ansöker med CV eller LinkedIn och svarar på några korta frågor. Vi går igenom ansökningar löpande. Om vi ser en potentiell matchning, bjuder vi in dig till ett första möte för att lära känna dig och berätta mer om vår kultur och våra värderingar på Solita. I andra intervjun fokuserar vi på din tekniska kompetens och din erfarenhet. Om allt går bra tar vi oss vidare till sista steget där vi presenterar ett erbjudande och välkomnar dig som ny Solitan!

title: Connectivity Verification Engineer
description:
At Coretura, we are building advanced software and system solutions that shape the future of connected mobility. Our teams work close to the technology, close to the product, and close to the people who drive innovation forward.
  
As part of our team, you’ll work with wireless technologies, from Wi‑Fi 7 and advanced Bluetooth stacks to V2X, satellite communication, and 5G modem platforms. If you enjoy exploring how complex systems behave in the real world and want to be part of a highly skilled engineering environment, this could be your next step.
  
About the role
  
In this role, you take ownership of validating complete connectivity experiences across automotive and embedded platforms. You’ll work hands‑on with wireless systems, design test strategies, analyze behavior across layers, and collaborate closely with developers, architects, and system engineers.
  
Your work directly influences quality, user experience, and how tomorrow’s connected solutions are built.
  
What you will do
  
Your mission is to understand — and improve — how wireless systems behave as a whole. You will:
  
  

Validate GNSS positioning accuracy across multi‑constellation receivers, including analysis of positioning performance and behavior. Good to have knowledge of NMEA data streams
  
  

Analyze cellular behavior from 2G–5G, including APN management, modem sleep/wake, and IP performance.
  
  

Validate Wi‑Fi 7 stability, security, and performance across different operating modes.
  
  

Ensure smooth eSIM/iSIM provisioning and lifecycle handling.
  
  

Evaluate Bluetooth and BLE performance in real scenarios (pairing, multi‑device handling, audio streaming).
  
  

Ensure smooth eSIM/iSIM provisioning and lifecycle handling.
  
  

Work with V2X communication, verifying reliability, safety‑critical message handling, and PKI integration.
  
  

Validate projection and connectivity services such as Android Auto and CarPlay.
  
  

Explore system performance when switching between terrestrial networks and satellite/NTN connections.
  
  

Troubleshoot issues across software, hardware, and RF domains, driving root cause analysis through hands‑on investigation of networking fundamentals and protocols (e.g., DNS, TCP/IP, UDP)
  
  

Rather than isolated feature checks, you focus on true system behavior and how everything works together.
  
Who you are
  
You’re likely someone who enjoys digging into how wireless technologies behave in practice — and who doesn’t shy away from complex problem solving. We believe you’ll thrive if you have:
  
  

Experience validating or developing wireless communication (Bluetooth, Wi‑Fi, cellular, V2X or similar).
  
  

Understanding of RF fundamentals, protocol stacks, or embedded system communication flows.
  
  

Experience analyzing logs, debugging across layers, and collaborating with cross‑functional teams.
  
  

A curious, structured mindset with a passion for continuous learning.
  
  

Professional proficiency in English.
  
  

You don’t need all the keywords — what matters is your drive, depth, and ability to learn.
  
Why Coretura?
  
Coretura builds software and system solutions used in tomorrow’s connected vehicles. We work long‑term with product development in areas like connectivity, embedded platforms, and software‑defined mobility.
  
At Coretura you will be part of a skilled engineering community where people support each other, share knowledge, and care about building high‑quality technology. We value trust, autonomy, and continuous learning — and we offer meaningful work with modern tech that truly matters.

title: System Engineer
description:
At Tata Technologies we make product development dreams a reality by designing, engineering and validating the products of tomorrow for the world’s leading manufacturers. Due to our continued growth, we are now recruiting for a System Engineer to strengthen our team in Gothenburg, Sweden.
  
Responsibilities
  
  

**Windows Migration & System Setup:**  

Install and upgrade remaining TFO computers from Windows 10 to Windows 11.
  
Follow established procedures to ensure computers meet requirements for TFO Test Rig Software Validation.
  
Perform deployment tasks using reference images, scripts, automated tools, or manual installation when required.
  
  

**Workflow & Quality Assurance:**  

Ensure standardization including templates, playbooks, and coding guidelines.
  
Support testing in lab/pilot environments with proper rollback planning.
  
Update technical documentation in repositories as part of change processes.
  
  

**Technical Environment:**  

**Windows:** Windows 10/11, Group Policy, AD/Intune.
  
**Automation:** PowerShell, Python, Git, Ansible.
  
**Networking:** DNS/DHCP troubleshooting, packet tracing.
  
**Diagnostics:** Event Viewer, logging, HW/SW troubleshooting tools.
  
**Test Rig Tools:** CANoe/Vector (CAN/LIN drivers, licensing, templates).
  
**Documentation & Ticketing:** Confluence, Jira, ServiceNow.
  
  

**Security & Compliance:**  

Follow internal security requirements, including classification and logging policies.
  
Support internal compliance routines and audits.
  
Background checks may be required based on policy.
  
  

**Communication & Reporting:**  

Participate in progress of follow-up meetings on Windows 11 migration.
  
Report blockers, issues, and deviations from the plan.
  
  

Experience / Background
  
  

**Must‑Have Skills:**  

2–4+ years of hands-on experience with Windows 10/11 deployment, upgrades, patching, lifecycle management.
  
Strong network troubleshooting skills (DNS, DHCP, packet tracing).
  
Solid hardware and software troubleshooting abilities.
  
Strong documentation skills in Swedish and English.
  
  

Meritorious
  
Familiarity with ITIL processes (Incident/Change/Problem).
  
Experience with ServiceNow or Jira.
  
Knowledge of Test Rigs, Test Vehicles, CAN, or LIN.
  
Experience with CANoe (installation, configuration, logging, licenses).
  
  

If you are passionate about bringing innovation to the projects you work on then we would love to hear from you.
  
**Tata Technologies:** Engineering a better world.
  
Tata Technologies would like to thank all applicants for their interest; each application will be reviewed against the set criteria for the role. We would like to advise that only candidates under consideration will be contacted. If you do not hear from us within 10 working days following the closing date it will mean that unfortunately your application has not been successful. We will however retain your details for any suitable future opportunities.

title: FEA - Junior Structural Analyst
description:
Job Description


AFRY Technical Analysis is the largest consulting CAE-department in Sweden with extensive experience within structural and fluid mechanics from a wide range of clients in several sectors. We are deeply involved in many automotive projects, national and international, and provide our clients with market leading CAE competence.


We are looking for newly graduated engineers eager to take on their first engineering and CAE position. You will work as a Structural Analyst in our CAE-department in Stockholm. Performing FE-Analysis for our clients within Automotive, Defense and Life Science industry will be your main task. Our focus is product development, and we help our clients develop better products using FEA and CFD. The scope and content of your assignments will vary and can cover strength, fatigue and dynamic/crash analysis.


ABAQUS, LS-DYNA and ANSYS will be your main software tools. Analytical calculations will be made mainly to verify your FEA-models and results.


Qualifications


You have a M.Sc. in applied mechanics or similar and have completed (or will complete during spring 2026) your master thesis in solid mechanics. Theoretical knowledge in solid mechanics is one your strengths and you have a good grasp on basic methodology with respect to finite element analysis. You also have an analytical mindset and a client-oriented approach to your work and deliveries.


Your feel confident with performing basic strength, fatigue and/or crash analysis, and have performed some relevant analysis of different components/products and materials during your education. You also have some experience from commercial FEA software like ANSYS or Abaqus.


As a person you are meticulous, ambitious and curios. Collaboration comes naturally to you, and you appreciate the value added by working together with your collogues to find the best solution for our clients. Lastly, you also have good communicative skills, both oral and in writing, and can explain complex issues in a comprehensible manner.


Company Description


AFRY provides engineering, design, digital and advisory services. We are devoted experts in industry, energy and infrastructure sectors, creating impact for generations to come. AFRY has Nordic roots with a global reach. Join us in accelerating the transition towards a sustainable society.


Additional Information


At AFRY you will work for an inclusive and brave employer! In addition to this, we offer the below stated and more:

* 28 days holiday + 23rd of December
* Work life balance
* Access to many activities through our social club: Club AFRY
* Competitive benefits regarding pension, wellness, and parental leave
* Company discounts with external partners through our benefits portal Benify

title: Rig Development Engineer [F/M/X]
description:
Job description
  
We are looking for a skilled Rig Development Engineer to join our team within the Automotive & Trucks sector. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the development and delivery of high-quality, reliable test facilities used for advanced vehicle testing and validation. You will work in a dynamic and innovative environment, collaborating closely with internal teams and external suppliers to design, build, and optimize test rigs and associated systems.
  
  

Your missions
  
  

**Design, build, and modify test rigs, including:**  

Mechanical and electrical wiring
  
Software integration
  
Measurement and acquisition systems
  
Electronic control systems
  
Vehicle simulation environments
  
Develop and implement test rig automation solutions
  
Manage data storage, analysis, and evaluation tools
  
Define, plan, and oversee the construction of test facilities
  
Collaborate with suppliers to define and develop test equipment
  
Create tooling, instructions, and technical documentation to support test operations
  
Work closely with stakeholders to understand requirements and design effective testing solutions
  
Ensure test facilities meet the highest standards of quality, safety, and reliability
  
  

Required Skills
  
  

**Strong experience in:**  

Testing methodologies (HIL testing is essential)
  
Maintenance and troubleshooting of test systems
  
Test rig development and validation
  
  

**Solid understanding of:**  

Electrical and mechanical systems
  
Embedded systems and electronic control
  
Data acquisition and measurement systems
  
  

Nice to Have
  
Experience with test automation tools and frameworks
  
Knowledge of vehicle simulation systems
  
Familiarity with automotive testing environments
  
Experience working with suppliers and cross-functional teams
  
  

What we offer
  
An international community bringing together 110+ different nationalities
  
**An environment where trust has a central place:** 70% of our key leaders started their careers at the first level of responsibilities
  
A robust training system with our internal Academy and 250+ available modules
  
A vibrant workplace that frequently gathers for internal events (afterworks, team buildings, etc.)
  
At Mantu, sustainability is part of everything we do. You’ll have the opportunity to turn your ideas into action and make a tangible impact. Every day, our teams bring our ESG commitments to life, from reducing our footprint to driving positive change within our communities. Through our WeCare Together program, you’ll be empowered to design and lead projects that create real social or environmental impact, with the company’s full support.
  
  

Amaris Consulting is proud to be an equal-opportunity workplace. We are committed to promoting diversity within the workforce and creating an inclusive working environment. For this purpose, we welcome applications from all qualified candidates regardless of gender, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, beliefs, age, marital status, disability, or other characteristics.
  
Who are we?
  
Amaris Consulting is an independent technology consulting firm providing guidance and solutions to businesses. With more than 1000 clients across the globe, we have been rolling out solutions in major projects for over a decade – this is made possible by an international team of 7,600 people spread across 5 continents and more than 60 countries. Our solutions focus on four different Business Lines: Information System & Digital, Telecom, Life Sciences and Engineering. We’re focused on building and nurturing a top talent community where all our team members can achieve their full potential. Amaris is your steppingstone to cross rivers of change, meet challenges and achieve all your projects with success.
  
  

At Amaris, we strive to provide our candidates with the best possible recruitment experience. We like to get to know our candidates, challenge them, and be able to give them proper feedback as quickly as possible. Here's what our recruitment process looks like:
  
  

**Brief Call:** Our process typically begins with a brief virtual/phone conversation to get to know you! The objective? Learn about you, understand your motivations, and make sure we have the right job for you!
  
  

Interviews (the average number of interviews is 3 - the number may vary depending on the level of seniority required for the position). During the interviews, you will meet people from our team: your line manager of course, but also other people related to your future role. We will talk in depth about you, your experience, and skills, but also about the position and what will be expected of you. Of course, you will also get to know Amaris: our culture, our roots, our teams, and your career opportunities!
  
  

**Case study:** Depending on the position, we may ask you to take a test. This could be a role play, a technical assessment, a problem-solving scenario, etc.
  
  

As you know, every person is different and so is every role in a company. That is why we have to adapt accordingly, and the process may differ slightly at times. However, please know that we always put ourselves in the candidate's shoes to ensure they have the best possible experience.
  
We look forward to meeting you!

title: Commissioning Project Lead - Sweden
description:
**Commissioning Project Lead - Sweden**


 - (191956)
At HDR, our employee-owners are fully engaged in creating a welcoming environment where each of us is valued and respected, a place where everyone is empowered to bring their authentic selves and novel ideas to work every day. As we foster a culture of inclusion throughout our company and within our communities, we constantly ask ourselves: What is our impact on the world?


Watch Our Story:' https://www.hdrinc.com/our-story'


Each and every role throughout our organization makes a difference in our ability to change the world for the better. Read further to learn how you could help make great things possible not only in your community, but around the world. The role of our Mechanical Commissioning Manager is to ensure that building services systems are, will be or have been commissioned properly and in accordance with the relevant requirements.


The role of our **Commissioning Project Lead – Sweden** is to ensure that building services systems are, will be or have been commissioned properly and in accordance with the relevant requirements.

* Ensuring that our commitments to our clients are met on time and to the required level of detail and quality
* Validating the Building Services (M&E) commissioning process and ensuring that the results achieved are in line with requirements
* Inspecting existing systems to determine their performance
* Advise on mechanical & electrical commissioning and performance requirements, commissioning strategies, programs, scopes of work and the like
* Carrying out measurements, surveys and other technical inspections
* Collaborate with other members of the organization to improve existing systems and procedures
* Acting as a champion in an area of particular technical interest
* Promote the company and the whole group through marketing activities
* Forward planning of equipment required for testing
* Assisting in the preparation of tender documents
* Accurate completion of timesheets on a weekly basis
* Proactively assisting other staff in the performance of their work
* Take full ownership of the commissioning scope from early design review through to final handover, ensuring alignment with client expectations and project milestones
* Lead and coordinate multidisciplinary commissioning activities, acting as the primary point of contact between client, contractors, and internal teams
* Identify, manage and mitigate commissioning risks and issues, ensuring timely resolution to avoid impact on programme or quality
* Drive programme integration of commissioning activities within the overall construction schedule, ensuring readiness and sequencing of works
* Provide leadership and mentoring to junior engineers and site staff, promoting best practice and technical excellence across the project

**Responsibilities**

* Acting safely at all times in accordance with the company's health and safety policies and procedures
* Work diligently, efficiently and professionally at all times
* Ensuring technical compliance and high quality production of our products
* Working closely with the main contractor's team to develop commissioning strategies and processes that fully meet the project objectives
* Fully adopt the company's project and internal management systems
* Maintain a keen awareness of project finances and control of related expenditure
* Attend meetings as required
* Produce internal and client reports that include technical, commercial and programmatic aspects
* Technical commentary on drawings, manuals and technical submissions
* Awareness and internal reporting of project scope changes
* Working with other members of a professional team to assess progress, difficulties and costs
* Perform hands-on commissioning work as required #LI-MW4
* Represent the company in client-facing technical discussions and key project meetings, reinforcing confidence in delivery capability
* Contribute to continuous improvement of commissioning processes, standards, and digital tools across projects

**Preferred Qualifications**

* BEng Mechanical or Electrical Engineering with Building Services.
* Considerable experience will be sought to demonstrate project management skills.
* Member of CIBSE, ASHRAE or equivalent professional qualifications an advantage.
* At least 5 years of experience in a commissioning engineer role in a building orientated company in the building types Data Centers, Commercial, Residential, Life Science or Health Care.
* Worked within company Quality & Environmental policies and procedures.
* IT Literate – MS Office package.
**Required Qualifications**  

* A minimum of 8 years of industry experience dealing with mechanical, electrical and controls disciplines
* Must be willing to travel to site-based locations as reasonably based on HDR needs
* Must be an experienced engineer, either a licensed PE or a field technician with excellent understanding of MEP systems, HVAC controls, the T&B process, etc
* Must have good computer skills and effective typing skills
* Understanding of Microsoft Excel, Word, Outlook, and Project software
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Be familiar with the organization of design documents, the preparation of the multidiscipline designs, and the delivery of the design & construction services
* Strong knowledge of construction practices, systems engineering, operations fundamentals, contracting, and general business operations
* Understanding of project accounting and financial management tools
* Ability to prioritize and organize work; ability to work on multiple tasks concurrently
An attitude and commitment to being an active participant of our employee-owned culture is a must  
* 

  

**What We Believe**  

HDR is our company. Together, we build on each other's life experiences and perspectives to make great things possible every day. This shapes our collaborative culture, encourages organizational trust and connects us closer to the clients and communities we serve.  

  

**Our Commitment**  

As employee owners, we all have a role in creating an inclusive environment where each of us is welcomed, valued, respected and empowered to bring our authentic selves to work every day.  

  

Our eight Employee Network Groups (Asian Pacific, Black, Hispanic/Latino(a), LGBTQ+, People with Disabilities, Veterans, Women, Young Professionals) help create a sense of belonging and foster a supportive environment where everyone is empowered to engage and contribute. Each group has an executive sponsor and is open to all employees.

**Primary Location****:**
Sweden

**Other Locations****:**
Sweden-Stackbo, Sweden-Gothenburg, Sweden-Uppsala, Sweden-Malmö, Netherlands, Sweden-Stockholm

**Industry****:**
Building Engineering

**Schedule****:**
Full-time

**Employee Status****:**
Regular

**BusinessClass****:**
Building Commissioning

**Job Posting****:**
Mar 31, 2026

title: Reliability Test Technician
description:
**Coherent Corp.** is a global leader in photonics, designing and manufacturing advanced laser, optical, and materials technologies that power semiconductor manufacturing, advanced communications, electronics, and precision industrial systems worldwide.

Combining deep engineering expertise with advanced manufacturing, we deliver high-performance solutions that enable faster networks, smarter devices, and next-generation production.  

  

*Coherent* ***Sweden*** *is home to Sweden’s only full-scale indium phosphide wafer fabrication facility. Here, we design, manufacture, and test some of the world’s fastest optical chips under one roof — supporting AI infrastructure, data centers, and global communications.*


**JOB SUMMARY**


**Location:** Jarfalla, Onsite  

**Employment Type: Full Time**

  


**ROLES & RESPONSIBILITIES**

  


* Sample administration including inspection and deviation handling.

  


* Assembly end re assembly of lasers on carriers to/from fixtures.

  


* Electro optical measurements in our DC measurement stations.

  


* Load unload lasers of laser carriers in fixtures, into ovens and climate chambers.

  


* Preventive maintenance of ovens and climate chambers
* Closest collaboration will be with R&D test technicians, the responsible reliability process engineer, and our reliability leads.

  


**SKILLS & EXPERIENCE**

  


* Secondary education, preferably technical profile.
* Technical interest, strong communication skills, careful and efficient.
* Swedish and English
* Good technical orientation and computer/software skills.

  



We appreciate your interest in this role! To ensure a fair evaluation, please make sure your CV and application clearly describe your experience, language skills, and ability to work on-site in Järfälla. Due to the high volume of applications, we will only proceed with candidates who clearly match the stated requirements.

  


**Culture Commitment**

  



We ensure that the company’s ICARE values are reflected in all aspects of your role at Coherent:

  


* **Integrity –** Create an environment of trust
* **Collaboration –** Innovate through the sharing of ideas
* **Accountability –** Own the process and the outcome
* **Respect –** Recognize the value in everyone
* **Enthusiasm –** Find a sense of purpose in work

  


**We Offer**

  


* A dynamic and international work environment
* An appreciative and collegial company culture
* Unique technical challenges for future products
* Benefits above industry average

  


**APPLICATION & SELECTION**

  



Current employees who wish to apply should submit a cover letter detailing their interest in the position and how their skills and experience align with the requirements of the role.  



If you require any adjustments or accommodations during the application process, please reach out to **john.cairney@coherent.com**. We are committed to creating an inclusive and accessible recruitment experience and encourage applications from individuals of all backgrounds.


ABOUT US


Coherent is a global leader in lasers, engineered materials and networking components. We are a vertically integrated manufacturing company that develops innovative products for diversified applications in the industrial, optical communications, military, life sciences, semiconductor equipment, and consumer markets. Coherent provides a comprehensive career development platform within an environment that challenges employees to perform at their best, while rewarding excellence and hard-work through a competitive compensation program. It's an exciting opportunity to work for a company that offers stability, longevity and growth. Come Join Us!
  

  

**Note to recruiters and employment agencies:** We will not pay for unsolicited resumes from recruiters and employment agencies unless we have a signed agreement and have required assistance, in writing, for a specific opening.

title: Data Product Manager
emails: davood.naderi@siemens-energy.com, daniel.carlsson.ext@siemens-energy.com, unionen.finspang.se@siemens-energy.com, asi.se@siemens-energy.com, anders.fors@siemens-energy.com, mikael.malmgren@siemens-energy.com
description:
**A Snapshot of Your Day**


Are you passionate about the environment and climate change? Ready to shape the future of the energy transition? Join the Siemens Energy Gas Services organization, where we develop cutting-edge Data and AI solutions that enhance our operations. We recognize that tackling these challenges requires diverse perspectives, and we can’t do it alone. Our team is on the lookout for innovative, enthusiastic, and adaptable data, digital, and AI professionals eager to drive us forward on this exciting journey. As part of the Data Catalysts, you will develop and deliver Data Products & AI solutions across Sales & Marketing, Project Execution, and Service, while advancing R&D efforts to enhance our analytics capabilities. Lead the product portfolio for Digital Core, utilizing innovative technologies like GenAI and LLMs to introduce new tools for Siemens Energy users.

  

**How You’ll Make an Impact**


* As a Product Manager, you will serve as the primary liaison between the engineering team and Product Owners within the Gas Services organization.
* You will prioritize and translate complex customer needs into secure, future-proof technical solutions.
* Bridge the gap between business and data/software engineering teams by translating business requirements into effective technical solutions.
* Take charge of successful product releases that align with business needs.
* Manage program finances, budget allocations, cost controls, and risk assessments.

  

**What You Bring**

* Over 5 years of experience in Data & Analytics and Software Product Management.
* Strong communication skills to engage effectively with international colleagues in sustainability and data domains.
* Understanding of the business impact of sustainability initiatives and how data products support strategic decision-making, including developing and documenting RoI assumptions as a foundation for solid business cases for projects and product development value.
* Proven experience in delivering data-rich digital products – including web/mobile apps and data visualization dashboards – closely driving the development from concept to final product (owning and refining the product backlog, continuous sprint planning, ensuring quality and timely delivery)
* Proficient in AWS, Snowflake, and Tableau, with expertise in Agile and Scrum methodologies.
* Proven experience in managing product finances (budget/forecasts/actual costs), reporting and risks, with familiarity in software systems like ServiceNow.
* Ability to motivate and coordinate Agile teams, including remote colleagues, with a strong customer focus.
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills, emphasizing clarity and conciseness.
* Committed to simplifying projects while maintaining high standards and delivering exceptional service.
* Proficient in English; knowledge of German or Swedish is a plus.
* Motivated to contribute to the global transformation and decarbonization of energy generation.
* Proven ability to navigate complex organizations and drive outcomes at scale.
* Open-minded, eager to learn, and dedicated to continuous self-improvement.
* Demonstrated leadership skills to collaborate across multicultural teams and nurture engineering talent.

  

**About the Team**

You will be joining a dynamic and collaborative team dedicated to driving innovation in the energy sector. Our team is committed to leveraging data and AI to create impactful solutions that support sustainability and operational excellence. We thrive on diverse perspectives and encourage open communication, fostering an environment where every team member can contribute their unique insights and skills. Together, we are on a mission to transform the energy landscape and make a meaningful difference in the world.



Our **Gas Services division** offers Low-emission power generation through service and decarbonization. Zero or low emission power generation and all gas turbines under one roof, steam turbines and generators. Decarbonization opportunities through service offerings, modernization, and digitalization of the fleet.

  


We can offer you employment benefits such as: reduction of working hours, advance vacation, health care allowance and an eventual possibility to a flexible working place.

  

**Who is Siemens Energy?**



At Siemens Energy, we are more than just an energy technology company. With ~100,000 dedicated employees in more than 90 countries, we develop the energy systems of the future, ensuring that the growing energy demand of the global community is met reliably and sustainably. The technologies created in our research departments and factories drive the energy transition and provide the base for one sixth of the world's electricity generation.

  


Our global team is committed to making sustainable, reliable, and affordable energy a reality by pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We uphold a 150-year legacy of innovation that encourages our search for people who will support our focus on decarbonization, new technologies, and energy transformation.

  


Find out how you can make a difference at Siemens Energy: https://www.siemens-energy.com/employeevideo

  

**Our Commitment to Diversity**



Lucky for us, we are not all the same. Through diversity, we generate power. We run on inclusion and our combined creative energy is fueled by over 130 nationalities. Siemens Energy celebrates character – no matter what ethnic background, gender, age, religion, identity, or disability. We energize society, all of society, and we do not discriminate based on our differences.

  

**Application**



Don’t hesitate – apply via https://jobs.siemens-energy.com/en\_US/jobs or https://siemensenergy.avature.net/internalcareers , id nr 290104 not later than 2026-04-13.

  


Ongoing selection is applied, the role might be filled before last application date.



For questions about the role, please contact the recruiting manager Davood Naderi on davood.naderi@siemens-energy.com



For questions about the recruitment process please contact the responsible recruiter Daniel Carlsson on daniel.carlsson.ext@siemens-energy.com



We refrain from all contact with staffing and recruitment companies, or advertising brokers.

  


Location: Finspång

  

**Trade Union Representatives:**  

Unionen, unionen.finspang.se@siemens-energy.com  

Sveriges Ingenjörer & SACO, asi.se@siemens-energy.com
  

Ledarna, Anders Fors, anders.fors@siemens-energy.com
  

IF Metall, Mikael Malmgren, mikael.malmgren@siemens-energy.com

  

  

**#LI-JS6**

title: Mechanical Plant Design Engineer
description:
**Job Description:**


**The opportunity**


The Mechanical Plant Design department at HVDC is now looking for a Design Engineer to join the team with focus on Backbone/Base solutions. You are welcome in our energetic team with mainly experienced, but also young engineers and colleagues of diverse nationalities around the world. We work closely within the various design teams and collaborate with engineering teams in Sweden and abroad.

*“In this team, we are true team players and since the group already are co-operating in a very supportive way, we are looking for you who can contribute to this even more“*  

*– Hiring Manager Marie-Louise Frennesson*

  



**How you’ll make an impact**

* Work in advanced high-end CAD software(s) to perform CAD activities such as 3D-modelling of parts, assemblies and drawings for both details and plant design.
* Deliver commitments on time and with good quality.
* Evaluating, selecting and applying standard techniques and procedures to perform Station layout design and detail design of steel structures and other components.
* Preparing proposals/presentations of engineering projects/programs i.e. provision of bill of materials etc.
* Preparing project documentation, effective interaction with colleagues from different parts of the company.
* Work according to safety standards and with mitigation of potential risks.
* Living Hitachi Energy core values of safety and integrity, which means taking responsibility for your own actions while caring for your colleagues and the business.

**Your background**  

*We know that no candidate meets every requirement. If you are motivated by this role and meet many of the criteria below, we strongly encourage you to apply.*

* Minimum a bachelor’s degree in mechanical engineering or related discipline.
* Experience or interest in 3D-Modeling and performing 2D-drawings/layouts in Software tools NX/TC or similar
* Experience of working in BIM
* A high level of self-motivation, curiosity and desire to learn about new Technologies.
* A collaborative, solutions-oriented approach and strong communication skills.
